title: Full-Stack Developer – Continue & Upgrade Existing SaaS Project (Next.js + Prisma + Redis)
description:
We are looking for a reliable full-stack developer to take over and continue development of an SaaS platform for service businesses. 



This system is a modern, all-in-one business management tool designed to systemise and simplify the entire operations of service-based businesses — starting with lawn care and pressure washing. From basic scheduling to route optiization, to fleet management and more.

It replaces spreadsheets, whiteboards, and chaotic WhatsApp groups with one clean platform that gives owners full visibility and control over their business

Our system turns a chaotic service business into a smooth, predictable, and scalable operation — so owners can step back from daily firefighting and focus on growth.



We already have great feedback from potential users and want this project to get to Beta phase as soon as possible. 



There is a solid foundation built (Next.js backend, Prisma + PostgreSQL, Redis cache, basic auth structure.

We need someone who can start immediately, communicate clearly, and deliver consistent daily / weekly progress.



Key Responsibilities:

Audit and Take over the existing codebase and continue development either based on current timeline or adjusted to suit your own 

Complete and improve the authentication module (JWT + Passport)

Keep code clean and well-documented

Provide daily updates with clear progress and short demos



Requirements:



Strong experience with Next.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL, and Redis

Good knowledge of React for frontend

Experience with JWT authentication and role-based access

Ability to work independently and deliver on time

Excellent English communication (written and spoken)

Available for 15–20 hours per week



Nice to Have:



Experience with AI integrations 

Previous work on scheduling, field service, or trade management apps

Familiarity with Google Maps, Stripe, Xero, or Twilio etc for integrations



Rate & Hours:



$12 – $15 USD per hour 

Capped at 15–20 hours per week due to current budget

Weekly payments for completed and verified work



How to Apply:

Please reply with:



Your relevant experience (especially Next.js + Prisma projects)

Links to similar work or GitHub (if available)

Confirmation that you can start immediately and commit to 15–20 hours/week

Your expected hourly rate within the $12–$15 USD range



Only serious applicants who can start this week will be considered.

Looking forward to your application.

title: Go High Level Funnel & Automation Specialist
description:
GHL + ManyChat + A2P + SEO + Course/Community Buildout

We’re looking for a highly skilled Go High Level Funnel and Automation Specialist to help build and maintain the backend systems for a growing online education and coaching business serving parents of neurodivergent children.

This is not a generic VA role. We need someone who is strong in systems, automations, funnels, workflows, course setup, and implementation, and who can help us build a clean, scalable backend inside Go High Level. You’ll also help support ManyChat automations, A2P approval/setup, SEO implementation, and membership/community buildout, including support for our signature group program, The Braver Way.

You’ll be working closely with the founder to turn already-mapped strategy into an organized, functional, well-tested system. We already have a strong build plan, workflow logic, tracking structure, and offer architecture in place. We need someone who can execute well, think clearly, troubleshoot problems, and help us build this the right way.



Background

We are a growing coaching and education business in the neurodivergent family support space. Our work helps parents of neurodivergent children move from chaos and overwhelm into calmer, more connected homes through practical, evidence-based support.

We are building funnels, workflows, automations, course areas, community systems, and reporting infrastructure inside Go High Level, and we need someone who can help us implement those systems with care, accuracy, and strong attention to detail.

This role includes support for several funnels and offers, including:

* 1:1 coaching funnels

* coaching + course funnels

* webinar funnels

* 5-day challenge funnels

* calendar and booking workflows

* membership/course/resource delivery

* Braver Way group program setup

* community and replay/resource systems

* ManyChat automations

* A2P/SMS compliance setup

* SEO implementation across funnels/pages



Job Description

We are looking for someone who is experienced in Go High Level, confident with automation logic, comfortable with backend funnel builds, and able to help us organize, implement, test, and maintain systems that support sales, onboarding, delivery, and community.

This person should be able to take a structured implementation packet and build it accurately inside GHL. You should also be comfortable helping with ManyChat flows, A2P approval/setup, SEO implementation, course and community structure, and general backend optimization.

This is a role for someone who likes systems, enjoys figuring things out, and can keep a backend clean instead of chaotic.



Detailed Responsibilities

Your regular responsibilities will include:

1. Build and maintain Go High Level funnels, workflows, automations, products, forms, tags, triggers, calendars, and reporting systems.

2. Build and maintain backend systems for:

    * 1:1 coaching funnels

    * coaching + course funnels

    * webinar funnels

    * 5-day challenge funnels

    * application ? call ? checkout funnels

    * onboarding and delivery workflows

    * abandoned checkout, no-show, reschedule, and reengagement workflows

3. Implement and maintain the backend for our group coaching program, The Braver Way, including:

    * application flow

    * call-close path

    * checkout flow

    * VIP upsell logic

    * fast-action bonus logic

    * course area setup

    * replay library

    * separate resource hub

    * GHL community setup

    * AI access button/link placement in community

    * onboarding and access workflows

4. Build and maintain ManyChat automations for Instagram/Facebook/TikTok lead capture, comment/DM automation, keyword flows, nurture, and handoff points where needed.

5. Help with A2P 10DLC approval/setup and SMS compliance so our text-based workflows are built properly and can run safely.

6. Implement on-page and funnel SEO tasks, including page titles, meta descriptions, keyword placement, page structure, SEO fields, and related optimization tasks.

7. Set up and maintain tags, pipeline stages, trigger logic, stop rules, tracking, UTMs, and dashboards so lead flow and attribution stay organized and measurable.

8. Test everything thoroughly across desktop and mobile, including:

    * form submissions

    * booking flows

    * checkout flows

    * automation triggers

    *
 and text delivery

    * replay delivery

    * course access

    * community access

    * dashboard population

    * ManyChat flow logic

    * A2P/SMS flow readiness

9. Troubleshoot backend issues and help clean up systems as the business grows.

10. Communicate clearly about what is done, what is in progress, what is blocked, and what needs founder approval.



Required Technical Skills and Experience

To qualify for this position, you should already have strong experience in most of the following:

1. Go High Level

    * funnels

    * forms

    * workflows

    * automations

    * products/checkouts

    * calendars

    * tags/pipelines

    * course/membership setup

    * reporting/dashboard basics

2. Automation logic and systems thinking

    * trigger logic

    * workflow stop rules

    * segmentation

    * lead routing

    * backend cleanup

    * testing and QA

3. ManyChat

    * DM automation

    * keyword flows

    * comment-to-DM flows

    * lead capture

    * nurture and handoff sequences

4. A2P / SMS setup

    * experience with SMS compliance

    * experience with A2P approval or related messaging setup

5. SEO implementation

    * on-page SEO

    * funnel/page metadata

    * keyword placement

    * page structure

    * SEO field setup

6. Strong English communication skills

7. Ability to follow an implementation system and execute with precision



Desired Technical Skills and Experience

These are not required, but they would be a big plus:

* experience building course or membership areas

* experience building communities inside GHL

* experience supporting coaches, educators, or online programs

* experience with challenge/webinar funnel ecosystems

* experience with onboarding flows and client delivery systems

* basic design/layout sense for pages inside GHL

* experience with tracking, attribution, and dashboard/reporting organization

* experience with AI tool access or external tool integration workflows

* familiarity with neurodivergent family support, education, or coaching spaces



Soft Skills

It is very important that the person we hire is:

* highly detail-oriented

* organized and systematic

* able to think through logic clearly

* comfortable asking questions when something is unclear

* proactive without being messy

* dependable and consistent

* calm under pressure

* able to troubleshoot without spiraling

* able to follow instructions closely

* able to keep a backend clean and well-labeled

This role is not a good fit for someone who rushes through builds, skips testing, or creates messy automations that break later.



Basic Skills

You should also be comfortable using tools like:

* Gmail and Google Drive

* Google Docs and Google Sheets

* Canva & Vimeo

* Loom or screen recording tools

* time tracking tools if required

* spreadsheets for implementation, tracking, or QA notes



Examples of the Type of Work You’d Be Helping Build

You would be helping implement things like:

* booked-call, reminder, no-show, reengagement, reschedule, cancel, abandoned checkout, and purchase workflows

* recording/replay systems with expiration rules and redirect logic for webinar/challenge content

* detailed attribution systems using UTMs, source tags, and reporting dashboards

* a GHL-based course + community ecosystem for The Braver Way, including application-first sales flow, course access, replay library, resource hub, fast-action bonuses, partner pass support, and AI access inside community



Work Schedule and Availability

This role is:

* full-time or gig 

Preferred:

* Some overlap with U.S. business hours for communication and troubleshooting

* Flexible enough to work independently between check-ins

* Able to meet deadlines and communicate blockers early

Please include your typical working hours and time zone when you apply.



Salary

$8.00 per hour and we can discuss the timeline during interview

This starts project-based with opportunity to grow



Training Provided

We already have a strong implementation system, workflow logic, and structure mapped out. You will not be expected to invent the entire backend from scratch.

You will be given:

* implementation guidance

* structured workflow/system expectations

* funnel-specific build outlines

* naming conventions

* tracking requirements

* course/community direction

* offer-specific instructions for Braver Way and other funnels

That said, you should still already be experienced enough to execute inside GHL without needing beginner-level training.



Career Potential

This role has room to grow.

For the right person, this can become a long-term backend systems role with increasing responsibility across:

* funnels

* automations

* course/program systems

* reporting

* community infrastructure

* launch implementation

* backend operations

We are looking for someone who can grow with the business, not someone who only wants one-off random tasks.



How to Apply

To apply, please do all of the following:

1. Put this exact phrase in your subject line:?Behavior Builder

2. In your application, include:

* your experience with Go High Level

* your experience with ManyChat

* your experience with A2P or SMS compliance/setup

* your experience with SEO implementation

* whether you have built courses/memberships/communities in GHL

* whether you have built application ? call ? checkout funnels

* whether you have experience with tracking/UTMs/dashboards

3. Please also answer these questions:

* What is the most complex GHL workflow system you have built?

* Have you built ManyChat automations tied to funnels or lead nurture before?

* Have you helped with A2P setup/approval before?

* What kinds of SEO tasks have you implemented directly?

* Have you ever built or maintained a course area or community inside GHL?

* How do you keep automations from overlapping or breaking?

* What do you do before saying a build is complete?

4. Please include:

* your resume

* links or screenshots of relevant work if allowed

5. In the last line of your application, write:?Clean systems win

That helps us know you read the full post.



Final Note

We are not looking for the cheapest applicant. Pay is negotiable. We are looking for someone who is:

* smart

* reliable

* detail-oriented

* experienced

* honest

* strong in backend implementation

If you love building clean systems, making automations work properly, and helping a meaningful business grow, we’d love to hear from you.

title: We’re Hiring: Remote Appointment Setter / Lead Qualifier (High-Performance Role)
description:
Location: 100% Remote (Work From Home)

Type: Full-Time | 40 Hours/Week (Eastern Standard Time)



About Us



At DamEasy Flood Barriers, we design and manufacture innovative flood protection systems that help property owners safeguard their homes and businesses. Headquartered in Ireland, we serve customers worldwide with a strong focus on the U.S.—especially across Florida.



As we continue to grow, we are looking for a highly driven Appointment Setter / Lead Qualifier who thrives in a fast-paced environment and knows how to turn inbound interest into booked, qualified appointments.



Role Overview



This is not a closing role—your primary mission is to qualify leads and book appointments for our sales team.



You will be the first point of contact for inbound prospects, ensuring every lead is properly vetted, consistently followed up, and scheduled. This role is ideal for someone who is process-driven, detail-oriented, and relentless on the phone—a true call machine who also demonstrates strong judgment and takes ownership of both follow-ups and admin tasks.



Key Responsibilities

Engage with inbound leads via phone, SMS, and
 with urgency and professionalism

Follow a structured pre-qualification process to assess customer fit

Ask the right questions, gather accurate information, and filter high-quality opportunities

Book qualified appointments for the sales team across Florida

Execute consistent follow-ups (calls, texts,
s) to maximize booking rates and reduce no-shows

Maintain accurate and up-to-date records in the CRM (GoHighLevel preferred)

Handle essential admin tasks including data entry, pipeline updates, and appointment confirmations

Ensure a smooth and organized handoff to the sales team

Meet and exceed daily/weekly activity and booking targets

What We’re Looking For

Proven experience in appointment setting, lead qualification, or high-volume calling roles

Strong communication skills with a clear, confident American accent

Ability to strictly follow scripts and qualification frameworks while sounding natural

Strong follow-up discipline and attention to detail

Demonstrates excellent judgment, practical thinking, and the ability to handle situations with minimal supervision

Comfortable managing both high call volume and admin/CRM responsibilities

Highly organized, self-motivated, and results-driven

Resilient, energetic, and thrives in a performance-based environment

What We Offer

100% remote work environment

Competitive base salary + performance-based bonuses

Warm inbound leads only – no cold calling

Full CRM system with automation and VoIP tools

Structured training on product, process, and qualification standards

Opportunity to grow within a high-performing, results-driven team

Schedule

Full-Time: 40 hours/week

Working Hours: Eastern Standard Time (EST)

How to Apply



If you are a results-driven appointment setter who thrives on calls, follows processes, excels at follow-ups, and takes ownership of admin responsibilities, we want to hear from you.



Please send your updated CV along with a short video introduction to 

Note: Applications without a video will not be considered.



We look forward to meeting candidates who are ready to perform at a high level and grow with us.

title: SEO Content Specialist | Email Marketing | Wordpress
description:
Croissant Studios, LLC, the production company behind pastry chef and content creator Jesha Stevens, is looking for a highly motivated Marketing Associate with a strong foundation in writing and a genuine eagerness to learn and grow.



This role is centered around thoughtful, high-quality content—spanning SEO-driven blog posts,
 marketing, and digital product development. You’ll support blog management, write and refine
 campaigns, and help shape the copy and positioning for digital products like ebooks.



You will directly support Jesha Stevens and work closely with her team, helping bring ideas to life across the brand—writing blog content, supporting
 strategy and campaigns, and assisting in the development of digital products like ebooks (from concept to copy).



The ideal candidate is both creative and detail-oriented, with an instinct for strong storytelling and a desire to continuously improve. This is a hands-on role with real ownership and the opportunity to grow alongside a fast-scaling, creator-led brand.



This is a paid opportunity (part-time to full-time, depending on fit). Remote or hybrid.



Bonus: A passion for sourdough, baking, or food content is a plus!



Who You Are: 



1–2+ years of experience in marketing, copywriting,
 marketing, or a related field

A strong writer with a natural feel for voice, tone, and storytelling



Strong understanding of SEO-optimized blog posts in WordPress 



A self-starter with the ability to take initiative and work autonomously



An effective communicator, both written and verbal, across internal and external teams



Organized, detail-oriented, and excited to bring ideas to life



Someone with a roll-up-your-sleeves attitude who thrives jumping into new projects



Bachelor’s degree or equivalent combination of relevant education and experience



Design experience and familiarity with Photoshop and Adobe Illustrator is a plus



Must be based in the U.S.

s into Klaviyo

Highly reliable and meets deadlines consistently

If you have a passion for marketing that will be a big plus as this job has the potential to become a full time member of the team, where you will have the chance to upskill and gain more responsibilities.

title: Backend Developer (Node.js / Firebase) – Part-Time / Full-Time | Remote
description:
We are seeking a Backend Developer to support and enhance our existing applications running in a Node.js and Firebase environment on Google Cloud Platform (GCP). In this role, you will help maintain live systems, introduce new functionality, and ensure the backend infrastructure continues to operate efficiently and securely.



This opportunity is well suited for someone comfortable working with production systems and capable of making sound technical decisions when improving backend architecture.



Key Responsibilities:

- Maintain and enhance backend services supporting live applications

- Develop and improve backend functionality using Node.js and Firebase

- Build and maintain RESTful APIs, cloud functions, and serverless components

- Evaluate system architecture and propose improvements when needed

- Monitor and improve system stability, performance, and security

- Handle deployments and maintain CI/CD pipelines and version control processes

- Work with the outgoing developer to ensure a smooth project transition

- Deliver ongoing updates, feature enhancements, and production support



Required Qualifications;

- 5+ years of backend development experience

- 3+ years of hands-on experience with Node.js and Firebase

- Experience deploying and managing applications on Google Cloud Platform

- Demonstrated experience building and maintaining REST APIs and serverless backend systems

- Experience managing production environments with a focus on performance, security, and reliability (Firebase Auth, IAM roles, HTTPS, JWT)

- Familiarity with Git-based version control systems such as GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket

- Experience implementing and maintaining CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Cloud Build)

- Strong analytical thinking and ability to independently recommend technical improvements

- Clear English communication skills, especially when explaining technical approaches



Preferred Experience:

- Experience working with Firebase Cloud Functions or GCP Cloud Functions in serverless environments

- Familiarity with additional GCP services such as Cloud Run, Pub/Sub, or Cloud Storage

- Experience working with financial or fintech applications involving secure systems and transaction processing

- Familiarity with monitoring and logging tools such as Firebase Analytics or GCP Logging/Monitoring

- Experience implementing secure authentication and authorization methods including OAuth or JWT

- Exposure to Terraform or similar infrastructure-as-code tools

- Experience managing staging and production environments and release processes

- Familiarity with API documentation tools such as Swagger or OpenAPI

- Experience guiding backend direction or mentoring developers during project transitions



Work Schedule:

- Part-Time (Approximately 20 hours per week)

- Full-Time (Available)

Flexible working hours between 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Philippine Time

title: Tech Ops and Automation Manager: $1,500–$2,000 USD PER MONTH
description:
Start rate: $1,500–$2,000 per month (based on experience)

Paid once per month via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.



If you’re someone who wants to take full ownership and build systems that scale, this role is for you!



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours per week (Flexible hours)

- Long-term stability: Not a short-term freelance contract.

- Stable monthly income: On-time payments via Wise

- Supportive environment: No micromanagement, high ownership culture

- Tools provided: We cover the software you need

Your work reduces manual admin work.

Your systems improve onboarding and fulfillment speed.

Your dashboards increase visibility into performance metrics.

Your automations help the company scale cleanly.

You do not just build workflows.

You build infrastructure.

Systems & Automation

- Build and manage advanced Airtable systems (multi-table databases, linked records, dashboards, KPIs)

, Zapier, and n8n

 triggers)

- Automate client onboarding (intake - Slack access - CRM tracking - milestone tracking)

- Improve fulfillment systems with dashboards, alerts, and progress tracking

- Build reporting for activation, retention, churn, revenue, and team performance



Architecture & Optimization

REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)

- Advanced 
 experience

- Experience with Slack automations and integrations

- Experience with Zapier

- Ability to translate business problems into technical solutions

- Proactive mindset and high ownership

STRONG PLUS

- CRM integrations (Close is a plus)

- Experience building KPI dashboards

- Experience supporting onboarding and fulfillment workflows

- Experience in fast-growing online businesses

- Experience with 7–9 figure digital brands



WHY JOIN US?



- $1,500–$2,000 per month based on experience

- Long-term stability

- High ownership role

- Direct impact on company growth

- Clear opportunity to become Head of Systems / Automation Lead

- Work with a fast-moving digital company

- All tools and software covered



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with “TECH OPS” as the message title

2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV

#2: Your years of experience with Airtable

#3: Your years of experience with

Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



We look forward to building scalable systems with you.

title: Shopify Product Listing Specialist (AI & Ecommerce)
description:
We are growing fast and are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Shopify specialist who can create and manage high-quality product pages for an e-commerce brand.



This is a hands-on, execution-focused role. Strong experience with Shopify, AI tools for product listings, and e-commerce/dropshipping workflows is essential.



We work as one team with no unnecessary hierarchy. We value people who take ownership, follow instructions carefully, and consistently deliver clean, accurate work.



Work Schedule



Friday to Tuesday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM

Availability during these hours is required.



Core Responsibilities



Shopify & Product Listings (Primary Focus)



Creating and managing Shopify product pages

Building product pages for e-commerce/dropshipping brands from scratch

Uploading products and organizing collections

Resizing, optimizing, and managing product images

Adding variants and ensuring all product details are accurate

Writing clear, high-converting product descriptions using AI tools

Using AI to improve efficiency, speed, and quality of listings

Keeping listings clean, structured, and optimized

Requirements

Proven experience with Shopify

Experience working with e-commerce or dropshipping stores

Strong experience using AI tools for product listings and descriptions

Strong written English skills

High attention to detail

Ability to follow instructions exactly

Reliable, organized, and consistent

Compensation & Growth



$600 USD per month



This role is focused on Shopify product execution and AI-assisted workflows.

Additional responsibilities and growth opportunities may be offered over time based on performance and reliability.



We are looking for someone who can execute Shopify work accurately, efficiently, and at scale using modern AI tools.



If this sounds like a role you can perform confidently, we encourage you to apply carefully.

Small details matter to us.



(As a small note for attentive applicants: please include the word shopify in your subject line.)

title: Video Editor
description:

US-based entrepreneur, inventor, and radio show host needs a sharp editor and content strategist to help build a dominant Instagram and YouTube presence.

You will:

• Edit short-form clips (Reels, Shorts) from 30+ episodes of existing show footage

• Build a weekly content calendar — minimum 14 posts per week

• Suggest what to post and how to frame it

• Work across a personal brand and a product brand

• Repurpose content independently — raw material is not the problem

You are:

• A strong short-form editor who understands hooks

• A strategic thinker, not just an executor

• Independent, communicates clearly in English, fast turnaround

Include editing samples and any brand accounts you’ve contributed to. Can lead to full time.

title: Full-Time Virtual Admission and Customer Service Officer
description:
About the role



The Admission and Customer Service Officer is specifically responsible for ensuring all aspects of the enrolment process and customer service are managed to an excellent standard. The Enrolment and Customer Service Officer:

1. Assesses and verifies the student's enrolment information, ensuring it is correctly recorded in our systems. 

2. Provides phone and
 support to our clients who need help.

A high level of professionalism, efficiency and timely communication is integral to this role.



Duties include, but are not limited to:



1. Read and assess student enrolment information to ensure all information is correct.

2. Process students' enrolment in Origin Institute student systems,

3. Ensure all enrolment data is correctly recorded,

4. Inform our local staff if anything requires special attention.

5. Answer customer phone calls and process
 inquiries efficiently.



We only consider the candidates who address the following key selection criteria properly in their application:



1. Proficiency in using office processing software such as Microsoft Office 365,

2. Proficiency in using the web browser and cloud CRM software,

3. Fluent in written and spoken English with proven customer service experience in processing email and phone inquiries efficiently and professionally,

4. Have your own computer with a dual-display setup,

5. Fast and stable internet connection,

6. Tertiary qualifications,

7. Be reliable and can work long-term,

8. Be available to work on a full-time basis,

9. Having the availability to work on Saturday will be preferred.



About the Organisation



Origin Institute is a fast-growing Registered Training Organisation specialising in building and construction training in Australia. We provide nationally accredited qualifications and short courses for both domestic and international markets in Australia. We help students to achieve their career goals by providing innovative learning experiences.

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (AI Voice Agent Agency)
description:
About Us:

We are a fast-growing AI agency focused on building next-generation conversational systems, inspired by platforms like Ailuna, an AI-powered engagement platform that uses real-time communication, personalization, and behavioral intelligence to create meaningful human-like interactions.



Our agency helps businesses modernize how they communicate with customers through:

• AI voice agents

• Automated follow-up systems

• Smart lead qualification

• Conversational AI for sales and support



We’re building systems that don’t just automate ,  they connect, engage, and convert.



.......



We’re looking for a hungry, results-driven cold caller / appointment setter to help us generate new business opportunities.



Your main role will be to:

• Call business owners (plumbing, HVAC, electrical, local service businesses)

• Introduce our AI voice agent solutions

• Qualify leads and identify interest

• Book appointments for our sales team



This is not just a dialing job,  we’re looking for someone who understands how to create interest, handle objections, and open real conversations.



........



What You’ll Be Selling



You’ll be offering AI-powered voice and communication systems that help businesses:

• Never miss another call

• Automatically respond to leads 24/7

• Qualify prospects instantly

• Increase bookings and revenue

• Improve customer experience with human-like AI interactions



(Think: AI that talks, books, and follows up — automatically)



.......



Responsibilities:



• Make outbound calls to targeted leads daily

• Follow scripts while adapting naturally in conversation

• Qualify prospects and identify decision-makers

• Book qualified appointments

• Track activity and outcomes (calls, bookings, notes)

• Continuously improve messaging and approach



.......



What We’re Looking For:



• Strong English communication (clear, confident, conversational)

• Experience in cold calling, telemarketing, or sales (preferred)

• Comfortable handling rejection and objections

• Driven, competitive, and results-oriented mindset

• Reliable and consistent work ethic

• Ability to learn quickly and adapt



Bonus if you have:

• Experience selling SaaS, marketing services, or automation tools

• Familiarity with GoHighLevel, CRMs, or AI tools

• Previous appointment setting experience



.......



Compensation:



• Base + performance-based pay (per qualified appointment or deal)

• Bonuses for high performance

• Opportunity for long-term growth within the agency



.......



Why Join Us:



• Work with cutting-edge AI technology

• Be part of a fast-growing agency in a booming industry

• Clear path to higher earnings and leadership roles

• Ongoing training and support

• Long-term opportunity (not just a short-term gig)



How to Apply?



Send a short message including:



A short voice note (30–60 seconds) introducing yourself

Your experience with cold calling / sales

Your availability (hours per week)

Your favorite way to handle objections



Applications without a voice note will not be considered



If you stand out, we’ll move quickly.

title: Jr. Account Executive | Remote | U.S. Mortgage Company
description:
Job Type: Full-Time | Remote

Experience Level: Entry-Level (with or without experience)

Base pay of Php 19,715.00 – Php 28,600.00 + monthly performance-based incentives



We are a growing U.S.-based mortgage company looking for a Jr. Account Executive to join our team. This role is not just administrative. You will be responsible for supporting loan operations while also helping drive business growth through outbound calling, lead generation, and relationship building with broker partners.



This position is ideal for fresh graduates or early-career professionals who are confident communicators, proactive, and comfortable speaking with people, following up consistently, and building long-term professional relationships.



Key Responsibilities



Conduct outbound cold calls to prospective and existing broker partners

Perform lead generation and outreach to grow our broker network

Build and maintain strong relationships with external broker partners

Follow up consistently with brokers to drive submissions and loan volume

Assist brokers and loan processors in collecting, reviewing, and organizing borrower documents

Coordinate with brokers, processors, and internal teams throughout the loan process

Follow up on missing documents, conditions, and outstanding requirements

Upload and manage files in the loan origination system

Ensure all documents are complete, accurate, and properly labeled

Maintain file notes, status updates, and internal records

Communicate updates between underwriting, processing, sales teams, and broker partners

Help keep loan files on track to meet turnaround timelines



Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Business, or related field is a plus but not required

Strong written and verbal English communication skills

Comfortable with cold calling and outbound communication

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

Ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment

Proactive, reliable, and results-driven

Basic knowledge of Google Workspace or Microsoft Office

Willingness to learn U.S. mortgage processes (training will be provided)



Specific Requirements



Reliable high-speed internet connection

Backup internet or data plan (mobile hotspot or secondary ISP)

Quiet and professional work environment

Willingness to work full-time during U.S. business hours (PST), equivalent to 11:30 PM to 8:30 AM Philippine time



Nice to Have



Experience in BPO, sales, lead generation, or customer service

Experience in cold calling or outbound sales

Familiarity with U.S. mortgage terms and loan process

Experience working with brokers or in relationship-based roles



Why join us?



Base pay of Php 19,715 – Php 28,600 with salary progression plus performance-based incentives

Opportunity to grow into a sales or Account Executive role

Paid training and continuous support provided

Supportive and collaborative team environment

Long-term remote role with career growth potential

Exposure to real-world U.S. mortgage operations and business development



How to Apply



Please apply through OnlineJobs.ph and follow the instructions below carefully.



Submit your updated resume in PDF format or as a link (Google Drive, Dropbox, or OLJ profile)

If submitting a link, make sure it is set to “Anyone with the link can view”

Include your relevant experience (Mortgage, Sales, BPO, Admin, or Customer Service)

Include your expected monthly salary in PHP

Include your earliest start date or availability



Please also answer the following questions in your application:



Are you aware that the working schedule is 11:30 PM to 8:30 AM Philippine time, and are you able to work consistently during these hours?

Are you comfortable making outbound calls during this schedule?

Do you have a quiet and dedicated workspace suitable for calls?

What experience do you have with cold calling or outbound sales? Please briefly describe your role and results.



Important



Start your application with this exact line: “I have read the job post from beginning to end.”



Shortlisted Candidates



Will be asked to submit a speedtest (at least 100 MBPS required; screenshot from speedtest.net)

Will provide computer specifications (16 GB RAM and processor)

Will answer short scenario-based questions



Note



Only applicants who follow the instructions above will be prioritized for review



We are looking for reliable and motivated individuals who are serious about building a long-term career in both mortgage operations and business development. If that sounds like you, apply now. We review applications daily.

title: Community Development Representative —  Coron and El Nido
description:
Lani

Lani is an AI guest communication system built for one purpose — to give independent boutique hotels, restaurants, dive shops, surf schools, and activity operators the same tools the big chains take for granted.

She handles guest inquiries on WhatsApp,
, Instagram, and
. She responds to reviews. She captures direct bookings. She follows up with guests before and after their stay. She does all of this instantly, in the business’s own voice, while the owners sleep.



The Role

The right person already belongs to one of these communities — or could walk into it tomorrow and feel completely at home. This is not a traditional sales role. There is no cold calling, no script, and no pressure. Your job is to introduce Lani to independent business owners you already know and trust, demonstrate what she can do for their specific business, and build the kind of relationships that grow over time.

Lani sells herself. Your job is to get her in front of the right people.



What We Are Looking For

Someone with genuine roots in their destination. Experience in hospitality, food and beverage, dive, surf, or tourism is a significant advantage. Comfortable with 
 and
. Warm, curious, and genuinely invested in the success of the people around them.



Compensation

• Guaranteed monthly base salary

• 10% commission on every client signed

• Perpetual residual income that grows as your book of clients grows — and continues as long as they stay with Lani

• First client bonus of $500 paid within 48 hours of client payment clearing

• Travel and connectivity covered



How to Apply

Send a WhatsApp message or
 introducing yourself. Please tell us:

• Which destination you are applying for

• Whether you currently live there — and if not, your connection to that community

• A brief description of your background and how you know that community

• Write your name backwards somewhere in your message



We are not looking for a polished cover letter. We are looking for a real person who genuinely belongs somewhere we want to be.



We are in this community together.

title: Real Estate Cold Calling
description:
We are expanding our off-market acquisitions team and are looking for a high-quality Virtual Assistant to manage all our cold calls to homeowners interested in selling their homes.



Goal of the Role:

- CALL HOMEOWNERS

- GATHER INFORMATION

- IDENTIFY MOTIVATED SELLERS

- MUST HAVE PREVIOUS REAL ESTATE COLD CALLING EXPERIENCE. A FORMAL DISCUSSION WITH OWNER WILL BE REQUIRED TO ASSESS YOUR KNOWLEDGE.



Compensation

- $4–$5/hour depending on experience

- Deal bonus: If a homeowner you sourced converts into a seller and the transaction closes, you receive a bonus

Schedule



Hours/Schedule:

- Minimum 6 hours per day, Monday to Friday

- Must be available during U.S. hours, ET required.

Hours: 10:00 AM – 1:00 PM EST and 4:00 PM – 6:00 PM EST

- Opportunity for additional hours if workload increases



Primary Responsibilities

1. Cold Calling / Outbound Calls (Main Role)

- Make daily outbound calls to homeowners using our dialer

- Follow proven scripts but adapt naturally based on the conversation

- Build rapport and maintain a friendly, confident, trustworthy tone

- Ask strong follow-up questions to understand the seller’s true situation



2. Lead Qualification & Discovery

- Identify motivation, timeline, property condition, price expectations

- Extract as much relevant information as possible

- Tag, categorize, and update leads accurately



3. CRM Management

- Enter detailed notes into the CRM after every conversation

- Update lead status, tags, and follow-up dates

- Maintain clean, organized pipelines at all times



4. Follow-Up Calls

- Conduct scheduled follow-up calls with warm leads

- Nurture leads that need more time

- Maintain a consistent follow-up cadence



5. List Scrubbing & Lead Management

- Scrub lists for duplicates, incomplete data, and incorrect information

- Organize leads and keep databases updated

- Help clean incoming lead lists from skip tracing sources



6. Online and Admin Tasks

- Navigate various real estate websites (county tax sites, Zillow, PropStream, etc.)

- Use Google Sheets confidently

- Update spreadsheets, track leads, and maintain organization



Required Skills & Qualities:

- Communication must be Friendly, warm, and respectful

- Clear English with low or minimal accent

- Strong persuasion skills

- Able to think on your feet and adjust the conversation

- Confident on the phone (not shy, timid, or robotic)



Technical:

- Experience using dialers (Mojo, CallTools, BatchDialer, etc.)

- Strong Google Sheets skills

- CRM experience (REsimpli, Podio, GoHighLevel, etc.)

- Ability to navigate websites efficiently





Sales & Real Estate Knowledge REQUIRED:

- Cold calling experience

- Real estate terminology

- Motivated seller discovery questions

- Objection handling





Personal Qualities:

- Responsible

- Highly dependable

- Detail-oriented

- Understands urgency and deadlines

- Comfortable asking clear follow-up questions

- Comfortable speaking with older homeowners



Performance Expectations

- Make 300–500+ calls/day (depending on dialer)

- Document EVERY call accurately

- Generate a consistent flow of qualified leads

- Maintain professionalism at all times



How to Apply

Please send:

- Your resume

- A short voice recording (link preferred) introducing yourself

- Your relevant experience with cold calling

- Your available schedule in EST if contacted for an interview

title: eCommerce Marketplace Specialist (Amazon & Walmart Seller Central)
description:
We are seeking an experienced eCommerce Marketplace Specialist to manage and support product listings, seller accounts, and marketplace operations across Amazon and Walmart Marketplace.



This role is focused on Seller Central account management, product listings, catalog optimization, and marketplace compliance — NOT warehouse, shipping, or fulfillment operations.



You will be responsible for ensuring our marketplace accounts are properly structured, compliant, and optimized for performance and scalability across multiple channels.



Key Responsibilities:

-Manage and maintain Amazon Seller Central and Walmart Seller Center accounts

-Create, upload, and optimize product listings across marketplaces

-Manage catalog structure including variations (parent/child ASINs and Walmart item setup)

-Monitor and resolve listing issues (suppressed listings, errors, content gaps)

-Maintain marketplace account health and compliance standards

-Support product data accuracy, content updates, and SEO optimization

-Assist with marketplace onboarding for new products and brands

-Troubleshoot listing and account issues across Amazon and Walmart

-Work with internal teams to ensure smooth marketplace operations



Required Experience:

-2+ years experience managing Amazon Seller Central and/or Walmart Marketplace



Strong understanding of:

-Marketplace listing creation and optimization

-Product catalog management

-Marketplace policies and compliance

-Account health metrics and performance standards

-Experience troubleshooting listing issues or account performance problems

-Familiarity with SKU management, ASINs, and Walmart item setup



Preferred Experience:

-Experience working at an eCommerce brand or marketplace agency

-Exposure to both Amazon and Walmart marketplaces at scale

-Experience with listing optimization, SEO, and content structuring

-Understanding of Brand Registry (Amazon) or Walmart brand tools

-Experience managing large catalogs or multi-SKU product lines



Key Skills:

-Strong attention to detail and accuracy in product data

-Problem-solving mindset for resolving listing/account issues

-Ability to manage multiple marketplaces simultaneously

-Clear written communication (English required)

-Highly organized and proactive

-What We’re Looking For:



We are looking for someone who understands how to operate within Amazon and Walmart marketplaces, not just upload products.



The ideal candidate has hands-on experience managing listings, fixing errors, maintaining account health, and ensuring products are properly represented and compliant across channels.



Work Setup:

-Remote position

-Long-term opportunity for the right candidate

title: Chief of Staff & Executive Assistant
description:
WHO WE ARE



OptiME Health (
) is a women's telehealth company on a mission to help women break the cycle of generational weight struggles — for good. We combine GLP-1 therapy, clinical expertise, proprietary fitness protocols, nutrition, and real coaching into one transformative program. We are founder-led, bootstrapped, and scaling with intention.



The founder is a board-certified Nurse Practitioner and Superhost who is simultaneously running a growing telehealth practice, building a brand, and managing a real estate portfolio. This role exists to make all of that not just sustainable — but scalable.



????????????????????????????????



THIS IS NOT A TRADITIONAL EA ROLE



The title is Chief of Staff because the scope, the trust, and the trajectory demand it. You are not here to manage a calendar and take notes. You are here to think, build, execute, and protect the founder's time so she can focus entirely on what only she can do.



There is always an answer. That is the mindset. You will face problems you have never encountered before. You will not wait for someone to solve them for you. You will find the path forward — systematically, logically, and with an eye toward scalable solutions.



????????????????????????????????



YOUR SCOPE — THREE WORLDS, ONE ROLE



WORLD 1 — OPTIMEHEALTH OPERATIONS

? SOP development for the OptiME Method, Sculpt Protocol, patient onboarding, and clinical workflows

? Trademark filing research and execution (USPTO)

? Grant and funding applications — SBIR, women-owned business grants, health tech funding

? Regulatory research — DEA, telehealth laws, state-by-state compliance

? Pharmacy and vendor communications — compounding pharmacies, GLP-1 supply chain

? Platform and investor outreach and follow-up on behalf of the founder

? Clinical research sourcing — find, read, and summarize research papers for founder review

? HIPAA compliance tracking and documentation

? Project management across all active business initiatives

? Build efficient workflows and systems for expansion and scale



WORLD 2 — TECHNOLOGY & SYSTEMS

? Evaluate, implement, and manage operational software and tools

? Build internal tracking systems, dashboards, and workflow automations

? Support groundwork for a proprietary patient portal

? Identify where technology eliminates manual work — and act on it

? Communicate with tech vendors and contractors on the founder's behalf

? Experience in healthcare technology is a significant differentiator



WORLD 3 — AIRBNB CO-HOST (3 PROPERTIES)

? Full guest communications — inquiries, check-in, issue resolution

? Turnover and cleaning crew coordination

? Pricing optimization and calendar management

? Maintenance follow-up and vendor scheduling

? Review monitoring and professional responses

? This founder is a Superhost. That standard does not drop.



????????????????????????????????



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



The qualities we are hiring for — in exact order of importance:



1. PROGRESSIVE & PROACTIVE — You don't wait to be told. You anticipate what is needed, move on it, and bring results back. You see around corners.



2. RELENTLESSLY SOLUTION-FOCUSED — There is always an answer. When you hit a wall, you find a door. You do not bring problems without already working on solutions.



3. SYSTEMATIC & LOGICAL — You think in frameworks. You build processes that scale, not workarounds that have to be rebuilt every quarter.



4. DISCRETIONARY — You will carry sensitive information across clinical, financial, legal, and personal domains. Confidentiality is not a preference — it is a non-negotiable condition of this role.



5. DEDICATED & COMMITTED — This is a long-term position. We are building something significant and we need someone invested in that journey, not just the paycheck.



6. EXCEPTIONAL CUSTOMER SERVICE — Specifically for the Airbnb properties. Guests will interact with you directly. Emotional regulation, professionalism, and calm under pressure are essential. You represent a Superhost. Act like it.



Skills and experience:

? Bachelor's degree in Software Engineering, Information Systems, Healthcare IT, or related field (strong advantage)

? Project management tools — Notion, Asana, ClickUp, or similar

? Strong research skills — find, synthesize, and deliver information cleanly

? Excellent written English — you draft communications that go out under the founder's name

? Healthcare, clinical, or telehealth exposure is a significant plus

? AI tool fluency — you use AI to accelerate your work, not replace your thinking

? Airbnb or short-term rental experience is a plus

? Familiarity with US regulatory, compliance, and grant frameworks is a plus



????????????????????????????????



THE CULTURE



We welcome honest communication. If you see a better way to do something, say so. Bring your perspective, your ideas, and your push-back — that is part of building well.



What we will not work with: someone who resists and refuses to find middle ground. Collaboration requires two people willing to hear each other. If your way is always the only way, this is not the right fit.



This is a role built for someone who wants to grow into something — not just occupy a position. As OptiME scales, this role scales with it.



????????????????????????????????



HOW TO APPLY



Send your application to: 

Subject line: OptiME Chief of Staff — [Your Name]



Your application must include:



Take this personality test and provide RESULT: 





1. A video introduction (2–3 minutes) — tell us who you are, your background, and why this specific role. Be direct. Be yourself. No scripts. Applications without a video will not be reviewed.



2. Your resume — highlight healthcare, operations, research, or tech experience.



3. Answer this one question in writing:

I hand you five tasks - trademark filing research, a pharmacy outreach
, a grant application, a patient follow-up workflow, and an Airbnb guest complaint.  No deadlines.  How do you prioritize and what do you do first?



4. Confirm in writing that you are comfortable with the full scope of this role — OptiME Health operations, executive and personal support, and Airbnb co-hosting responsibilities.



Shortlisted candidates receive the full skills test. An NDA is required before onboarding begins — this is non-negotiable.



We read every application. We respond to every one that shows us you mean it.



OptiME Health |

title: Commission-Based Sales Representative (High-Ticket B2B Services)
description:
Location:



Remote (Philippines Preferred)



 Overview



We are building a global sales team focused on selling **high-value services** into:



* Tax Firms

* Legal Firms

* Consulting Firms

* Small to Mid-Sized Businesses

* Enterprise-Level Organizations



This role is designed for **driven, revenue-focused sales professionals** who want **uncapped earning potential** by closing deals ranging from **$5,000 to $150,000+**.



You will be selling services such as:



* Business Consulting & Advisory

* Tax Strategy & Structuring Services

* Legal Services (corporate, contracts, compliance)

* Digital Marketing & Lead Generation

* Website Development & Automation

* Staffing & Workforce Solutions

* Business Infrastructure Setup (CRM, systems, operations)



---



Compensation



Commission Only (No Base Salary)**

       Commission Range:** 10% – 20% per deal

       Deal Size Range:** $5,000 – $150,000+



Example Earnings:



$10,000 deal ? $1,000 – $2,000 commission

$50,000 deal ? $5,000 – $10,000 commission

$100,000 deal ? $10,000 – $20,000 commission



---



Typical Monthly Earnings Range (Realistic Expectations)



Track 1: Sales Closer (Pure Sales)



Beginner / Ramp Phase:** $1,000 – $3,000/month

Consistent Performer:** $3,000 – $10,000/month

High Performer:** $10,000 – $30,000+/month



Track 2: Sales + Account Manager (Consultative Role)



Beginner / Ramp Phase:** $2,000 – $5,000/month

Consistent Performer:** $5,000 – $15,000/month

High Performer:** $15,000 – $40,000+/month



These ranges depend entirely on performance, consistency, and deal flow. There is **no cap on earnings**.



---



Two Sales Tracks Available



---



Track 1: Sales Closer (Pure Sales Role)



Role Summary:



You are responsible for **closing deals only**. Once the deal is closed, you **hand off to a delivery team**.



Responsibilities:



* Prospect and generate new leads

* Conduct discovery calls with clients

* Present service offerings clearly and confidently

* Close deals efficiently

* Maintain pipeline and follow up with prospects

* Hand off closed deals to delivery team



What Happens After You Close:



You DO NOT manage delivery.



The fulfillment team handles execution of services such as:



* Website builds (3–5 days turnaround)

* CRM setup (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, etc.)

* Marketing campaign launches

* Lead generation systems

* Business automation setup

* Staffing deployment

* Consulting onboarding



---



Track 2: Sales + Account Manager (Consultative Sales Role)



Role Summary:



You close deals **AND stay involved in managing the delivery process**, acting as the main point of contact for the client.



Responsibilities:



* Everything in Track 1 (Sales Closer role), PLUS:

* Oversee project delivery after closing

* Communicate with internal teams (marketing, dev, ops)

* Ensure client satisfaction and retention

* Identify upsell and cross-sell opportunities

* Maintain long-term client relationships



---



Training, Support & Expectations



You will receive **initial training and ongoing guidance** covering:



  * What we sell

  * How to position services

  * Sales process and expectations

  * Messaging and frameworks



We will provide **KPIs (Key Performance Indicators)** to guide your activity, including:



  * Outreach targets

  * Calls per day/week

  * Pipeline expectations

  * Closing benchmarks



This training is designed to give you direction — **you are expected to execute independently and perform at a high level.**



---



Tools & Costs (Important)



* This is a **self-sufficient sales role**

* You are expected to cover your own:



  * Phone / calling tools

  * Internet

  * Outreach tools (if needed)

  * Work setup



The upside is significantly higher than traditional roles, which offsets these costs.



---



Unique Growth Opportunity (Major Advantage)



One of the primary benefits of this role:



If you perform well, you have the opportunity to **build your own sales team or company under us**



This means:



* You can recruit and manage your own salespeople

* Your team can sell our services

* You earn **commissions on your deals AND overrides on your team’s deals**

* We will **work with you to structure and support this business**



This creates a path where you are not just earning as a salesperson — you are building a **scalable income stream and potential business of your own**.



---



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for individuals who:



* Have strong English communication skills

* Are confident speaking with business owners and executives

* Have experience in **B2B sales, consulting sales, or high-ticket services**

* Are highly self-motivated and disciplined

* Are comfortable working in a **commission-only structure**

* Can handle objections and close deals independently

* Understand or are willing to learn:



  * Tax & legal service positioning

  * Business consulting concepts

  * Digital marketing and automation



---



Key Skills Required



* Sales & Closing

* Lead Generation (LinkedIn,
, outreach)

* Communication & Negotiation

* CRM usage (preferred but not required)

* Basic understanding of business services



---



What You’ll Be Selling (Examples)



Fast Delivery Services (3–5 Days)



* Website development (business websites, landing pages)

* CRM setup & automation

* Lead generation systems

* Funnel builds

* Marketing campaigns



Consulting & Advisory Services



* Business growth consulting

* Tax structuring strategies

* Legal structuring & compliance

* Scaling operations



Enterprise & Ongoing Services



* Staffing solutions (full teams or individual roles)

* Ongoing marketing management

* Business infrastructure buildouts

* Strategic partnerships



Why Join



* Unlimited earning potential

* Access to high-ticket offers

* Ability to sell across multiple industries

* Remote flexibility

* Clear path to building your own sales organization

* Opportunity to scale income beyond individual performance



---



Application Instructions



When applying, please include:



1. A short introduction about your sales experience

2. Any experience closing deals over $5,000

3. Whether you prefer:



   * Track 1 (Closer Only)

   * Track 2 (Closer + Account Manager)



4. Your expected monthly income goals



---



Important Notes



* This is a **performance-based role**

* Income is directly tied to your ability to close deals

* You are expected to operate independently and professionally

* We are building a **high-performance team**, not a traditional job structure

title: IT Manager / Field Supervisor
description:
Overview

We are seeking a seasoned IT Manager / Field Supervisor to lead our Managed Service Provider (MSP) operations with a strong focus on cloud infrastructure. This role will oversee helpdesk operations, field dispatch, and project management across a diverse client base. The ideal candidate will bring deep expertise in Azure, Microsoft 365, AWS, and hybrid environments, along with a proven ability to lead teams and deliver exceptional IT support in a fast-paced MSP setting.



Key Responsibilities

Lead and manage the MSP helpdesk, ensuring timely resolution of tickets and high client satisfaction

Coordinate and dispatch field technicians for on-site support and project implementations

Oversee cloud-centric IT projects including migrations, deployments, and infrastructure upgrades

Provide hands-on technical leadership in Azure, Microsoft 365, AWS, and hybrid environments

Mentor and manage a team of IT professionals, fostering collaboration and growth

Monitor SLAs and KPIs, and implement process improvements for operational efficiency

Collaborate with clients to assess needs, propose cloud-first solutions, and maintain strong relationships



Required Qualifications

Minimum of 10 years in IT management, with at least 5 years in an MSP helpdesk environment leading teams

Deep technical proficiency in:

Azure AD, Office 365, Intune, SharePoint, MS Exchange Server

AWS services including EC2, S3, IAM, and VPC configurations

Windows Server (on-prem and cloud-hosted)

Google Workspace and Google Cloud infrastructure

Setup and management of Ubiquiti, Cisco, SonicWall, Synology hardware

Strong project management experience in cloud migrations and IT deployments

Proven ability to manage ticket workflows and dispatch field resources effectively

Excellent leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills

Ability to work under pressure and adapt to evolving client needs



Preferred Qualifications

Certifications such as Microsoft Certified: Azure Administrator, AWS Certified Solutions Architect, Cisco CCNA

Experience with MSP tools like RMM and PSA platforms

Familiarity with cybersecurity best practices and compliance standards (e.g., HIPAA, GDPR)



Why Join Us

Lead a dynamic team in a growing MSP with a cloud-first approach

Competitive salary and benefits package

Access to cutting-edge technologies and ongoing professional development

Collaborative and innovative work culture



How to Apply

Please submit your resume, a cover letter detailing your relevant experience, and a short intro video. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis until the position is filled.



Equal Opportunity Employer

We are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace. All qualified applicants will receive consideration without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, disability, or any other protected status.

title: Billing & Procurement Account Manager
description:
About Edge360 / Staff360

Edge360 / Staff360 is a trusted Managed Service Provider (MSP) and Business Process Outsourcing (BPO) agency. We help businesses streamline operations, optimize technology, and scale efficiently by providing reliable IT solutions and outsourcing support.

We’re growing fast and looking for motivated professionals who want to be part of a team that drives digital transformation.



Position Overview

We’re hiring a Billing & Procurement Account Manager who will play a key role in managing billing, procurement, and financial operations. This role requires someone detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment.

You’ll be the go-to person for ensuring accuracy in billing, smooth procurement processes, and strong vendor relationships—all while supporting our MSP and BPO projects.



Key Responsibilities

Prepare accurate and competitive quotes for client projects in collaboration with sales and technical teams.

Manage procurement: sourcing, ordering, and tracking hardware, software, and other project resources.

Handle billing and invoicing, ensuring compliance with company policies and client agreements.

Maintain project plans, timelines, and budgets to support efficient delivery.

Act as the main contact for accounts payable/receivable, resolving inquiries quickly.

Work with the accounting team on reconciliations, reporting, and audits.

Manage vendor relationships, negotiate contracts, and identify cost-saving opportunities.

Assist with financial forecasting, budgeting, and process improvements.

Support ad-hoc tasks related to billing, procurement, and project management.



Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, Accounting, or related field (or equivalent experience).

At least 3 years of experience in billing, procurement, or financial management—preferably in MSP, BPO, or IT services.

Proficiency in financial software (QuickBooks, SAP, etc.) and project management tools (Microsoft Project, Asana, etc.).

Strong knowledge of procurement processes, vendor management, and invoicing best practices.

Excellent communication skills and the ability to work well with both internal teams and external partners.

High attention to detail, strong analytical skills, and problem-solving ability.

Ability to multitask and prioritize in a deadline-driven environment.

Familiarity with MSP/BPO industry standards is a plus.



What We Offer

Competitive salary with performance-based bonuses

Opportunities for career growth and professional development

Flexible remote work options

A collaborative and supportive team environment

Exposure to cutting-edge projects in a growing industry



How to Apply

If this sounds like the right fit for you, send us your resume and a short intro video highlighting your relevant experience.



We look forward to welcoming the right candidate to our team!

title: Short Form Video Editor (TikTok Shop/UGC)
description:
We're building a video editing agency focused on TikTok Shop Affiliate content. We work with creators and affiliates who need fast, high-quality short form edits that stop the scroll and drive clicks.



We're looking for 1-2 editors to start on a trial basis with the potential for consistent, long-term work as we grow.



What You'll Be Editing:

- TikTok Shop Affiliate videos (product showcases, unboxings, talking, skits, comparisons)

      - Less edit heavy than typical short-form content (think 3-5 minutes per video)

- Short form content; typically 15 to 60 seconds

- Raw footage provided with notes, creator style profile, overlays, inspiration videos, etc.



We're Looking For:

- Proven experience editing short form content for TikTok or Instagram Reels

- Strong understanding of TikTok Shop Affiliate content; typically differs from standard short-form content

- Ability to understand a creator's style and the small nuances of each individual (preference for fonts, music choice, use of subtitles, etc.)

- Proficient in CapCut

- Reliable, must hit deadlines with quick 24 hour turnaround time

- Ability to handle volume (up to 100 videos per day)



What We Offer:

- Consistent volume as we grow, this is not a one-off project

- Direct communication, fast feedback, and a team that respects your time

- Performance bonuses



How to Apply:

- Three examples of short form content that you've edited that YOU think align with TikTok Shop Affiliate style content

- Your availability and typical turnaround time

- Answer this question: What makes TikTok Shop Affiliate content different from regular short-form content?

title: Airbnb & Property Management Rockstar | OwnerRez Expert (PST Shift)
description:
Are you an Airbnb Property Management Rockstar who is fast, efficient, and tech-savvy?



We are an established, San Francisco Bay Area-based property management firm with nearly 8 years of success in the Short-Term Rental (STR/Airbnb/VRBO) and Long-Term Rental (LTR) industry. We have built a reputation for excellence, and we are looking for a seasoned professional to join our stable, high-performing team.



We don’t just need "customer service"—we need an Airbnb & Property Management Expert who understands the mechanics of the industry, moves quickly, and never lets a detail slip through the cracks.



Why Join Us?

Proven Stability: Work for a company with an 8-year track record in Airbnb and LTR management.

High-Speed Environment: We value efficiency. If you are fast and productive, you will thrive here.

Professional Standards: We have clear processes in place—no "startup" guesswork.

100% Remote: Long-term, stable remote work from your home office.



The Requirements (Strict)

Please do not apply if you only have general Call Center/BPO experience. We require specific Airbnb and Property Management expertise.

Direct Experience: Minimum 2+ years managing Short-Term Rentals (Airbnb/VRBO) and Long-Term Rentals.

PMS Mastery: Advanced proficiency in OwnerRez is highly preferred. You should know how to navigate workflows, triggers, and guest communication within the platform.

Operational Speed: Fast-thinking, fast-typing (60+ WPM), and able to handle multiple guest issues simultaneously.



Tech Stack: Knowledge of AI tools (ChatGPT), Time Doctor, and dual-monitor setups.



Your Responsibilities

Airbnb & Guest Management: Manage inquiries, bookings, and high-stakes resolution cases across Airbnb, VRBO, and direct sites.

Property Oversight: Coordinate check-ins/outs, send lease agreements, and monitor security.

Logistics & Maintenance: Schedule cleaning teams and review quality assurance photos.

Listing Optimization: Maintain and optimize Airbnb listings to ensure maximum occupancy and 5-star reviews.



Compensation & Benefits

Base Pay: Starting at $5/hour (Negotiable for extensive experience).

Schedule: Pacific Standard Time (PST) | Includes Weekends

Paid Leave: Accrued leave credits after 1 year.

Bonus: Performance-based bonuses.



How to Apply

To filter for the high-attention-to-detail candidates we need, please follow these steps exactly:



 your Resume to 
 Introduction: Record a brief intro highlighting your specific experience with OwnerRez, Airbnb, and STR/LTR management. (Share via Dropbox/Google Drive link).

Subject Line: Must be: [Property Management Specialist] – (Last Name, First Name)

Bonus: End your
 by telling us who the current Prime Minister of the United Kingdom is.

title: [URGENT] Guest Support Specialist – Direct Hire
description:
The Mission:

Join Luxostays, an established property management company with 8 years of industry expertise in the San Francisco Bay Area. We are not a hiring agency; you will be working directly for our internal team. We are seeking a high-caliber professional who thrives on operational precision, logic-based problem-solving, and the fast-paced nature of short-term rental (STR) management.



Why This Role?

Direct Engagement: Work directly with our leadership team (no middleman or agency).

Stability: Join a company with nearly a decade of success in the SF market.

High-Level Autonomy: We value "High D" personalities who can take command of a situation and drive resolutions without hand-holding.

Systems-Driven: We utilize a sophisticated tech stack (OwnerRez, VRBO, Slack, Time Doctor) for those who appreciate structured, efficient workflows.



The Schedule:

Full-Time (40 hours/week) | PST Timezone.

Rotating shifts including weekends (Business-critical coverage).



Your Core Responsibilities:

Command & Control: Oversee guest reservations, handle complex Airbnb resolutions, and manage security monitoring (CCTV). You are our first line of defense and the final word in guest satisfaction.

Logistics Coordination: Manage the "ripple effect" of turnovers. You will schedule cleaners, verify quality via photo audits, and coordinate specialized vendors (contractors, handymen) directly.

Asset Optimization: Maintain listing integrity across platforms, conduct due diligence research, and execute special administrative projects with 100% accuracy.

What We Require (The High-Standard Filter):

Critical Thinking: You must be able to de-escalate "urgent" maintenance or guest issues using logic and a "High D" approach—firm, fair, and fast.

Technical Proficiency: 2–4+ years in Airbnb/STR Management is mandatory. You must be comfortable with Time Doctor and AI-driven workflows.

The Setup: Reliable high-speed internet, a quiet environment, and a dual-monitor setup for maximum multitasking efficiency.

Education: College Degree required.

Compensation & Growth:

Starting Rate: $5/hour (Negotiable based on proven expertise in property operations).



Tiered Rewards: Skill-based pay increases, healthcare options, and year-end performance bonuses after 1 year of consistent excellence within our company.



How to Apply (Follow Precisely):

Failure to follow these instructions will result in immediate disqualification.

: 

Subject Line: [Guest Support Specialist] – (Last Name, First Name)

Attachments: Updated Resume + A Dropbox/Drive link to a 60-second audio intro explaining your specific experience in property management operations.

Compliance Test: At the end of your
, please answer this: Who is the current Prime Minister of London?

title: Sales & Outreach VA — Review Management Agency (US Clients)
description:
I am building a review management agency that helps local businesses in the United States get more Google reviews and improve their online reputation. I am looking for a driven and reliable sales and outreach virtual assistant who can handle the full client acquisition process from start to finish.



Your job is to find local businesses in the US that need help with their Google reviews, reach out to them using
 templates and scripts I provide, follow up consistently, handle basic questions and objections, and move interested businesses all the way to being ready to sign on as a paying client. I only need to be involved at the very end when a business is ready to begin the process. Everything before that point is your responsibility.



Daily tasks include:

Researching local businesses on Google in assigned categories and locations

Finding business owner contact information including
 addresses

Sending 20 to 30 outreach
s per day using provided templates

Following up with businesses that have not responded after 3 days

Handling replies and moving interested businesses toward a decision

Logging all activity in a shared Google Sheet daily

Sending me a brief daily summary of businesses contacted and responses received

What I am looking for:

Strong written and spoken English

Proven experience in B2B outreach, cold
, lead generation, or appointment setting

Self motivated and able to work independently without constant supervision

Reliable, responsive, and communicative

Experience working with local US businesses is a plus

Familiarity with Google Maps research and finding business contact information is a plus

This starts as a 5 day paid trial at the agreed hourly rate. You will be given clear instructions, templates, and a Google Sheet to track everything. At the end of the trial week I will review your work and if it meets expectations this becomes an ongoing part time role with consistent weekly pay every Friday plus a performance bonus of $25 to $50 for every client that signs on and begins paying.



Please apply with a short description of your experience in sales outreach or lead generation and tell me about a specific example of outreach work you have done before.
