title: Real Estate Cold Calling
description:
Job Title: Full-Time Cold Caller — Real Estate (Vacant Land Specialist)

Location: Remote 

Schedule: Full time (40+ hours/week) — must be available during peak calling hours



About Us:

We’re a high-volume real estate acquisitions team focused exclusively on vacant land. We use Podio CRM, Smrtphone, multi-line dialers, and SmarterContact to scale outreach and close deals. We need a disciplined, results-driven cold caller who thrives on high activity and land-specific conversations.



Key Responsibilities:



Make 500+ outbound dials per day targeting vacant land owners.

Qualify leads, assess seller motivation for land, and book appointments or transfer warm leads to acquisition reps.

Enter and maintain accurate lead records and call notes in Podio CRM.

Use Smrtphone, multi-line dialers, and SmarterContact effectively to maximize connects and conversions.

Follow and refine scripts, handle objections, and adapt messaging for land-specific scenarios.

Hit daily/weekly call, connection, and appointment-setting targets and report metrics consistently.

Coordinate with acquisitions and marketing to improve lists, scripts, and workflows.



Required Qualifications:

Proven cold-calling experience in real estate — VACANT LAND specialty required.

Expert-level proficiency with Podio CRM and SmarterContact.

Comfortable using Smrtphone and multi-line dialers.

Proven ability to consistently make 500+ calls/day.

Strong phone presence, excellent verbal communication, and advanced objection-handling skills.

Fast, accurate data entry and strong attention to detail.

Self-motivated, coachable, reliable, and able to work under high-volume expectations.

title: Welcome to K-POP Universe: Office Admin Role (Entry-Level) for E-Commerce – Join the Beat!
description:
- Recruitment validity period: Until 3 business days from the date of the first recruitment announcement

- A PH VA team of more than 5 people has already been formed, and business collaboration is possible using Tagalog in a comfortable atmosphere.

- Providing educational tutorial videos and operating a mentorship program to help new comers quickly adapt



[About Us]

* Company Introduction (Video):

youtu.be/dO2mWWZANx8



[Join Summitree and Write Your K-POP Legacy Alongside Filipinos]

Summitree envisions leveraging their Filipino employees' intelligence and English fluency to expand globally while sharing their passion for K-POP. They highlight the Philippines' crucial role in their expansion plans, emphasizing collaboration with their Filipino team to make a mark in the K-POP world. Joining Summitree means joining a multicultural team (Korea, Philippines, Mongolia, Others) with a shared goal of making K-POP history.



[Responsibilities]

We are looking for a “Full-Time” Office Admin to handle our business.

You will be doing a variety of tasks, almost all of which we will create tutorials for you.

1. Order fulfillment and shipping label generation

You will be responsible for gathering and processing customer orders accurately and efficiently. This includes coordinating with third-party logistics (3PL) providers for inbound and outbound shipments to ensure smooth operations.

2. Product listing and scheduling

As a distributor of K-POP records and merchandise, you will be involved in registering new products into our system. This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. Additionally, you will be responsible for scheduling release dates and managing timelines using tools like Google Calendar.

3. Customer service support

providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.



[Required qualifications & skillset (must have)]

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Experience in puchasing K-POP Album or knowledge of K-POP related products (album, merchandise)

* Idea of how to promote K-POP albums and gain traffics in our shopping mall in PH online K-POP community for each artists



[Desired qualifications & skillset (nice to have)]

* Experience in handling customer service

* Experience in Photoshop

* Experience in
 Ads or Google Ads

* Knowledge and Experience of Microsoft Excel & Familar with Using Various Formula

* Experience in experience in Amazon Business (Familiar with Interface and function) or other E-commerce Platform



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

Position Classification:

This is an entry-level position. All candidates, regardless of prior experience, will undergo structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.



• Payment Term: Monthly basis

• Probationary Period: 6 months

o Months 0–3: USD 280/month

o Months 4–6: USD 300/month, subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months

o The probation period may be shortened if you demonstrate fast work adaptation and receive an excellent evaluation. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)



• After Probation Evaluation (Regularization): USD 300/month

o Performance & Total Compensation Structure:

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

o Continued employment and salary maintenance are subject to overall performance evaluation.

o If performance does not meet expectations, adjustments may be made in accordance with company standards.

• Additional Compensation:

o Performance-based incentives may be provided based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.



• After Regularization:

o Annual contract renewal is standard

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

o If overall performance—including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations—is considered outstanding, salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)

o Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance sales periods

(Example: major comeback seasons for artists such as BTS or Stray Kids)

3. Birthday Benefit (After 6 Months of Employment)

- Receive one free K-POP album of your favorite artist on your birthday

4. Paid Holidays (Regardless of Employment Status)

- January 1st (New Year’s Day) and Christmas Day are paid holidays

- Applies to both probationary and regular employees

5. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP28,000



[How To Apply for the job]

Just Fill out 10 Simple Questions through Google Form






Interview via google meet will be conducted after first screening and candidates will be notifed to their
s or
 



Thank you



Human Resource Dept.

Summitree

title: Virtual Care Call Center Specialist (RN Preferred)
description:
At Nurse Next Door, we are dedicated to making lives better through Happier Aging. We provide compassionate, high-quality in-home care that empowers clients to live safely and independently in their own homes.



Position: Virtual Care Call Center Specialist



Position Summary:

We are seeking experienced, compassionate healthcare professionals to join our Virtual Care Call Center Team. This role functions as a central hub for our 24/7 call center, supporting clients, families, and caregivers in real-time. The ideal candidate has a clinical background (RN preferred) and thrives in a fast-paced, problem-solving environment. You will play a key role in ensuring continuity of care, triaging concerns, coordinating schedules, and supporting caregivers; all while delivering an exceptional client experience.



Schedule: Varying shifts (24/7 coverage with overlapping schedules)



Key Responsibilities:

Coordinate and adjust caregiver schedules based on client needs, acuity, and preferences

Serve as the first point of contact for incoming calls (clients, families, caregivers)

Triage care concerns and escalate clinical issues appropriately

Respond to urgent staffing needs including call-offs and last-minute changes

Communicate effectively with Nurse Next Door's care team to ensure continuity and quality of care

Document all communications and care-related updates in accordance with HIPAA standards

Participate in rotating call center coverage to ensure 24/7 support



Qualifications:

Registered Nurse (RN) preferred (LPN or strong healthcare experience considered)

Minimum 2-3 years of experience in home care, healthcare coordination, or clinical setting

Strong understanding of medical terminology and patient care needs

Experience in scheduling, staffing, or care coordination

Proficiency in scheduling software and Microsoft Office (Word, Excel)

Excellent communication, critical thinking, and problem-solving skills

Ability to multitask and remain calm in a fast-paced, high-demand environment

Compassionate, patient-focused, and service-driven mindset

HIPAA knowledge and compliance required



Application Requirement:

Please include a brief response to: “What does Happier Aging mean to you?”



Preferred Experience:

Experience in home care or home health operations

Familiarity with care management platforms (AxxessCare, AlayaCare, etc.)

Previous call center or remote coordination experience

Knowledge of state-specific home care regulations (ID/WA a plus)



If you are passionate about delivering exceptional care, thrive in a dynamic environment, and want to be part of a growing, purpose-driven organization; we’d love to hear from you.

title: Turn Telegram Contacts into $5,000/Month: DeFi Protocol Needs BD Now
description:
Job Description:

We’re a DeFi protocol launching game-changing LP bond technology. We need Business Development partners who can introduce us to crypto launchpads, blockchain projects, and DeFi communities.





THE OPPORTUNITY:

Every successful introduction that leads to partnership earns you serious money. One good partnership could net you $5,000-10,000 in your first month.





COMPENSATION:

Monetize your network through three massive income streams: guaranteed ETH salary, instant token unlocks, and recurring commissions. We pay you to open doors you’ve already built, while we handle 100% of the closing.



Guaranteed Base Pay: You will receive $10/hour (capped at 10 hours/week),       for simply activating your network. 50% paid in Ethereum (ETH) for immediate cash and 50% in $GMI tokens, which are subject to an 18-month vesting schedule, building a long-term position in the $GMI mutli-chain ecosystem.



Performance Bonus: Every 5 successful partnership you close triggers an immediate unlock of 20% your vested tokens. This allows you to bypass the 18-month vesting period and access your earnings as soon as you deliver results.

Note: A "successful partnership" is defined by the project signing the LP Bonds integration agreement and going live on our marketplace.



Additional Commission: 

- 25% commission on ALL upgrade fees from your partnerships

- Level 2 upgrades: $40 upgrade fee, you get $10 each

- Level 3 upgrades: $80 upgrade fee, you get $20 each

- Level 4 upgrades: $160 upgrade fee, you get $40 each



-  $500 bonus when your partnerships hit 25 Level 4 bonds

-  $2,000 bonus at 100 Level 4 bonds

-  $5,000 bonus at 300 Level 4 bonds

-  Realistic month 1 earnings: $2,000-5,000

- Total 90-day potential: $20,000+



YOU HAVE:

- Existing connections in crypto (launchpads, DAOs, blockchain projects)

-
/
 relationships with project founders or marketing heads

- Understanding of DeFi/crypto space

- Hunger to earn based on results, not hours





YOU DON’T NEED:

- To close deals (I handle that)

- Any upfront investment

- Previous BD experience (connections matter more)

- Full-time commitment (work your own schedule)





THE ROLE:

Simply introduce me to decision-makers at crypto projects. I close the deals, you collect commissions. Every user from your partnerships who upgrades their bonds puts money in your pocket..

Example: ONE medium-sized launchpad partnership generating 100 L4 bonds = $8,000 for you.



Ready to turn your crypto connections into serious income?



Apply with:

- List 3-5 crypto projects/launchpads you have connections with

- Your
 handle

- Brief description of your crypto involvement



We need partners who see the opportunity and want to run with it. Start earning within days of your first successful introduction!

title: Senior Non-QM Mortgage Underwriter (Remote | Night Shift)
description:
Senior Non-QM Mortgage Underwriter (Remote | Night Shift)

Php 70,000 – Php 188,179/month (based on experience)

Full-Time | Permanent Remote | U.S. Mortgage Company



>Why This Role is Different



We’re not looking for a basic underwriter.



We’re hiring someone who can confidently review and approve complex Non-QM loans — someone who understands risk, moves fast, and knows how to make solid credit decisions.



If you have strong Non-QM experience and want to work directly with a growing U.S.-based mortgage team, this is a long-term opportunity with real impact.



> What You’ll Be Doing



Underwrite Non-QM loans (DSCR, Bank Statement, WVOE, P&L)



Analyze credit, income, assets, and collateral



Review AUS findings and apply conditions or overlays



Issue decisions: Approve, Deny, or Suspend



Work closely with processors and operations to clear conditions



Maintain strong turn times while ensuring compliance



Support junior tea
mbers when needed



> What We’re Looking For



At least 5 years U.S. mortgage underwriting experience



Strong Non-QM experience (DSCR, Bank Statement, etc.)



Experience handling self-employed borrowers and complex files



Solid understanding of U.S. mortgage guidelines (TRID, ATR/QM, etc.)



Able to make independent credit decisions



Detail-oriented and reliable in a remote setup



Plus (but not required):



Experience with Encompass



Korean, Chinese, or Vietnamese language skills



> Work Setup



Remote (Work from Home)



Night Shift: 11:30 PM – 8:30 AM PH Time



Stable, long-term role with a U.S.-based company



> Basic Requirements



At least 16GB RAM



Intel i5 (4th gen or newer) or equivalent



Stable internet (minimum 100 Mbps)



>> How to Apply



Please apply through OnlineJobs.ph and follow the instructions below carefully:



1. Submit Your Application via OLJ



Include the following in your application message:



Updated Resume (PDF or link — Google Drive/Dropbox/OLJ profile)

If submitting a link, make sure it is set to “Anyone with the link can view”



Years of U.S. Mortgage Underwriting Experience



Years of Non-QM Experience (DSCR, Bank Statement, etc.)



Expected Monthly Salary (PHP)



Earliest Start Date / Availability



2. Answer This Question (Required)



In your application message, briefly answer:



What are the three main documents you review when underwriting a DSCR loan?



(Keep your answer short and direct.)



3. Important



To confirm you have read the job post, please include this line at the beginning of your message:



“I have Non-QM underwriting experience.”



4. For Shortlisted Candidates Only



If you are shortlisted, you will be asked to complete a quick follow-up step, which includes:



Internet speed test (screenshot from speedtest.net)



Computer specifications (RAM and processor)



Short Non-QM scenario-based questions



>> Note



Only applicants who follow the instructions above will be prioritized for review.



>> Shortlisted Candidates



Qualified applicants will be invited to complete a short screening step, which may include:



Quick technical questions (Non-QM / DSCR)



Speedtest and computer specs



Brief experience validation



>> Final Note



We’re looking for serious underwriters who know how to assess risk and make confident decisions.



If that’s you, apply now — we review applications daily.

title: Setup Specialist (Applicants must hold a Bachelor degree in Finance, Economics, Business, Accounting)
description:
Setup Specialist (Initial Disclosure Specialist)



Applicants must hold a Bachelor's degree in Finance, Economics, Business, Accounting, or a related field ONLY. Applicants without this degree requirement will not be considered.

We are looking for a highly detail-oriented Setup Specialist to join our mortgage operations team. Your main responsibility is to prepare and review initial mortgage disclosures to ensure accuracy, compliance, and timely delivery to borrowers. This is a great opportunity for someone who wants long-term stability, growth, and a work-from-home setup.



Job Responsibilities



Prepare and review initial mortgage disclosures with strict attention to accuracy and compliance.

Ensure disclosures are delivered on time and in accordance with federal and state regulations.

Job Type: Full-Time | Remote

Salary: ?100,000 – ?160,000 per month (based on experience)



We are a growing U.S.-based company looking for a high-performing AI Automation Engineer / Senior Programmer who can build real automation systems that improve how our business operates.



This is not a junior programming role. We are looking for someone who can solve problems, design systems, and build automation that replaces manual work.



If you know how to connect APIs, build automation workflows, and use AI tools to streamline operations, this role may be a great fit.



This is a long-term remote position for a Philippines-based developer who wants to work directly with a U.S. company.

Design and build AI-powered automation systems

Develop scripts, integrations, and internal tools that eliminate repetitive work

Connect APIs, databases, and automation platforms

title: Executive Assistant to CEO (Remote)
description:
I'm hiring an Executive Assistant. Here's the honest version of what that means.



I'm a CEO building a personal brand company — two revenue lines, a growing team, and a content machine that doesn't stop.

I run two business lines: As You Are Agency, a LinkedIn ghostwriting firm serving executives and founders, and Brick by Brick, a cohort-based personal branding program that runs five times a year at $3,000/seat. There's also a content operation — YouTube and LinkedIn — that drives every lead into both. It moves fast and it doesn't stop.



I'm also still the person who sometimes spends 45 minutes on a Tuesday doing things that have nothing to do with why I started this company. That ends now.



I need an EA who doesn't wait to be told what to do. Someone who sees what needs to happen, makes it happen, and checks it off before I even knew it was on my list. If you've worked with a founder before and loved being the person who holds it all together — this is for you.



What You'll Actually Own



Inbox + Communications

Triage my inbox daily — flag what matters, draft routine responses, keep it moving. Draft first-response templates for common inquiries. Track active partnerships, vendor relationships, and follow-ups.



Calendar + Scheduling

Own my calendar — schedule with intention, protect deep work blocks, no unnecessary meetings. Coordinate logistics around travel, events, and external meetings. Make sure I can actually unplug when I'm out and hit the ground running when I'm back.



Administrative + Operations

Track invoices, contracts, and time-sensitive action items across both business lines. Send a daily morning priority brief — top 3-5 things that need my attention today. Handle the miscellaneous tasks that steal CEO hours: OOO setup, looping people in, chasing signatures, sending links. Build and maintain light tracking systems so nothing falls through the cracks.



You're the Right Person If

? You've supported a founder or operator before and loved being the person in the background who makes everything run

? You move fast and communicate faster — you don't sit on things

? You're organized in a way that feels natural, not performative

? You notice what's about to fall through the cracks before it does

? You don't need hand-holding and don't ask permission for things within your lane

? You use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) as a natural part of how you work — not because you were told to, but because you're always looking for a smarter way to get things done



Bonus: you're experimenting with AI agents and automation — we reward people who bring better ways of doing things.



You're Not the Right Fit If

? You need a detailed playbook to get started on anything

? You treat this as a 9-5 inbox check

? You've never worked in a fast-moving small company and you're not sure you want to

? High expectations make you nervous instead of motivated

? You need regular encouragement to stay consistent and show up



The Details

Remote, async-first

Full-time position

$1,500/month to start, with a structured 90-day review and a clear path to $1,800–2,000 based on performance

Tools we use: Slack, Gmail, Google Workspace, Kit (ConvertKit), Typeform, Notion



How to Apply

Don't just send your resume. Do this instead.

1. The Morning Brief

Based on what you know about this role and this company, write me a sample morning priority message. Pretend it's a Tuesday and you've already reviewed my calendar and inbox. Show me what I'd wake up to if you were my EA.



2. Your "Catch" Story

Tell me about a time you caught something falling through the cracks before it became a problem — what was it, what did you do?



3. Your AI Toolkit

List the AI tools you use regularly and give one specific example of how you've used AI to make your work faster or smarter.



4. Your Resume or LinkedIn

Applications that don't follow this format will not be reviewed. We're looking for people who read carefully, follow through, and can think on their feet — this is your first test.



One more thing before you apply:

We're receiving a high volume of applications. To make sure yours gets seen, record a 2-minute Loom (
 — free to use) and include the link in your application.



In the video:



Introduce yourself briefly — who you are, what you've done, where you are right now

Walk me through the morning brief you wrote — talk me through your thinking

Tell me one thing you'd want me to know about how you work that didn't come through in writing



Keep it to 2 minutes. Concise and clear beats long and thorough every time — that's also a preview of how this role works.



No Loom = application will not be reviewed.

title: Media Buyer (PPC Specialist)
description:
Location: Remote (Work from Home)

Salary: PHP 35,000 – 70,000 per month

Employment Type: Full-time or Part-time

Required Experience: 3-5 years



About Sparkblaze Digital



Sparkblaze Digital is a digital marketing and advertising company that helps businesses grow through data-driven online advertising. Our team focuses on creating and managing paid media campaigns that generate high-quality leads and measurable results for our clients.

We specialize in platforms such as Google Ads and Meta Ads, helping companies reach the right audience at the right time. One of the industries we support is education and consulting services, where we run lead generation campaigns that connect families with premium academic preparation services. We are a fully remote team, and we are looking for motivated Filipino talent who want to grow their career in digital advertising.



Our team works remotely and focuses on performance, accountability, and results. We are now looking for a seasoned Media Buyer (PPC Specialist) who can take ownership of campaigns and drive measurable growth.



What You'll Do



As a Media Buyer (PPC Specialist), you will be responsible for managing, optimizing, and scaling paid advertising campaigns across multiple platforms.



Your responsibilities include:

• Managing and scaling campaigns on Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager

• Developing campaign strategies focused on lead generation and ROI

• Conducting advanced keyword research, audience targeting, and funnel optimization

• Writing and testing high-converting ad copy and creatives

• Monitoring and optimizing performance based on CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS, and conversion rates

• Implementing and troubleshooting tracking using Google Tag Manager

• Identifying scaling opportunities and improving lead quality

• Analyzing data and presenting insights and recommendations

• Collaborating with the team on creatives, landing pages, and campaign strategy



What Are We Looking For?



We are looking for a high-performing PPC specialist who is confident in managing and scaling campaigns.



You should have:

• 3–5 years of proven experience in media buying / PPC

• Strong expertise in Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager

• Google Ads (AdWords) Certification

• Deep understanding of campaign structure, bidding strategies, and optimization

• Strong knowledge of conversion tracking, attribution, and analytics

• Experience optimizing for lead quality, not just volume

• Ability to confidently manage budgets and scale campaigns

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• Ability to work independently and take full ownership of campaigns

• Willing to train juniors who will be part of the team in the future



Who Are We Looking For?



We are looking for an A-player — a results-driven professional who takes pride in delivering performance.



You are someone who:

• Has 3–5 years of hands-on experience and is confident in your skills

• Is a mid to senior-level media buyer

• Thinks strategically and executes with precision

• Is highly accountable and results-oriented

• Can diagnose and solve campaign performance issues independently

• Communicates clearly and works well in a remote team

• Is proactive, detail-oriented, and performance-driven

• Can provide at least 2 reference checks from former managers or clients

• Handled local service campaigns (plumbing, home services, etc.) — experience in this vertical is a strong plus



Why Join Sparkblaze Digital?



• Fully remote work setup

• Flexible (Part-time or Full-time opportunities available)

• Competitive monthly salary aligned with experience

• Opportunity to manage and scale high-impact campaigns

• Work with a performance-driven and fast-growing team

• Continuous learning and growth in digital marketing



If you are a confident, experienced PPC specialist ready to take ownership of campaigns and drive real results.

Apply now and start your career with Sparkblaze Digital.



Application date: 23rd March – 23rd April 2026

title: Data Verification Specialist
description:
Full-time, 40 hours per week, work your own hours.



We're seeking a highly accurate and fast-paced AI Quality Assurance Specialist for a full-time remote role (40 hours per week). This position involves reviewing AI-generated transcriptions of historical handwritten documents and correcting errors. The workflow requires maintaining a target output of verifying 800 names per hour using a streamlined, keyboard-driven interface.



Compensation:

$750 USD (includes $200 performance bonus) - 40 hours per week



About Us:

We are a remote-first technology startup building the largest verified digital archive of Mediterranean genealogical records. By combining proprietary Artificial Intelligence with human verification, we solve the transcription errors that currently plague legacy family history platforms. Our database maps millions of historical births, marriages, and household census records from the 1500s to the 1900s, providing a definitive, 100% curated index for a global diaspora.



Culture:

As a start-up, there's always lots to learn. It's not a top-down culture, we reward performance and focus on what's been achieved, not what's been missed.



The Role:

As a AI Quality Specialist, you provide the final quality control check before records are published to a live database.

1. Core Task: Visually cross-reference scanned images of 18th and 19th-century handwritten documents against text generated by our AI.

2. Correction: Quickly approve accurate matches and manually correct the 5% to 10% of names where the AI hallucinates or misinterprets the handwriting.

3. Speed & Efficiency: Maintain a baseline verification speed of 800 names per hour utilizing custom keyboard shortcuts to eliminate mouse dependency.

4. Linguistic Context: The records feature Mediterranean naming conventions (closely resembling Spanish, Italian, and Latin roots). You must adapt quickly to specific character combinations and cursive handwriting styles.



Requirements

- Demonstrated experience in high-volume data entry, transcription, or quality assurance.

- Exceptional visual attention to detail and the ability to sustain focus over long processing sessions.

- High proficiency in reading cursive handwriting and identifying phonetic spelling patterns.

- Reliable high-speed internet and a workstation optimized for fast, repetitive keyboard input.

- Be able to work the same 4 hour blocks in Week One for training.



Who this role is good for:

- You thrive in "flow state" environments and prefer highly repetitive, singular workflows over constantly shifting daily responsibilities.

- You have a proven background in medical transcription, legal data entry, or similar roles that demand sustained focus and accuracy over a full shift.

- You instinctively use keyboard shortcuts and hotkeys. You view using a computer mouse as a bottleneck to your processing speed.

- You don't get stuck on puzzles. If an 18th-century word is completely illegible, you are comfortable flagging it within 5 seconds and immediately moving to the next record.



BONUS: You have previously worked transcribing historical handwriting, have experience working with Latin or Italian text, or have worked in a role where you transcribed "doctor's handwriting" .



**********

To Apply:



*Please put 'FT' after your name in the form below to be considered for this role*

Please spend 5 minutes filling out this form:

* Capacity Manager

* Freight Capacity Representative

Remote (Philippines-Based Preferred)



---

Full-Time



---



 ???? **Compensation:**



Base Salary:  $400 – $800 USD per month (based on experience and performance)

Commission: 3% – 7% of gross margin (based on loads successfully covered)

Performance Bonuses:  Based on load coverage speed, carrier reliability, and capacity growth



---



 ???? **Role Summary:**



We are building a high-growth logistics operation focused on:



* Freight brokerage (trucking first)

* Expansion into air, ocean, and rail

* Carrier network development

* Owner-operator partnerships

* Regional trucking expansion



We are seeking a **Carrier Sales Representative (Capacity & Owner-Operator Development)** responsible for securing carrier capacity, validating carriers, and building a reliable network of carriers and owner-operators.



This role is critical to ensuring that every load is covered efficiently, while also building the foundation of a scalable trucking network starting in:



* Savannah, Georgia / South Carolina region

* Jacksonville, Florida

* Charleston, South Carolina



---



 ???? **Core Responsibilities:**



 1. Carrier Sourcing & Capacity Building (Primary Responsibility)



* Identify and secure carriers to cover loads provided by the Freight Broker

* Source carriers through:



  * Load boards

  * Direct outreach (calls, messages)

  * Existing relationships

* Build a reliable and scalable carrier network



---



 2. Carrier Negotiation



* Negotiate rates with carriers within broker-approved pricing ranges

* Ensure loads are covered at or below target carrier cost

* Balance cost, service, and reliability



---



 3. Carrier Validation (Critical Responsibility)



* Perform full carrier validation before assigning loads, including:



  * Insurance verification

  * Authority checks

  * Safety records

  * Compliance verification



* Maintain internal records of approved carriers



* Ensure only qualified and reliable carriers are used



???? **Note:** Carrier sourcing and carrier validation are both owned by the Carrier Sales Representative



---



 4. Owner-Operator Development (Primary Strategic Focus)



* Actively recruit and build relationships with owner-operators



* Bring owner-operators into our network to:



  * Cover loads internally

  * Support regional trucking buildout



* Focus on building a **quasi-trucking network** (without initial ownership of trucks)



---



 5. Regional Network Development (Strategic Responsibility)



* Focus on building carrier and owner-operator networks in:



  * Savannah (first priority)

  * Jacksonville (second)

  * Charleston (third)



* Support long-term plan to:



  * Establish trucking operations in each region

  * Transition from brokered capacity to controlled capacity



---



 6. Load Coverage Execution



* Receive loads from Freight Broker

* Secure carriers quickly and efficiently

* Ensure coverage aligns with:



  * Pricing targets

  * Service requirements



---



 7. Owner-Operator Load Support



* Work directly with owner-operators to:



  * Ensure they receive consistent loads

  * Match them with appropriate freight



* Coordinate with:



  * Internal brokerage loads

  * External load opportunities when applicable



---



 8. External Load Sourcing for Capacity (When Applicable)



* Identify opportunities to secure loads for owner-operators outside the internal ecosystem, when:



  * Capacity is underutilized

  * It is operationally beneficial

  * It is legally and contractually permissible



* Work with:



  * External brokers

  * Direct customers



* Coordinate with Dispatch for execution



---



 ???? **Freight Factoring & Payment Flow Awareness:**



* All completed loads are paid through **freight factoring partners**



* Upon load completion:



  * 90%–95% of load value is advanced

  * Remaining 5%–10% is collected later



* Carrier Sales must:



  * Ensure proper documentation for payment

  * Understand that reliable execution directly impacts payment timelines



---



 ???? **What This Role Does NOT Do:**



* Does not set final pricing with shippers

* Does not manage customer relationships (primary ownership)

* Does not dispatch loads

* Does not handle shipment tracking



---



 ???? **Required Experience:**



* 1–3+ years in carrier sales, dispatch, or freight brokerage

* Experience working with carriers or owner-operators

* Strong understanding of trucking operations



---



 ???? **Required Skills:**



* Strong negotiation and communication skills

* Ability to move quickly and cover loads under time pressure

* Strong organizational and multitasking ability

* Understanding of carrier compliance and validation processes

* Relationship-building with carriers and owner-operators



---



 ???? **Preferred Experience:**



* Experience building carrier networks

* Experience working with owner-operators directly

* Experience in high-volume brokerage environments

* Exposure to multimodal logistics (air, ocean, rail)



---



 ???? **First 30 Days Expectations:**



* Begin sourcing and validating carriers immediately

* Build initial carrier network in Savannah-focused lanes

* Successfully cover loads assigned by Freight Broker

* Start identifying and onboarding owner-operators

* Establish baseline carrier relationships



---



 ???? **Reporting Structure:**



* Reports directly to: Freight Broker (Pricing Lead) / Founder

* Works closely with:



  * Dispatch

  * Shipper Sales



---



 ???? **Growth Opportunity:**



* Opportunity to grow into:



  * Senior Carrier Sales

  * Capacity Manager

  * Regional Fleet / Trucking Manager



* Direct involvement in building future trucking operations



---



 ???? **Position Overview:**



This role is a blend of execution and strategic growth. The Carrier Sales Representative is responsible not only for covering loads, but also for building the carrier and owner-operator foundation that will evolve into a scalable trucking operation across multiple regions.

title: eBay Listing Optimisation Specialist for Natural Wellness Brand (Australia)
description:
We are looking for an experienced eBay Specialist to join our growing Australian natural wellness and skincare business.



This role is focused on optimising our eBay store and product listings to improve traffic, conversions, and sales performance.



Our business includes natural skincare, hormone support creams, herbal wellness products, and wellness services, and we are looking for someone who understands how to make eBay listings stand out in a competitive marketplace.



About Us



We are an established Australian wellness and natural health brand with multiple online sales channels, including our own websites and eBay store.



Our focus is on high-quality natural products, beautiful presentation, strong customer trust, and excellent online shopping experiences.



We are now looking for a dedicated eBay expert to help us increase visibility, improve listing performance, and grow sales.



Your Main Responsibilities



You will be responsible for improving our existing eBay store and product listings, including:



Reviewing and optimising all current product listings

Rewriting SEO-friendly titles using strong keyword research

Improving product descriptions to increase conversions

Updating product features, benefits, specifications, and usage instructions

Ensuring correct categories, item specifics, tags, and attributes

Improving product images and image sequence recommendations

Suggesting pricing, bundles, and promotional strategies

Researching competitors and top-performing listings

Identifying underperforming products and recommending improvements

Optimising shipping profiles and return settings where needed

Improving store layout, branding, and customer experience

Monitoring impressions, clicks, and conversion performance

Recommending strategies to increase sales and repeat customers



What We Are Looking For



We are looking for someone who has:



Proven experience managing and optimising eBay product listings

Strong understanding of eBay SEO and search ranking factors

Experience increasing sales through listing optimisation

Excellent written and spoken English (zoo
etings each week)

Strong attention to detail

Experience with product research and competitor analysis

Ability to work independently and provide recommendations

Good communication and responsiveness

Canva and image editing



Bonus if you also have experience with:



Australian eBay marketplace

Wellness, skincare, beauty, or health products

WooCommerce / Shopify / Amazon experience



Hours & Rate



This is a part-time contractor role for 6 hours per week to begin, with potential for increased hours for the right person.



Pay rate: AUD $10 per hour

(AUD $60 per week)



This role includes an initial 4-week probation period, with the opportunity for a pay review and increase based on performance, experience, and measurable improvement in listing sales.



There is strong potential for ongoing long-term work and increased hours as our eBay store continues to grow.



Performance bonuses may also be offered for exceptional results and sales growth.



How to Apply



Please include:



Your experience with eBay optimisation

Examples of stores or listings you have worked on

The word “HIGHVIBE” in your application subject line so we know you have read this carefully

Results you have achieved - graphs - screenshots



We look forward to hearing from you.

Applicants will be required to meet over Zoom.

title: Customer Experience & Sales Specialist
description:
Salon Foundry Co. is a premium Australian supplier of salon and barber furniture, trusted by professionals who value quality, design, and long-term performance.

We are looking for a high-performing Customer Experience & Sales Specialist to support our Australian customer base.

This is not a standard support role. It is a customer experience and sales role where communication, clarity, and professionalism are critical.





About the Role

You will be the primary point of contact for customer enquiries, guiding customers from initial enquiry through to purchase and post-sale support. 

You will be working with Australian customers daily, so clear, confident, and natural English communication is essential — both written and spoken.

You will manage enquiries, sales, and orders using Shopify and internal systems.





What You’ll Be Responsible For:

• Managing customer enquiries via
 and phone 

• Communicating clearly and professionally with Australian customers 

• Providing tailored product recommendations 

• Converting enquiries into sales through consultative conversations 

• Preparing and following up on quotes 

• Managing orders, updates, and customer communication 

• Maintaining accuracy and efficiency within Shopify





Who This Role Is For

This role is suited to someone who:

• Speaks and writes fluent, natural English (neutral, professional tone) 

• Communicates clearly, confidently, and without hesitation 

• Enjoys helping customers make informed purchasing decisions 

• Takes ownership and follows through 

• Is highly organised and detail-oriented 

• Thrives in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment





Minimum Requirements

• Proven experience in customer service, sales, or account management 

• Excellent written and spoken English 

• Confidence speaking with international (Australian) customers 

• Strong organisational and multitasking skills 

• Reliable internet connection and professional remote work setup 





Highly Regarded

• Experience working with Australian, US, or UK customers 

• Experience using Shopify or similar eCommerce platforms 

• Background in eCommerce, retail, or customer-facing roles 

• Demonstrated ability to convert enquiries into sales





Application Requirement (Non-Negotiable)

To be considered, applicants must submit a 2–3 minute video answering:

• Who you are and your relevant experience 

• Why you are interested in this role 

• How you would help a customer d
 between two products 



This video is used to assess your spoken English, communication style, and professionalism.

title: Community Development Representative — Philippines
description:
Lani is an AI guest communication system built for one purpose — to give independent boutique hotels, restaurants, dive shops, surf schools, and activity operators the same tools the big chains take for granted.

She handles guest inquiries on WhatsApp,
, Instagram, and
. She responds to reviews. She captures direct bookings. She follows up with guests before and after their stay. She does all of this instantly, in the business’s own voice, while the owners sleep.

The Role

There is no cold calling, no script, and no pressure. Your job is to introduce Lani to independent business owners you already know and trust, demonstrate what she can do for their specific business, and build the kind of relationships that grow over time.

Lani sells herself. Your job is to get her in front of the right people.



What We Are Looking For

Someone with genuine roots in their destination. Experience in hospitality, food and beverage, dive, surf, or tourism is a significant advantage. Comfortable with 
 and
. Warm, curious, and genuinely invested in the success of the people around them.



Compensation

• Guaranteed monthly base salary

• 10% commission on every client signed

• Perpetual residual income that grows as your book of clients grows — and continues as long as they stay with Lani

• First client bonus of $500 paid within 48 hours of client payment clearing

How to Apply

Send a WhatsApp message or
 introducing yourself. Please tell us:

title: Etsy Store Manager & Growth Specialist (DTF & UV DTF – High Volume Store)
description:
Summary

We are looking for an experienced Etsy Store Manager to take full responsibility for optimizing and growing two established Etsy shops in the DTF and UV DTF transfer niche.



Our main store has over 2,900 active listings, 67,000+ sales, and generated over $380K in annual revenue. We are not looking for a beginner. We need someone who understands Etsy deeply and can both plan and execute growth strategies.



This role requires strong analytical thinking, execution skills, and structured reporting.



Your Responsibilities:



• Optimize existing listings (titles, tags, descriptions, attributes)

• Plan and create SEO strategies for new listings (naming + keyword structure)

• Review and improve listing mockups and thumbnails

• Revise underperforming listings

• Analyze competitors and identify opportunities

• Monitor and optimize Etsy Ads performance

• Provide product research and new listing ideas

• Create seasonal strategies (holidays, trends, niches)

• Manage overall store growth strategy

• Prepare weekly performance reports with clear action plans



Important Workflow:



• You WILL have direct access to revise selected listings

• Updates must be scheduled based on store traffic timing (high-activity hours awareness required)

• You will prepare structured task lists for the team

• Execution of bulk updates will be handled by our internal team

• All work must be documented and trackable



Communication Requirements:



• All communication will be written (clear, simple English required)

• You must provide structured updates (bullet points, no long paragraphs)

• Weekly report is mandatory

• No major changes without approval



Requirements:



• Proven Etsy SEO and listing optimization experience

• Experience managing large stores (1000+ listings preferred)

• Understanding of conversion rate, CTR, and buyer behavior

• Strong knowledge of Etsy Ads

• Experience with tools like Everbee, Alura, EtsyHunt is a plus

• Ability to analyze data and make decisions

• Organized and system-oriented

title: Appointment Setter — High-Ticket Sales (Instagram DMs)
description:
Schedule: EST hours required (Mon–Fri, minimum 9am–6pm EST)

Type: Full-time



Pay: Hourly +  commission



About Us

We're a fast-growing brand in the financial sector, helping clients achieve real results through a premiu
ntorship program. We run a high-volume Instagram presence that generates warm leads daily, and we convert them through DMs. No cold calling. No
 blasts. Our content does the heavy lifting — we need a setter who can close the gap between interest and a booked call.



The Role

You will be the first human touchpoint for every lead that comes through our Instagram DMs. Your job is simple: respond fast, qualify the lead, and book a sales call.

Speed is everything. A lead that waits 30 minutes is a dead lead.

You'll work inside GoHighLevel (GHL) to manage contacts and track your pipeline, and inside Instagram DMs to run conversations. Scripts and SOPs are fully built — you're not starting from scratch.



What You'll Do



Monitor and respond to Instagram DM leads in real time during EST business hours

Follow our proven setter script to qualify prospects and handle early objections

Book qualified leads directly onto the sales calendar

Tag and update contacts in GoHighLevel after every interaction

Escalate hot leads immediately and flag unqualified ones correctly

Start at 5–10 booked calls per week, scaling to 2–3 booked calls per day as volume grows





You Must Have



Proven appointment setting experience in high-ticket offers ($2,000+). Do not apply if you've only done low-ticket or e-commerce.

Experience working in Instagram DMs as a setter

Familiarity with GoHighLevel or a similar CRM (HubSpot, ClickFunnels, etc.)

Excellent written English — conversational, warm, and persuasive

A quiet workspace, reliable internet, and a laptop or desktop

Availability during EST hours — this is non-negotiable

A track record you can prove — we will ask for it





You'll Thrive If You



Treat response time like your close rate depends on it — because it does

Know how to build trust over text without sounding scripted

Can handle objections in the DMs before the call even happens

Are self-managed and don't need to be chased to do your job

Are hungry — the commission is on top of your hourly, not instead of it





Compensation



Hourly rate (discussed upon hire)

$100 bonus for every deal that closes from your booked calls 

High performers will be rewarded as we scale





How to Apply

Send me a message with the following:



How many booked calls did you set last month, and what was the offer price?

Walk us through how you handle a lead who says "I need to think about it"

What CRM have you used and how did you track your pipeline?



Also include: Screenshots of real high-ticket DM conversations you've had as a setter. These can be anonymized — we just want to see how you communicate.

title: ----> Full Time Skilled HR Recruiter × 20+ Competitive Benefits & Perks
description:
We are seeking an HR Recruiter to develop and implement recruitment strategies that align with our objectives. You will play a key role in shaping our workforce by sourcing the best candidates to fill various positions. Your networking expertise will directly influence our team's quality and effectiveness, ensuring that we have the right talent to support our long-term vision.



Job Overview:

The HR Recruiter will be responsible for managing the end-to-end recruitment process, with a specific focus on recruiting experts in digital marketing. This includes SEO Specialists, Web Developers, Content Writers, and other related roles. The ideal candidate will have a proven track record in sourcing and placing high-caliber digital marketing professionals and will be adept at understanding the unique requirements of these roles.



Key Responsibilities:

Develop and execute effective recruitment strategies to attract top talent in digital marketing.

Source and screen candidates for positions including SEO Specialists, Web Developers, Content Writers, and other digital marketing roles.

Conduct interviews and assessments to evaluate candidates' skills, experience, and cultural fit.

Manage the recruitment process from job posting to offer extension, ensuring a smooth and efficient experience for candidates.

Collaborate with hiring managers to understand role requirements and develop job descriptions.

Build and maintain a network of potential candidates for future openings.

Utilize various recruitment platforms, social media, and industry networks to identify and engage with passive candidates.

Stay updated on industry trends and best practices in digital marketing recruitment.



Qualifications:

Proven experience as an HR Recruiter, Talent Acquisition Specialist, or similar role.

Demonstrated expertise in recruiting for digital marketing positions (SEO Specialists, Web Developers, Content Writers, etc.).

Strong understanding of digital marketing principles and the ability to assess candidates' technical skills.

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

Ability to manage multiple recruitment processes simultaneously and meet deadlines.

Proficiency with recruitment software and job boards.

Bachelor's degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field.



Preferred Skills:

Experience working in a fast-paced, high-growth environment.

Familiarity with digital marketing tools and platforms.

Strong networking abilities and connections within the digital marketing industry.

Basic Requirements

Device Specifications: Intel i5 processor or higher with a minimum of 8GB RAM

Equipment: Webcam, speakers, and a microphone or headphones

Internet Speed: Minimum of 100Mbps with a backup connection in case of outages

Work Details

Working Hours: Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 5:30 PM Pacific Standard Time | Tuesday to Saturday, 12 AM to 8:30 AM Manila Time

Location: Anywhere in the Philippines



Why Join Us?

Stable employment

Competitive salary

Bi-monthly salary

A-Z benefits, including bonuses and annual raises

Work-life balance 

Work-from-home opportunity

Virtual Office Setup: We ask tea
mbers to maintain a virtual office via Google Meet with cameras on during work hours. This helps us simulate an in-office environment, encourages collaboration, and ensures everyone is present and engaged throughout the day, even while working remotely.



Note: The company uses a time tracker to ensure productivity and accountability.

Direct Hire

This is a direct hire position — you will be employed and managed directly by our company, not through an agency or third party.



For interested applicants kindly send your CV to 
 or here at 
/apply/

(Note: DO NOT SEND YOUR APPLICATION through our websites or social media platforms. FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THIS INSTRUCTION may result in DISQUALIFICATION)

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
Location - Remote



We are looking for a dedicated and professional Customer Service Representative to join our expanding exterior construction company. This position is perfect for someone who enjoys helping homeowners, managing both inbound and outbound communication, and ensuring a seamless customer experience from the initial inquiry to project completion. This is a long-term, remote role suited for a detail-oriented individual who can work independently while adhering to established procedures.



Key Responsibilities



Professionally handle inbound customer calls and respond to inquiries

Make follow-up calls to homeowners from provided contact lists

Schedule and confirm appointments for inspections and services

title: Senior QA/QC Architect
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED FOR THIS ROLE, YOU MUST SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND VIDEO INTRODUCTION.******



Senior QA/QC Architect 



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM Pacific Time, with a 30-minute break

Salary: $1,200 per month



Job Overview: 

We are seeking a Senior QA/QC Architect based in the Philippines to provide quality assurance and quality control oversight for architectural drawings produced by our drafting team. This role will focus on reviewing drawings, identifying coordination issues, and ensuring that all documentation meets technical and constructability standards before project delivery.

The ideal candidate is a licensed architect with strong experience working in reputable architectural firms on complex projects, with deep expertise in technical detailing, multidisciplinary coordination, and drawing review.



* Key Responsibilities:

Perform QA/QC reviews of architectural drawings produced by the drafting and production teams.

Identify nonconformance issues, coordination conflicts, and detailing errors within project drawings.

Review coordination between Architectural, Structural, and MEP consultant drawings.

Ensure drawings meet constructability requirements and professional architectural standards.

Provide clear feedback and correction notes to the drafting team to improve drawing accuracy and consistency.

Help maintain quality standards across projects and reduce repetitive corrections.

Ensure lessons learned from previous projects are applied to future projects to improve overall drawing quality.

Review and validate technical details and construction documentation before final submission.

Support internal teams by ensuring drawings follow company standards and project documentation requirements.



* Training & Standards

The selected candidate will be trained on the company’s storage system detailing standards and internal documentation processes to ensure alignment with project requirements.



* Qualifications:

Licensed Architect (Philippines) required

Minimum 6+ years of architectural experience in a reputable architectural firm

Experience working on complex architectural projects

Strong expertise in architectural detailing and construction documentation

Strong understanding of coordination between Architectural, Structural, and MEP disciplines

Ability to identify constructability and coordination issues within drawings



* Technical Skills:

Strong experience reviewing drawings in Revit

Working knowledge of AutoCAD

Ability to review and coordinate multi-disciplinary drawing sets



* Additional Requirements

Candidates must be able to provide examples of previous projects they have worked on

Strong attention to detail and problem-solving ability

Excellent ability to review and critique drawing packages for technical accuracy



Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Creative Director (Meta Ads) — Strategy & Scaling Role (NOT a Video Editor Position)
description:
We are looking for a Creative Director / Creative Strategist for Meta Ads to take full ownership of creative performance across multiple Shopify brands.



This is NOT a video editing role.

If you primarily edit videos or execute tasks without owning strategy, this role is not for you.



What You’ll Actually Do



This is a performance-driven, strategic role focused on scaling winning creatives—not producing them yourself.



Develop high-converting ad concepts, hooks, and angles

Analyze ad performance (CTR, CPA, thumb-stop, hold rate, etc.)

Identify winning creatives and scale them

Build and manage creative testing frameworks

Write scripts, briefs, and creative direction

Direct video editors, designers, and UGC creators

Turn data into clear iteration plans

Work closely with media buyers to improve performance



Launch Vector is a fast-growing eCommerce portfolio company managing 50+ Shopify brands across a wide range of niches. We acquire, operate, and scale online businesses—where paid media and creative performance drive growth.



You won’t be working on just one brand—you’ll be helping scale multiple stores across different industries, giving you massive exposure and learning opportunities.



Role Overview



We are looking for a Creative Director who is deeply experienced in Meta Ads and understands how to create high-performing creatives across different niches.



Your role is to identify what’s working, scale it, and continuously produce new winning creatives across multiple Shopify brands.



This is a performance-driven role—your success is measured by how well your creatives convert across different products, audiences, and markets.



Key Responsibilities



Creative Strategy & Direction



Analyze ad performance (ROAS, CTR, CPA, hook rate, etc.) across multiple brands and niches

Identify winning creatives and patterns across different industries

Develop new creative concepts based on data and trends

Create detailed briefs for video editors to produce high-converting ads

Continuously iterate on winners (new hooks, angles, formats, scripts)



Video Editor Management



Provide clear direction and structured briefs to video editors

Review and give actionable feedback on all creative output

Ensure high volume + high quality of ad creatives across multiple brands

Maintain fast turnaround times



UGC Creator Management



Source and manage UGC creators for different brands and niches

Create and refine UGC briefs (scripts, angles, hooks, deliverables)

Ensure creators deliver content aligned with performance goals

Coordinate content flow from creators ? editors ? ad accounts



Scaling Winning Creatives



Take top-performing ads and create multiple variations

Adapt winning concepts across different niches and products

Test new angles, hooks, and formats aggressively

Build a pipeline of consistent creative testing across all stores

What We’re Looking For



Must-Have Experience:



Proven experience managing Meta 
/Instagram) ad creatives

Strong understanding of direct response marketing

Experience working with multiple brands or products simultaneously

Experience managing video editors and UGC creators

Ability to analyze ad performance and make data-driven creative decisions



You Are:



Able to quickly adapt to different niches and audiences

Highly analytical but also creative

Obsessed with performance and results (ROAS-focused mindset)

Fast-moving and execution-driven

Extremely detail-oriented with strong feedback skills

Comfortable managing multiple creative pipelines at once

Nice to Have

Experience in eCommerce / Shopify brands

Familiarity with tools like CapCut, Premiere, After Effects

Experience scaling ads across different niches

Experience managing high-volume creative testing

KPIs (How You’ll Be Measured)

Improvement in ROAS across multiple brands

Volume of winning creatives produced

Speed of iteration and testing

Ability to transfer winning concepts across niches

Efficiency of the creative production pipeline



Please include:



Examples of ad creatives you’ve worked on (with performance metrics if possible)

A short explanation of how you identify and scale winning creatives

Your experience managing multiple brands or niches

Your experience working with video editors and/or UGC creators



Final Note



You will not be working on just one brand.

You will be responsible for scaling creatives across multiple Shopify stores in different niches.



We’re not looking for someone to “make ads look good.”

We’re looking for someone who knows how to make ads make money—at scale.



If that’s you, apply now.

title: GoHighLevel Build + Facebook Ads Setup Specialist — Home Care Marketing Agency (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
We're a fast-growing performance marketing agency (
) serving non-medical home care agencies across the US. We run
 Ads, build funnels, and manage lead nurture systems in GoHighLevel for our clients. We're onboarding 5–10+ new clients per week and need a GHL Build + Ads Specialist who owns the complete technical setup for every new client — from GHL sub-account to live
 campaign.

You are the person who takes a new client from "just signed" to "ads running and leads coming in." Every new client that comes through, you build their 
 account and launch their
 campaign. Speed, accuracy, and consistency matter. You'll follow detailed SOPs and checklists for every build.

This is a hands-on execution role. You follow the playbook, you get it right every time, and you move to the next one. If you love working in GHL and Ads Manager all day and take pride in fast, clean builds — this is your role.

What You'll Do Every Day:

GHL BUILD (per client):



Deploy GHL snapshot to new sub-account

Set custom values: agency name, pricing, service area, calendar URL, location ID, API key

Purchase and configure phone number (LeadConnector)

Submit A2P 10DLC registration and monitor approval status

Customize landing page: swap pricing, logo, calendar URL, branding

Configure calendar: availability, buffer times, booking window, staff assignments

Configure pipeline: verify all stages and triggers are connected

QA every build before handoff to Client Operations Manager



ADS SETUP (per client):



Receive or request Ads Manager access from client (coordinate with Ops Manager if delayed)

Duplicate our proven campaign template into each client's Ad Account

Swap ad copy variables: agency name, city, service area, offer details

Upload creative from our library or client-provided assets

Set geographic targeting for the client's service area

Configure
 Pixel and custom conversion events

Set campaign to correct objective (Leads) and Special Ad Category (Housing)

Set daily budget per client instructions

Launch campaign and verify delivery within 24 hours

Troubleshoot: ad rejected, stuck in review, pixel not firing, payment issues



ONGOING:



Execute bulk sub-account updates when we change offers or processes across all clients

Monitor A2P approval statuses across all accounts

Document new issues or edge cases for the troubleshooting playbook

Coordinate with Client Ops Manager on launch timing and pending items



What You Won't Do:



Run client-facing calls (Ops Manager handles that)

Build or modify GHL workflows from scratch (Albert handles that)

Ongoing ad campaign optimization or creative strategy (handled separately)

Make strategic decisions about funnels, offers, or targeting



Required Skills — GHL:



Hands-on GoHighLevel experience (non-negotiable — you must already know GHL)



Sub-accounts: creating, navigating, switching between locations

Snapshots: deploying and verifying

Custom Values: setting and editing

Calendars: configuring availability, staff, booking settings

Pipelines: stages, opportunities, triggers

Phone Numbers: purchasing via LeadConnector, setting default outbound

Funnel Builder: basic text/image editing within existing pages

Workflows: reading and understanding (not building from scratch)





Experience with A2P 10DLC registration (or willingness to learn fast — we have SOPs)



Required Skills —
 Ads:



 Ads Manager experience (non-negotiable)



Business Manager: switching between ad accounts, managing partner access

Campaign structure: campaigns, ad sets, ads

Audience targeting: location, age, demographics

 Pixel: verification, custom conversions, event tracking

Lead Generation objective with instant forms

Special Ad Categories: Housing category and its targeting limitations

Troubleshooting: rejections, restricted accounts, delivery issues







Required Skills — General:



Detail-oriented — every custom value, every targeting setting, every budget must be right

Fast — a complete build (GHL + Ads) should take 60–90 minutes per client once trained

Reliable internet and quiet workspace

Available during US business hours (Central Time zone preferred, flexible on exact hours)

Strong written English (you'll communicate with the team daily via Slack/chat)

Able to follow SOPs precisely and flag anything that doesn't match the playbook



Nice to Have:



Experience with Twilio

Experience with 
 or Zapier

Basic HTML/CSS for landing page tweaks

Experience with CAPI (Conversions API) setup

Familiarity with Canva or basic image editing

Experience in a marketing agency managing multiple client accounts simultaneously

Experience in home care, healthcare, or senior services marketing



About the Team:

You'll report to the Client Operations Manager. Albert (CTO) handles all workflow logic, AI agents, and system architecture. You handle the builds and launches. The Ops Manager handles client communication and onboarding calls. We work as a tight team and communicate daily.

We're building AI agents that will eventually automate parts of this process — so you'll be working alongside automation, not against it. Your SOPs today become the foundation for what our AI handles tomorrow.

Schedule:

Full-time, Monday–Friday. Must overlap with US business hours (8 AM – 5 PM Central Time). Some flexibility on exact start/end times as long as core hours are covered.

How to Apply:

Please include ALL of the following in your application:



Describe your GoHighLevel experience — how many sub-accounts have you built or managed? What did your build process look like?

Describe your
 Ads Manager experience — how many ad accounts have you set up campaigns in? Have you worked with Special Ad Categories (Housing, Credit, Employment)?

What is the fastest you've gone from receiving a new client's info to having their GHL account built AND ads live?

Do you have experience with A2P 10DLC registration? If yes, describe it briefly.

Include the word "FullStack" at the top of your application so I know you read this entire listing.



Generic applications will be ignored. We are looking for someone who has done both 
 and
 Ads — not someone who wants to learn one of them on the job.

title: Community Development Representative — Cebu City and Bohol
description:
Lani

Lani is an AI guest communication system built for one purpose — to give independent boutique hotels, restaurants, dive shops, surf schools, and activity operators the same tools the big chains take for granted.

She handles guest inquiries on WhatsApp,
, Instagram, and
. She responds to reviews. She captures direct bookings. She follows up with guests before and after their stay. She does all of this instantly, in the business’s own voice, while the owners sleep.



The Role

The right person already belongs to one of these communities — or could walk into it tomorrow and feel completely at home. This is not a traditional sales role. There is no cold calling, no script, and no pressure. Your job is to introduce Lani to independent business owners you already know and trust, demonstrate what she can do for their specific business, and build the kind of relationships that grow over time.

Lani sells herself. Your job is to get her in front of the right people.



What We Are Looking For

Someone with genuine roots in their destination. Experience in hospitality, food and beverage, dive, surf, or tourism is a significant advantage. Comfortable with 
 and
. Warm, curious, and genuinely invested in the success of the people around them.



Compensation

• Guaranteed monthly base salary

• 10% commission on every client signed

• Perpetual residual income that grows as your book of clients grows — and continues as long as they stay with Lani

• First client bonus of $500 paid within 48 hours of client payment clearing

• Travel and connectivity covered



How to Apply

Send a WhatsApp message or
 introducing yourself. Please tell us:

• Which destination you are applying for

• Whether you currently live there — and if not, your connection to that community

• A brief description of your background and how you know that community

• Write your name backwards somewhere in your message



We are not looking for a polished cover letter. We are looking for a real person who genuinely belongs somewhere we want to be.



We are in this community together.

Non-Negotiable Requirements

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Remote — Philippines-Based  •  Full-Time  •  $6.00–$8.00 USD/hr

Position:  Executive Assistant

Employment Type:  Full-Time, Remote

Location:  Philippines (all regions welcome to apply)

Compensation:  $6.00–$8.00 USD per hour

Hours:  Monday–Friday: 9:00 PM – 5:00 AM Philippines Time (8:00 AM – 4:00 PM CST) | Sunday: 10:00 PM – 12:00 AM Philippines Time for weekend lead report submission

Reports To:  Managing Attorney (primary); Integrator (tasking authority)

Start Date:  As soon as possible



We are a fast-growing plaintiff personal injury law firm in Houston, Texas. We fight for the clients insurance companies try to deny, delay, and devalue — and we win. We are looking for a sharp, organized, and proactive Executive Assistant to help keep our firm running at full speed from wherever you are in the Philippines.



About the Firm

Lowe Law: The Insurance Outlaw is a Houston-based personal injury law firm with a high-volume caseload and a clear mission: get maximum results for every client we represent. We are growing rapidly, expanding our team, and building the systems and support structure to match our ambition. This is not a slow, bureaucratic firm. We move fast, hold high standards, and take care of the people who take care of our clients.



About the Role

The Executive Assistant is the administrative and operational engine behind the firm’s daily functions. You will support firm leadership, keep reporting and tracking current, coordinate with vendors, assist with hiring logistics, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks on the non-legal side of the business. This role requires someone who is proactive, not reactive — someone who identifies problems before they become issues and finds solutions without being asked twice.



This is a long-term role with room to grow. We are not looking for someone to fill a seat. We are looking for someone who will own their lane and deliver consistently.



Required Skills & Technology

The ideal candidate will be proficient, if not well-versed, in the following:

• Microsoft Word — proficient; you will draft correspondence, SOPs, offer letters, and firm documents regularly

• Microsoft Excel — proficient; you will own KPI tracking, check ledger maintenance, and weekly reporting — accuracy and attention to detail are non-negotiable

• Microsoft PowerPoint — proficient; you may be called upon to build or format presentations for leadership and firm reporting

• Procedure Writing — demonstrated experience writing clear, organized standard operating procedures (SOPs); you will draft and maintain firm processes and must be able to translate complex workflows into simple, usable documentation

• SharePoint — proficient; you will own the firm’s digital filing standards and documentation organization across all platforms

• CasePeer and LeadDocket — prior experience preferred; genuine willingness and ability to learn required



What You Will Do

• Own meeting agenda preparation and distribution for all fir
etings; content direction comes from leadership

• Own the weekly KPI tracker; compile, update, and distribute to leadership on schedule every week

• Own Jumbotron data entry and maintenance; submit updated numbers to leadership for review before presentation

• Own the yearly check ledger; update entries upon receiving clearance confirmation from the Office Manager

• Prepare weekend lead reports from LeadDocket and intake data

• Maintain and distribute weekly reporting summaries to leadership

• Draft and format the quarterly firm newsletter; submit to Office Manager for content approval

• Manage vendor communications, follow-up correspondence, and meeting scheduling

• Track vendor deliverables and escalate unresolved items to the appropriate leader

• Coordinate interview scheduling and send candidate confirmations after pre-screening is complete

• Own new hire onboarding logistics checklists and track system access and equipment setup to completion

• Draft offer letters from approved templates for Managing Attorney review and signature

• Track all meeting action items and follow up on completion with responsible parties

• Draft external and internal communications on behalf of leadership as directed

• Draft and maintain firm processes and SOPs as directed

• Coordinate firm event scheduling and logistics

• Manage firm supply tracking and coordinate orders through the appropriate tea
mber

• Handle unemployment response correspondence and documentation

• Own digital filing standards across all platforms; maintain consistently organized documentation

• Work fluently across CasePeer, LeadDocket, Hona, SharePoint, and Microsoft 365



What We Are Looking For

• Minimum 2 years of executive assistant or administrative experience supporting a U.S.-based employer — this is required, not preferred

• Experience in a legal, professional services, or high-volume service environment strongly preferred

• Exceptional written English — professional, clear, and concise in every communication

• Proactive by nature — you identify what needs to be done and do it without waiting to be asked

• Strong with data and reporting — you are accurate, organized, and detail-oriented with numbers and tracking

• Proficient in Microsoft 365 and SharePoint; genuinely willing to learn CasePeer and LeadDocket

• Available to work Monday–Friday, 9:00 PM – 5:00 AM Philippines Time (8:00 AM – 4:00 PM CST); Sunday availability required from 10:00 PM – 12:00 AM Philippines Time for weekend lead report submission; Wednesday meetings occur at 1:00 AM and 3:00 AM Philippines Time and attendance is required

• Reliable internet connection and a professional, distraction-free remote work environment

• Self-directed — you can manage your own workload, meet deadlines, and communicate proactively when something needs attention

• Trustworthy and discreet — you will have access to sensitive firm data and leadership communications

Compensation & Benefits

• $6.00–$8.00 USD per hour based on experience

• Full-time hours (approximately 160 hours per month)

• 13th month pay in accordance with Philippine law

• Paid time off

• Long-term position with a growing U.S. firm — stability, consistency, and room to grow



How to Apply

Send a message on this job site or send the following to 
 with the subject line: EA Application — [Your Name]

• A brief introduction (3–5 sentences): who you are, your relevant experience, and why you are the right fit for this role

• Your resume or CV
