title: Remote Appointment Setter (Philippines-Based)
description:
Are you someone who thrives in conversation, hits targets, and wants to get paid for your performance?



We're a fast-growing team looking for a sharp, self-motivated Virtual Assistant based in the Philippines to join us as a Remote Appointment Setter. This isn't a passive inbox management role,  you'll be on the front lines, engaging warm leads, building real conversations, and booking qualified calls for our sales team. If you're coachable, hungry, and take ownership of your results, the earning potential here is serious. 



What You'll Do



* Starting and nurturing conversations with warm prospects across messaging platforms and

* Logging every interaction accurately in our CRM and KPI tracker

* Qualify leads and book appointments directly onto our team's calendar

* Hit daily and weekly booking targets consistently

* Work closely with team leadership to sharpen scripts and improve conversion rates



What We're Looking For



* Near-native written and spoken English (clear, professional, and confident)

* Strong communicator who can build rapport quickly through text

* Detail-oriented and organized with no excuses for dropped leads

* Reliable high-speed internet and a distraction-free workspace

* Available to work during U.S. business hours (EST preferred)



Compensation — Up to $1,750/Month



Base Pay: $250/month (paid $125 bi-weekly)

Commission: $50 per closed deal



Bonuses:

5 closes: $100 bonus

10 closes: $200 bonus

15 closes: $300 bonus

20 closes: $500 bonus



Example Earnings:

5 deals: $600/month total ($250 Base Pay + $250 Commission + $100 Bonus)

10 deals: $950/month total ($250 Base Pay + $500 Commission + $200 Bonus)

15 deals: $1,300/month total ($250 Base Pay + $750 Commission + $300 Bonus)

20 deals: $1,750/month total ($250 Base Pay + $1k Commission + $500 Bonus)



Payment Via: TransferWise or PayPal



Why This Role



* 100% remote work from home and get paid in USD

* Performance-based structure that rewards your effort directly

* A team that actually invests in your growth

* Real long-term opportunity for high performers who want to advance



How to Apply



Send your application with the following:

A short introduction about yourself and your background 

Your relevant work experience

Why you are a great fit for this role



One last thing: to confirm you read this entire posting, include your favorite color somewhere in your application. 



If you're the type who takes initiative, learns fast, and wants to build something real — this is your shot. Apply now!

title: Social Media Content Manager (Pool Player & Creative Partner)
description:
About Me & The Brand

I’m Sensei Nate, a pool player and content creator with a rapidly growing presence, building a community around smart, creative, and engaging pool. I create pool instruction and culture content for serious, engaged players who live and breathe the game.



-



Role Summary

I’m looking for a part-time Social Media Content Manager who is also a real pool player, deeply engaged in pool culture. You’ll help me plan, write, and design posts for
 and Instagram so I can focus on higher-level content and business. 



-



Key Responsibilities



Write captions and post text for
 and Instagram that sound like my brand voice (I’ll provide examples and guidelines). 



Create simple texts posts, and 1x1 image posts (quotes, tips, shot concepts, culture/
s) using tools like Canva, Adobe Creative Cloud, or whatever platform you work fastest in. 



Use AI image tools like Nano Banana and similar models to create and refine visuals when helpful.



Upload and schedule content using Post Planner.



Organize content into a consistent weekly schedule (~10 hours/week). 



-



What I’ll Provide



Clear brand voice documents, examples of past posts, and design guidelines to keep everything consistent and easy. 



Access to Post Planner and approved AI/design tools as needed. 



Ongoing feedback so we can quickly dial in your work and build a smooth, repeatable system. 



Must-Have Qualifications



Strong English writing skills and ability to write concise, engaging social media copy.



Solid pool playing background and active interest in pool culture (you watch matches, follow players, know common terms and situations). Pool culture and knowledge is a delicate universe, and cannot be faked. I will know very quickly if you're not a player.



Experience creating social media graphics with tools like Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, or any other tool you prefer.



Reliable, organized, and able to hit deadlines with minimal supervision.



There will be a screening call for anyone shortlisted for the position to make sure we're aligned and your qualifications match the needs of the role.



Big Plus If You:



Are an active pool player, with deep knowledge and interest in the subject matter.



Have experience with scheduling tools like Post Planner or similar platforms. 



Can suggest content ideas based on what’s trending in the pool world (without needing me to prompt every single post). 



Hours & Compensation



Approximately 10 hours per week, flexible schedule but with agreed weekly deadlines. 



Long-term role if we work well together, with potential to grow responsibilities as a creative partner. 



Please include your desired hourly rate in USD when you apply.



How To Apply

Send a message with:



A short introduction (who you are, where you’re based, your pool background). 



Links or samples of social media posts and graphics you’ve created 
/Instagram preferred).



Your experience with any design tools (Canva, Adobe, AI tools like Nano Banana, etc.).



Your expected hourly rate and weekly availability.



If you’re deep in pool culture, love making content, and want to help build something exciting in the pool world, I’d love to hear from you.

title: US Data Tax Preparer
description:

Who we are:

Our company provides expert tax services, delivered by an experienced team.

We offer personalized, strategic support to help clients confidently pay less in

taxes and maximize their financial potential. Through proactive planning and in-

depth knowledge of tax regulations, we ensure each client receives tailored

guidance to meet their unique needs.

- Label entities, fields, line items, and relationships in tax and financial

documents (e.g., W-2, 1040, K-1, corporate returns, statements, invoices).

Maintain gold-standard datasets for model training and evaluation.

city and state reports and filings

- Enter and analyze previously filed tax returns for optimization or refund

opportunities

is preferable) (this requirement is non-negotiable)

- Proficient in on the Google App platform and MS Office applications (high

level of expertise in excel, google spreadsheets)

- High Level of English communication skills

- Quick learner

Advantages:

- Accounting Software : QBO , Xero etc.

Evaluation Criteria

- Quick to learn new technologies

- Startup Experience

- Thorough, well organized

- Responsible, Independent, Ownership

- Quick learner, with “can-do” approach

- Great communication skills

title: YouTube Gaming Video Editor
description:
To apply, please read everything below and submit a forum. DMs will be ignored



— WHO WE ARE —…



We are a small group of friends looking to make our mark on the YouTube landscape, with our action-packed and humorous gameplay and challenges.



Check out our channel: 



— WHAT WE‘RE LOOKING FOR —



We’re looking for remote, highly experienced Video Editors who aspire to be the best YouTube editors in the world. Period.



If hired, you will spend the majority of your time editing and animating fast-paced, highly engaging YouTube videos (our style could be compared to Game Theory, MortarMarv, or Finzar).



Your day-to-day will also involve analyzing previous videos' Viewer Retention Analytics Graphs to uncover opportunities to improve future edits.



— THE IDEAL CANDIDATE —



Here are the main skills and abilities we’re looking for in our applicants:



VIDEO EDITING (Required): Obviously, you must be an exceptionally talented video editor from a technical perspective. However, you must also have the passion, creativity, and sense of humor to be able to turn bland, average footage into highly engaging videos that tell a compelling and entertaining story.



GRAPHIC & ANIMATIONS (Required): You must be capable of creating high-quality 2d overlay, titling, and keyframing animations that visually illustrate the concepts we discuss in our videos.



— WHAT WE OFFER —



Here are just some of the areas where you’ll have the opportunity to learn and grow at our channel.



STABLE & SECURE: This is a very stable and secure job. Our most senior editors have been working with us full-time for 3+ years. No more wishy-washy freelance gigs.



LEADERSHIP OPPORTUNITIES: If you prove yourself and we continue with our current growth rate, you will likely be presented with senior opportunities down the track.



LEARN FROM THE BEST IN THE WORLD: With us, you get to learn from people who are constantly striving to be the best in the world. We’re supportive and encouraging of one another, but we also hold each other to very high standards.



CREATIVE FREEDOM: Once you’ve mastered our style, we encourage outside-the-box thinking. We’re always open to experimenting with new techniques and styles, and then we analyze the data to see how viewers react.



FLEXIBLE WORK HOURS: You can work whenever you want within reason; however, we expect you to be available for tea
etings (We are based in California, and tea
etings are usually in the late evening PT).



— TO APPLY —



If you're interested, please submit the following form (No need for a CV or cover letter. It’s not the 1900s anymore :D):






Please note: All successful job applications will start with a virtual interview and trial project/s to make sure that we’re the right fit for each other.



Thank you for your consideration, and best of luck on your job search!

title: Amazon online arbitrage / A2A / A2A EU virtual assistant (Minimum 1 year previous experience)
description:
***MINIMUM 1 YEAR EXPERIENCE IS A MUST, DO NOT APPLY IF YOU CANNOT SHOW ME PREVIOUS EXAMPLE LEADS. AS I WILL IGNORE YOUR APPLICATION***



Job Description:



We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Virtual Assistant from the Philippines to join our team on a full-time basis. The ideal candidate will have proven experience in Amazon online arbitrage sourcing for the UK market, a bonus would be having A2A sourcing skills and A2A EU sourcing skills this will make you stand out compared to the other candidates. If you have A2A experience please highlight this in your application as well as when you send over your previous example leads



We are currently in search of 2 full time virtual assistants



Having experience with Keepa product finder is a must as this is the tool we use to find majority of the leads as well as experience with Seller amp as this is what we use to analyse the deals



Responsibilities:

• Source unique, high-profit and medium-profit deals on Amazon UK, focusing on high-ticket niches such as electronics, home & kitchen, toys, Computers and accessories. (Anything with a sell price of above £50 NO MAKEUP) 

• Ensure all leads are exclusive and not shared with other clients.

• Deliver high-quality, consistent sourcing leads in a timely manner.

• Present leads in a well-organized Excel sheet format with all necessary data points (e.g., cost price, Amazon selling price, profit, ROI, ASIN, etc.).

• Using coupons and taking into account student discount etc when sourcing. 

•Source from unique websites and ensure they are legit and not scam websites by checking trustpilot



Requirements:

• Proven experience in Amazon online arbitrage sourcing for the UK market – this is non-negotiable.

• Must be able to provide examples of previous sourcing work.

• Each deal should have a minimum profit of £10 and a minimum ROI of 20%.

•No oversaturated brands/websites such as Ryobi, Milwaukee, notino and etc

• Must be reliable, detail-oriented, and trustworthy – we value loyalty and hard work, and we take care of our tea
mbers who are committed and dedicated.

• Strong communication skills and the ability to follow instructions independently.

• All leads must be exclusive and not reused or recycled across other clients.



If you’ve read this far and would like to apply, please use the word “Ready” in your application title so I know you have read and understood everything, without this title I will ignore your application. You must also apply with your previous work/example of deal sheet. Without this we will not read your application.



Must also be able to find 5-10 high quality leads a day within the specified criteria above. Your previous work/deal sheet should highlight this.



To get a better understanding of what we require I have attached a training proposal below, please ensure you read it thoroughly to understand our expectations 









Thank you I look forward to your applications and viewing your previous results



Salary will be discussed once you apply. Starting is £250 a month with performance based bonuses and base salary increase out our discretion.

Resolve issues such as returns, exchanges, and refunds professionally.

Collaborate with the team to streamline support processes as we expand.

Requirements:



At least 1 year of customer service experience.

Familiarity with Reamaze and eCommerce platforms (e.g., Shopify).

Experience supporting dropshipping stores, especially in fashion or other trending products.

Strong communication skills and a customer-first mindset.

Flexible to start part-time with the opportunity to move into a full-time role as we open new stores.

If you’re proactive, adaptable, and excited about growing with us, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Administrative & Social Media
description:
JOB TITLE



Client Experience + Content Assistant for Luxury Catering Brand



JOB DESCRIPTION



We are a high-end private chef and catering company specializing in elevated, experience-driven events across New York.



We are looking for a proactive, detail-oriented assistant who can manage client communication, support content creation, and help us stay organized and responsive as we grow.



This role is part admin, part marketing, and part client experience. The right person will help us not only stay organized, but also increase bookings through thoughtful communication and follow-up.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Inbox + Client Management (High Priority)

 • Monitor and organize
 inbox daily

 • Respond to client inquiries using brand voice (templates provided, but must sound natural)

 • Flag high-priority leads

 • Follow up with past inquiries that did not book

 • Keep conversations organized and easy to track



Client Outreach + Promotions

 • Reach out to past clients for seasonal events and promotions

 • Assist with simple
 campaigns or announcements

 • Identify opportunities to re-engage clients

 • Support converting inquiries into booked events



Content + Social Media Support

 • Assist with Instagram captions and posting

 • Light video editing (CapCut or similar; basic cuts and text)

 • Organize event photos and videos

 • Maintain a consistent, elevated brand tone



Organization + Admin

 • Track leads and bookings

 • Assist with invoices and follow-ups (Square)

 • Keep systems organized and up to date



IDEAL CANDIDATE

 • Strong written English with a natural, polished tone

 • Comfortable communicating with clients professionally

 • Experience with
 management and customer service

 • Basic Instagram and content editing skills

 • Organized, proactive, and detail-oriented

 • Experience in hospitality, events, or food brands is a plus



HOURS + PAY

 • Part-time to start (10–20 hours per week)

 • Opportunity to grow into a long-term role

 • Compensation based on experience



APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS



To be considered, please include:

 1. A short message introducing yourself

 2. Any experience with
 or client communication

 3. An Instagram account or content you have worked on (if applicable)

 4. Your favorite food or dish

 5. The word “Maldon” at the top of your application



Applications without this will not be reviewed.

title: Entry-level Forex EA Researcher / System Tester (MT4/MT5)
description:
About the Role



ImperiumEQ is looking for an Entry-level Forex EA Researcher / System Tester to support the research, testing, optimization, and monitoring of automated trading systems (Expert Advisors).



This role focuses purely on system validation and performance research, not manual trading. You will work with backtesting data, forward testing environments, VPS setups, and AI-assisted tools to improve the reliability and efficiency of automated strategies.



Key Responsibilities



• Conduct research to support automated forex strategy development

• Perform backtesting and forward testing of Expert Advisors

• Optimize EA parameters based on performance metrics

• Monitor live system performance and document results

• Set up and manage VPS environments for stable EA operation

• Analyze drawdowns, consistency, and overall system efficiency

• Use AI tools and automation platforms to support research workflows

• Maintain organized records of testing results and system updates



Requirements



• Experience working with Expert Advisors (testing / optimization)

• Understanding of forex market behavior and automated systems

• Familiarity with MT4 / MT5 platforms

• Experience with VPS management for automated trading

• Strong analytical and documentation skills

• Ability to work independently in a remote setup



Nice to Have



• Knowledge of MQL4 / MQL5 logic

• Background in algorithmic or systematic trading

• Experience with AI tools or automation integrations

title: Virtual Operations Coordinator
description:
We’re a fast-growing roofing company based in the U.S., and we’re looking for a high-level Virtual Operations Coordinator to help run our day-to-day operations.



This role is not just admin work.



You will be the engine behind our production system — ensuring jobs are prepared, customers are informed, and invoices are sent and collected fast.



If you are highly organized, proactive, and take ownership without being told, this will be a great fit.



What You’ll Be Responsible For:



- Scheduling & Communication

Answer inbound calls and messages

Schedule customer appointments

Send reminders and confirmations

Keep all communication logged and organized



- Job Coordination

Build out jobs in our CRM within 24 hours

Order materials and schedule deliveries

Prepare job details for the field team

Ensure everything is ready before work begins



- Customer Experience

Keep customers updated before, during, and after jobs

Handle questions and resolve issues quickly

Ensure every customer feels taken care of



- Invoicing & Collections

Create and send invoices within 24 hours of job completion

Track payments and follow up on unpaid invoices

Help maintain fast, clean cash flow



- Systems & Organization

Keep CRM (JobNimbus), QuickBooks, and task systems updated daily

Upload job photos and documents

Ensure no task or job falls through the cracks



What We’re Looking For:

- Strong English communication (written + verbal)

- Extremely detail-oriented and organized

- Proactive — you don’t wait to be told what to do

- Comfortable handling multiple tasks at once

- Able to follow systems but also think critically

- Growth mindset — you actively work on improving yourself



Performance Expectations

- No missed or double-booked appointments

- Every job fully prepared before it starts

- No customer goes more than 48 hours without an update

- Invoices sent within 24 hours

- Fast and consistent collections



This is a high-responsibility role. If you like being challenged and taking ownership, you’ll thrive here.



Compensation:

Hourly base (based on experience)

Performance bonuses for:

Accuracy

Speed

Collections

Customer satisfaction



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY)



We only review applications that follow instructions.



Step 1:

Record a 60-second video answering the following questions. Keep your answers direct and specific.

- Tell me one thing you’ve improved in your life in the last 6 months and exactly how you improved it.

- When something goes wrong and it’s your fault, what is your process for handling it?

- What habits or routines do you consistently do outside of work to improve yourself?



Step 2:

 your application to: 



Step 3:

Use this EXACT subject line:

“VOC – I Solve Problems Before They Happen”



Step 4:

Send your
 at exactly:

9:00 AM PST (next business day after applying)



Applications that do not follow these steps will not be reviewed.

title: Short Term Rental Virtual Assistant
description:
**UPDATE** : Your application will not be considered without prior short term rental industry experience. Airbnb support ambassador experience is definitely favored but certainly not required.



Role Summary



This role supports daily operations for a short-term rental management business. It requires organization, precision, accuracy, and strong time management. While there may be occasional slow periods, this is not a “chill” job. The company’s reputation is at stake in every guest interaction, message, and phone call. This position is for someone who can operate autonomously, think critically, and consistently protect the guest experience to earn 5-star reviews.



Availibility

We are looking to have a shift from 4pm to 8pm PST and possibly later. Monday and Friday.

We are also looking for a shift 10am to 7pm PST on Saturday and Sunday



Compensation

Compensation will start at $3 an hour during the probationary period. Upon official acceptance into our company, we will raise you to $3.5 an hour. If performance is spectacular/extarordinary the rate can be raised immediately to $4 an hour. Performance will be assessed again in 6-12 months for an additional raise. We do this to promote a culture of excellence and really compensate for good performance. Our business requires we provide 100% of our efforts to making the guest experience wonderful and our tea
mbers must exemplify that.



Core Responsibilities

1) Guest Messaging + Customer Service (Primary)



Monitor and respond to guest inquiries and active-stay messages with a professional, upbeat tone.



Create real human interactions through the app—guests should feel supported, not automated.



De-escalate issues calmly, set expectations, and drive solutions that protect guest satisfaction and reviews.



Prioritize messages correctly (urgent vs. non-urgent) and escalate only when required by SOP.



2) Maintenance & Issue Resolution (End-to-End Ownership)



You will fully own the maintenance workflow without requiring additional internal staffing or owner attention:



Receive guest maintenance requests and immediately log them in our task software with complete details.



Schedule the correct maintenance vendor/cleaning tea
mber, confirm availability, and confirm appointment time with the guest.



Follow up with maintenance tea
mbers before arrival and ensure they understand requirements.



Require photo documentation before/after (or proof of completion) and ensure the task is closed properly.



Communicate proactively with guests throughout so the process runs autonomously.



Sloppy scheduling, lack of follow-up, and missed coordination will not be tolerated.



3) Phone Calls (Required)



Call guests when appropriate (urgent issues, clarifications, service recovery).



Call maintenance tea
mbers to schedule, confirm, and resolve issues.



Messaging/texting is a large part of the job, but texting-only is not allowed.



4) Message Monitoring Standards (Non-Negotiable)



Messages must be checked every 30 minutes during your shift (set an alarm if needed).



New inquiries should ideally receive a response within 10 minutes.



Ghosting guests for hours is unacceptable.



Required Experience



Prior work experience supporting Airbnb operations.



Supervisor-level experience preferred (or equivalent responsibility managing escalations and team coordination).



Strong ability to multitask across multiple conversations, issues, and timelines.



Required Skills & Traits



Highly organized, detail-oriented, and reliable with time management.



Clear, upbeat, professional communication style (written and verbal).



Critical thinking: ability to filter low-importance messages from high-importance issues and act accordingly.



Autonomous execution: learns quickly, follows SOPs, and handles issues end-to-end without reminders.



Customer-experience mindset: the goal is not just completing tasks—it’s ensuring guests feel cared for and leave 5-star reviews.



Tools / Tech Requirements



Reliable high-speed internet (required).



Comfortable working across Airbnb, task software, and communication tools simultaneously.



Ability to maintain organized notes, task logs, and timelines.



Reliability & Attendance Policy (Strict)



No-shows without legitimate, valid reasons will result in immediate termination.



Reliability is mandatory. This role directly impacts guest experience and business reputation.



Schedule / Coverage



Shift-based coverage (details provided during hiring).



Must maintain the 30-minute message-check standard for the full shift.



How to Apply



Please submit:



A brief summary of your Airbnb support experience (include number of listings supported and responsibilities).



Any supervisor/lead experience (if applicable).



Your availability and time zone.



A short example of how you would respond (tone + action plan) to:



A guest saying Wi-Fi isn’t working, and



A guest requesting urgent plumbing help.

A guest requesting urgent plumbing help.



If you want, I can also add a short paid trial task and a scorecard (response speed, tone, task accuracy, follow-through) to screen candidates.

title: ROCKSTAR ACCOUNTANT
description:
FULL-TIME NIGHT SHIFT | Remote | For High-Performance Professionals Only



Pivotl is seeking an exceptional Remote Accountant to join our specialized team providing advanced accounting services across the United States. This is a FULL-TIME, NIGHT SHIFT position designed for seasoned professionals who thrive under pressure and deliver excellence consistently.



IMPORTANT: This is NOT a side job or flexible arrangement. We need dedicated professionals accustomed to night shift operations who can commit to full-time hours. If you're seeking part-time work or are uncomfortable with night schedules, please do not apply.



What Sets This Role Apart

- 4-day work week, 3 days off - Maximize your work-life balance

- Premium compensation for proven high performers

- Comprehensive benefits: Paid vacation/sick leave, extensive paid training, generous Christmas bonus

- Complete autonomy in a remote environment - perfect for self-directed professionals

- Specialized focus on HOME SERVICE industries (HVAC, Solar, and related sectors)



The Challenge - Are You Ready?



We need a financial data cleanup specialist who can handle:

- Granular-level financial data reconciliation across complex business structures (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, AR, Vendor Recon)

- High-pressure deadline management while maintaining 100?curacy

- Independent problem-solving of complex accounting discrepancies

- Proactive identification and resolution of financial irregularities

- Core Responsibilities for Elite Performers

- Execute comprehensive book-cleanup projects with tight deadlines

- Perform detailed adjusting entries with a deep understanding of tax implications

- Master QuickBooks Online for complex multi-entity structures

- Conduct advanced data analysis using Excel and Google Sheets

- Manage full-cycle AR/AP, invoicing, payroll, and bank reconciliations

- Deliver precise categorization and accounting across diverse business models



Non-Negotiable Requirements

- Proven track record in US accounting with demonstrable results

- Expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Online

- Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills for complex data manipulation

- Exceptional English communication - written and verbal

- Night shift availability - this is not flexible

- Autonomous work style - you must be self-directed and proactive

- Competitive Advantages (Preferred)

- Industry background in HVAC, solar, generators, roofing, foundations, or electrical

- Construction/contracting industry experience highly valued

- Experience using any of the following: Service Titan, Housecall Pro, Sera, Jobber, Service Trade, Acculynx, etc

- Experience using Keeper.app



Who Should Apply

- Rock stars only. We want professionals who:

- Thrive in high-pressure, deadline-driven environments

- Work autonomously without constant supervision

- Have extensive experience cleaning up complex historical financial data

- Take ownership of results and deliver consistent excellence

- Are committed to full-time night shift operations



Who Should NOT Apply

- Those seeking part-time or flexible arrangements

- Professionals are uncomfortable with night shift schedules

- Anyone looking for a "side job" or supplemental income

- Those requiring extensive hand-holding or micromanagement

- Ready to prove you're among the elite?



Apply Here: 
reers/bookkeeping-role

Pivotl - Where exceptional professionals build exceptional careers.

title: Real Estate Operations & Lead Manager
description:
THE ROLE:

This is not a typical admin job.

You will listen to recorded cold calls, score each lead using our 100-point grading system, update our CRM, and route high-priority leads to agents immediately. You will also manage the overall pipeline — tracking lead status, following up on stale leads, and reporting daily to the team.



WHAT YOU WILL DO EVERY DAY:

Listen to recorded cold calls and score each lead 0–100 using our structured grading guide

Update CRM notes for every lead before 5PM — no exceptions

Route all A+ leads (score 70+) to the assigned agent within 1 hour

Manage the full pipeline — track lead status, flag stale opportunities, keep data clean

Submit a daily lead summary and weekly report to the team lead and manager

Identify patterns in lead quality and share insights to improve agent targeting

Grade a minimum of 35 leads per day, 175 per week



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:

We hire on three qualities. If you do not have all three, this is not the right fit.



SMART — You process information quickly and make sound judgment calls. You read between the lines on a call and understand what a lead is really saying.

HUNGRY — You have a reason to win. You are not here to collect a paycheck. You are here to build something and prove what you are capable of.

HUMBLE — You are coachable and team-first. You take pride in making others successful. You do the unsexy work without complaining.



Required skills:



Extremely detail-oriented — you catch things others miss

Organized and consistent — you do not let things fall through the cracks

Strong listening skills — can identify motivation, urgency, and hesitation in a recorded call

Comfortable hitting daily targets without being micromanaged

CRM experience preferred — Follow Up Boss

Real estate knowledge is a plus but not required — we will train the right person



WHAT YOU GET:



Base salary + performance bonuses tied to lead-to-close conversion rate

A front-row seat to how a high-performance real estate team operates

Clear
day growth path — this role can grow into a team operations lead

A culture built on faith, family, and doing things the right way

Monday to Friday 9AM–6PM — no weekends required



THIS IS NOT FOR YOU IF:

You need someone standing over you to stay on track

You treat detail work as beneath you

You are looking for a stepping stone and plan to leave in 2 years

You are not willing to be measured and held accountable to daily numbers



HOW TO APPLY:

reply to this job post: Tell me about a time you had to be extremely detail-oriented and consistent under pressure. What was at stake and what did you do?

title: Senior Talent Acquisition Lead | Systems & Specialized Sourcing (Full Cycle)
description:
Job Description:

We are a US-based boutique staffing firm seeking a Senior Talent Acquisition Lead to own our recruitment lifecycle. We hire specialized remote talent for US small businesses, and we need a lead who prioritizes Talent Intelligence and evidence-based selection over simple resume-matching.



You will be responsible for building high-quality candidate pipelines, optimizing our sourcing systems, and "coaching" talent to ensure they are 100% prepared for client interviews. This is a high-autonomy role for a recruiter who understands the "New York" standard of excellence.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Full-Cycle Fulfillment: Manage the pipeline from initial intake to final placement.



Specialized Sourcing: Use advanced Boolean search, LinkedIn Recruiter, and niche communities to find passive talent for hard-to-fill roles (Admin, Insurance, Healthcare).



Candidate Dossier Creation: Build professional, data-rich candidate files for every finalist. Documentation is key—you will verify tech specs, voice quality, and cultural fit.



Candidate Coaching: Conduct 1-on-1 prep sessions with candidates before they meet our US clients. You will refine their pitch and ensure they communicate with confidence.



Systems Optimization: Audit and refine our Airtable-based recruitment workflow to improve "Time-to-Hire" and "Candidate Experience.



Requirements:



5-8+ Years in TA/Recruitment: Experience in high-volume BPO or RPO environments is preferred.



Technical Proficiency: Expert in LinkedIn Recruiter and experienced with Airtable/ATS systems.



Communication: Exceptional verbal and written English (near-native).



Shift: Hybrid Shift (5:00 PM – 2:00 AM PHT) to allow for candidate interviews and US-morning collaboration.



Full-time, 40 hours per week.



Compensation & Benefits:



$1,200 – $1,500 USD / month (based on experience).



15/30 Payment Schedule: Paid bi-monthly via Wise.



Growth: Opportunity to build and lead a recruitment team as we scale.



HOW TO APPLY:

Please reply with the subject line: [TA Lead Application - (Your Name)] and include the following:



A link to your LinkedIn Profile.



A sample of a Candidate Summary or Dossier you have written in the past (please redact any personal info). I want to see how you analyze and "sell" a candidate's qualifications.



A brief note on the hardest niche role you’ve ever filled and which sourcing channel you used to find them.

title: Virtual Assistant for Auto Detailing Business – Full-Time, Long-Term Role
description:
We’re looking for someone with proven experience in handling inbound sales calls to join our team. If you don’t have this experience, please do not apply.



We’re looking for a reliable, proactive, self-motivated, and self-educated Virtual Assistant to join our growing mobile auto detailing business team. This is a long-term, full-time role for someone who can manage day-to-day operations, handle all client communication, and help us deliver a seamless, professional experience to every customer. You've got to learn many different services and processes day to day, and report/educate the owner.



What You'll Do:

Respond to leads and customers through calls, texts, DMs, and
s

Manage communication from
, Instagram, website, Google Ads, and phone

Use our CRM to organize and follow up with leads, schedule appointments, and track bookings

Post daily to our social media accounts (Meta Business Suite)

Send review requests and follow-ups to clients

Handle basic admin tasks and keep our daily operations running smoothly



What We’re Looking For:

Excellent spoken and written English.

Confident communicator — you’ll be speaking to clients on our behalf

Highly organized and dependable

Self-motivated and able to work independently

Comfortable managing conversations across multiple platforms



Bonus:

Experience with car detailing. Sales experience is a huge bonus



Important:

This role requires managing 20–30 calls per day, along with an even greater volume of messages. You’ll often be working in fast-paced, high-pressure situations where you’ll need to quickly prioritize calls, texts, and estimates over other tasks. Every inquiry should receive an immediate response. While handling conversations, you’ll follow a clear structure: greet the customer, introduce yourself, listen carefully to understand their needs, and then provide the most accurate estimate possible. Our approach is never about pushing the highest-priced service — it’s about identifying the customer’s problem and recommending the best solution, even if that means suggesting a more affordable option.



A salary increase will be discussed after successfully passing the trial period.





Schedule:

You’ll need to be available 8–10 hours per day between 8 AM and 8 PM EST (New York time) at least 2-3 days a week.

Meta Business Suite 
 & Instagram)

 for website leads

title: Sales & Marketing Automation Engineer
description:
Hours: Full-time, 6:00 AM to 3:00 PM Arizona Time (MST), Monday through Friday

Compensation: 60,000 to 90,000 PHP per month based on experience



About Pinnacle Logistics Group



We're a $35M tech-enabled freight brokerage based in Phoenix, AZ moving freight across LTL, FTL, Drayage, Ocean, and cross-border Mexico. We're scaling toward $100M and our sales and marketing team has a massive automation build that we are hiring to get fulfilled.



The Role



You'll be the first developer dedicated to sales and marketing automation at Pinnacle. You'll work closely with the CRO and the sales team to build the systems that power how we find, engage, and close customers. This is a build-from-scratch role where you'll take real business problems and architect the solutions.



What You'll Build 



Your first projects will be the highest-impact automation engines we need right now.



Automated cold
 outreach: Build the full pipeline from lead scraping and enrichment through scored targeting, warmed-up sending domains, and multi-step drip sequences that run without manual intervention.



Automated organic content engine: Systems that streamline content creation, scheduling, distribution, and performance tracking across LinkedIn and other channels.



Automated media buying and ad generation: Workflows that spin up ad creatives, manage campaigns programmatically via platform APIs (Meta, Google), and optimize spend based on performance data.



Automated drip sequences with warmed-up domains:
 infrastructure from the ground up including domain warmup, SPF/DKIM/DMARC, deliverability monitoring, and intelligent nurture sequences.



AI sales training voice: A conversational AI tool that sales reps can practice objection handling with and battle back and forth via chat to sharpen their pitch.



Beyond those core priorities, you'll also build CRM automation and integrations (Close CRM, Airtable, Front), lead enrichment pipelines (Apollo, ZoomInfo, PhantomBuster), LinkedIn and trade show lead amplification, sales rep tooling, and analytics backends.



Required Skills



3+ years of professional experience as a developer, automation engineer, or software engineer. Strong coding ability in Python, JavaScript/Node.js, or TypeScript — you write real code, not just drag-and-drop. Hands-on experience with n8n for workflow automation. Experience building sales or marketing automation workflows from scratch. CRM API integration experience (Close CRM preferred; HubSpot, Salesforce, or Pipedrive also count). Comfortable working with REST APIs, webhooks, and third-party integrations. Experience with Airtable (formulas, automations, API).
 infrastructure knowledge — domain warmup, deliverability, SPF/DKIM/DMARC. Strong English communication skills — you'll be on calls with the team regularly.



Preferred / Bonus Skills



Experience with Claude AI, Claude Code, or building AI-powered automation workflows. Experience with Front 
 platform), GHL (GoHighLevel), or Zapier. Web scraping and data enrichment (PhantomBuster, Apollo, Zoominfo). Cold
 tooling (Instantly, Lemlist, SmartLead). Meta Ads API or Google Ads API integration. React or frontend development for internal tools. Any exposure to logistics, freight, 3PL, or supply chain.



What You Get



60,000 to 90,000 PHP per month based on experience. Unlimited Claude Code Enterprise access — you'll be building with the best AI dev tools available. Direct line to the CRO and founders — you're building the growth engine for the company. Long-term role with growth as we scale toward $100M.



How to Apply



Send a message with:

1. A short video introduction explaining why this role is a good fit for you

2. A link to something you built from scratch (GitHub, live app, case study -- whatever shows your work)

3. A short note on how you'd approach building a TMS if you were starting today

4. Your expected monthly salary

title: 3D CAD DRAFTSMAN PRECAST
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We are Hutt Concrete Products (HCP), a fast-growing New Zealand precast manufacturing company.

We are looking for a highly capable 3D CAD Draftsman (Contractor) to support our design and production work on a project-by-project basis.



THIS IS NOT A FULL-TIME OR A PART-TIME ROLE

> When we have work, we will send it to you.

> You complete the job to a high standard, on time, and get paid.



THIS ROLE SUITS SOMEONE WHO:

> Works independently

> Delivers consistently high-quality output

> Wants flexible, ongoing contract work



RESPONSIBILITIES

Per Project

> Create 3D models and detailed drawings using Tekla Structures

> Produce production-ready shop drawings

> Accurately calculate:

> Concrete volumes

> Reinforcement quantities

> Material take-offs

> Review drawings for errors, clashes, and missing details

> Revise drawings based on feedback (if required)

> Deliver final outputs ready for production

 

HOW WORK WILL BE GIVEN:

You will receive:

> Scope of work

> Reference drawings / markups

> Required outputs

> Deadline



YOU WILL:

> Confirm understanding

> Complete the work

> Submit for review

> Revise if required

 

PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS (IMPORTANT)

We continue sending work to contractors who:

> Deliver accurate drawings with minimal revisions

> Meet deadlines consistently

> Communicate clearly and quickly

> Take ownership (flag issues early, don’t wait to be told)

 

REQUIRED SKILLS:

> Tekla Structures (mandatory — all work must be completed in Tekla)

> You must have your own licensed version of Tekla Structures

> Experience in construction / structural / precast drafting

> Strong understanding of:

> Concrete structures

> Reinforcement detailing

> Material take-offs

> High attention to detail (this is critical)

> Ability to work independently and deliver without constant supervision

 

BONUS SKILLS (Not required, but valuable)

> Precast concrete detailing experience

> Shop drawing production for manufacturing

> Understanding of real-world construction processes



PAYMENT

> Paid per project or hourly (to be agreed per job)

> Typical range: $5–$12 USD/hour equivalent (based on performance and output)

 

OPPORTUNITY

> This is a long-term contractor opportunity, not a one-off job.



IF YOU PERFORM WELL:

> You will receive consistent ongoing work

> You will become a go-to contractor for our projects

 

HOW TO APPLY  (IMPORTANT — Follow ALL Steps)

!! If you do not follow ALL steps, your application will NOT be considered.



Please send:

> A short introduction (3–5 sentences):

> Your experience with Tekla Structures

> Types of projects you’ve worked on

> Your portfolio (must include Tekla-based drawings/models)

>Rate yourself (1–10):

>Tekla modelling

>Drawing accuracy

>Material take-offs

>Attention to detail

>Speed of delivery



ANSWER THESE QUESTION:  What steps do you take to ensure your drawings are accurate and error-free?

> Your hourly rate

> Your internet speed (screenshot)

> Your computer specs



SUBJECT LINE:

Precast CAD Draftsman Application – [Your Name]

title: Marketing Operations VA for Photography Education Brand
description:
I am looking for a full-time Marketing Operations Virtual Assistant for my tutorial-based education business teaching Photography and Adobe software such as Photoshop and Lightroom. This role involves executing important tasks in the "engine" of the business—handling
 marketing, customer support, basic graphic design, and simple website page updates (training available).



The business creates online courses and digital products specifically for photographers. I am looking for a tech-savvy "jack of all trades" who can take my raw content and handle the implementation across our various platforms. You will be expected to work a set schedule to ensure our marketing and support run smoothly. I am looking for someone who can problem solve well, learn quickly, and detail oriented. If you choose to apply, please include the secret word “Rango” at the top of your application message, in step 2 of the application process outlined below. Without this secret word, your application will not be considered.



The Role & Tasks:



-
 Marketing: Organizing and scheduling all marketing
s in Kit. The
s will be written for you; you are responsible for uploading, adding the correct links, and scheduling.



- Customer Support: Managing our support inbox via Gmail. You will develop templates to help students or flag advanced technical issues for me to review.



- Basic Graphic Design: Creating basic graphics for
s and social media using Canva or Adobe Express. I will provide the outlines and text; you will put them together.



- Social Media Admin: Writing descriptions and scheduling posts on YouTube and Instagram.



- Tech Implementation: Executing split tests on our WordPress site (GeneratePress) based on provided change requirements, and updating course materials in Circle.so. (Direct training will be provided for both tasks).



- Lead Magnet Creation for related Youtube content



--



**Requirements:



Schedule: Ability to work 9am – 5pm PST, Monday through Friday.



Communication: Fluent English is a must for customer correspondence and social captions.



Design Eye: Experience creating clean, professional graphics in Canva or Adobe Express from scratch



Reliability: A stable internet connection and a "detail-obsessed" mindset (you catch broken links before they go live).



--



**Required Tool Experience:**



- Kit (formerly ConvertKit)



- WordPress (GeneratePress)



- Canva or Adobe Express



- Circle.so (Bonus)



- Samcart or Thrivecart (Bonus)



- Google Sheets / Google Workspace



--



**Payment + Time Tracking:



$5.50/hr USD (Starting salary with room for growth based on performance).



You will be expected to track your time each week using Toggl. Hours may vary based on projects. After a few months I am open to discussing a flat rate payment if that's preferred. 



Payment will be sent via PayPal or Wise bi-weekly.



--



Job Application Process:



Should you choose to apply, please include the following information:



1. Fill out the following questionnaire with your details and work experience:







2. Message me with a confirmation of your
 and that you've completed the form. Add any other relevant details you'd like to add.

--



**Application Process:



A shortlist of applicants will be created for a live video interview. Those who pass the interview will be invited to perform a small paid "trial task" (such as setting up a mock
 in Kit or creating a specific graphic, its exact details are TBD). Based on the results, one VA will be chosen for the role.



I look forward to hearing from you! Thank you for your time.

title: EXPERIENCED Executive Assistant for E-commerce brand
description:
We’re a fast-growing e-commerce brand looking for a detail-oriented, proactive, and highly organized virtual assistant to support us across customer service and key operational tasks.

Your role with managing our customer support
 inbox but expands into high-leverage responsibilities that impact customer experience, financial operations, and business efficiency.

Key Responsibilities:

-
 Customer Service & Inbox Management

- Responding to customer
 inquiries with clarity, empathy, and accuracy

- Tracking and flagging escalations, common issues, and feedback

- Financial Admin & Cashflow Management

Updating and maintaining weekly/monthly cashflow forecasts

- Tracking incoming revenue vs. outgoing expenses across tools, platforms, and suppliers

- Reporting upcoming payments, and budgeting recommendations

- Creating simple spreadsheets for visibility on margins, breakeven points, and performance

- Coordinating between freelancers or suppliers for follow-ups and updates

- Booking calls or handling scheduling across time zones

- Creating SOPs and improving internal systems for clarity and speed

You’re a Great Fit If You:

- Have prior experience in e-commerce customer service or operations. Or have prior experience being an assistant in another company.

- Are comfortable using tools like Gmail, Shopify, Google Sheets, Slack, ClickUp, etc.

- Love making clear reports and organizing data

- Understand the importance of customer feedback and satisfaction

- Are financially literate and can maintain clean spreadsheets and forecasts

- Communicate clearly, ask smart questions, and take ownership without micromanagement

- Can work 25-40 hours/week reliably,





What You’ll Get:

- A long-term, stable part-time role with room for growth and expand into a full-time role

- 100% remote – work from anywhere

- Autonomy and trust – we value smart thinkers who get things done and can solve problems on their own

- Real impact – your work will shape and be the foundations for how we scale and serve customers

- Opportunities to grow into a bigger role as we expand

- Bonuses and Rewards for great performance

title: Law Firm Receptionist (PT to FT): Growth Opportunity!
description:
Summary

We are seeking a highly motivated receptionist to assist with client calls and intake during evenings and weekends. This role involves gathering initial information from clients, answering basic legal inquiries, and ensuring a smooth onboarding process. The ideal candidate will have strong communication skills, attention to detail, and a background in legal services. If you are passionate about helping others and can work flexible hours, we would love to hear from you!



About the Firm

We are a premier Texas-based criminal defense, personal injury, and family law firm with offices across the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex and Houston. We are known for aggressive advocacy, exceptional client service, and a team that takes pride in doing things right. Our clients reach out during some of the most difficult 
nts of their lives — and first impressions matter enormously.



About the Role

We are looking for a sharp, professional, receptionist to serve as a frontline representative of our firm during evening and weekend hours. This is a remote, part-time position (approximately 24 hours per week) with the potential to grow into a full-time role for the right person. Beyond that a highly talented individual will have the opportunity to grow into an intake role in a year.



You will be the first voice many clients hear. You need to sound polished, warm, and — critically — like someone who belongs on a Texas phone call. Native-level English fluency with a neutral accent is required. 



This is a position of trust. You will be handling sensitive legal matters across three practice areas and will need to learn our firm, our attorneys, and our intake process thoroughly.

Schedule



Monday through Friday: 5:00 PM – 8:00 PM CST

Saturday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST

Approximately 24 hours per week



NOTE: the hours are non-negotiable. You must work these hours, and you are prohibited from other employment during these hours.



What You'll Do



Answer inbound calls from prospective and existing clients across criminal defense, personal injury, and family law



Assess urgency and route calls, messages, and leads appropriately based on the nature of the matter



Transfer hot leads immediately to the appropriate intake specialist or attorney



Log all calls and relevant information accurately in our case management system



Use Slack to notify the appropriate tea
mbers in real time



Represent the firm professionally in every interaction — your communication sets the tone for the client relationship



Develop working knowledge of our attorneys, practice areas, and intake protocols





Prior experience in legal intake, customer service, or a call center environment strongly preferred

Excellent verbal communication — you must be able to build rapport quickly and handle emotional or urgent callers with calm professionalism



Reliable, detail-oriented, and trustworthy — you will be handling confidential information daily

Comfortable with technology: Nextiva (VOIP), Slack, Zoom, and case management software (training provided)



Self-motivated and able to work independently during evening and weekend hours



Technical Requirements



High-speed internet connection (required — non-negotiable)

Personal computer capable of running Nextiva, Slack, and Zoom simultaneously

Quiet, professional workspace for taking calls



Compensation

$8.00–$9.00 USD per hour, depending on experience. This is a contractor position.



Growth Potential

This role has a clear path to full-time for the right candidate. We invest in people who invest in us.



To apply, you must include a video of yourself that is not generic and discusses specifically why you are interested in working with us.



VIDEO TIPS

1. Some of you are submitting interest with a video. You will not be considered. 

2. The video is the most important first step. First, I am judging your appearance. Do you look and sound like someone who can impress clients? Second, I am judging the quality of your set up. If your video lags, if you use the same video for this application as you use for other applications, you have technology issues, etc., those are all things I am taking into consideration. Third, do not blur your background. I am looking for someone who has the space, and quiet environment ncessary to take calls. That does not mean I am looking for a fancy set up. It does mean that if you have a loud background or lack a dedicated space to work, it will infringe on your ability to do the job well.

title: Content Creator Recruiter VA
description:
About Us:

Spicy Cubes is a fast-growing e-commerce brand dedicated to bringing our customers a unique and exciting product experience. Our peach-flavored gummy cubes are designed to be powerful aphrodisiacs. We pride ourselves on using natural, plant-based ingredients and providing top-notch customer service. As part of our expansion, we’re building a team of social media content creators to promote our brand and connect with audiences in an authentic way.



Position Overview:

We are seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Content Creator Outreach Recruiter to join our team. In this role, you will focus on identifying, researching, and reaching out to potential content creators across various social media platforms. You will be responsible for initiating contact, introducing them to our brand, and guiding them to our recruitment process, where our team will handle the onboarding and collaboration.



This is a full-time position ideal for someone who loves social media, understands influencer marketing, and thrives on outreach and relationship-building.



Key Responsibilities:



Research and identify content creators on platforms such as TikTok, Instagram, X, and others who align with our brand values and audience.

Use outreach tools and strategies to connect with potential creators and introduce them to our brand.

Craft personalized and engaging messages to content creators that spark interest and encourage participation in our recruitment process.

Maintain an organized database of all outreach efforts, tracking responses, follow-ups, and recruitment status.

Collaborate with the internal team to refine the recruitment strategy based on performance and feedback.

Stay up-to-date on trends in social media and influencer marketing to identify new opportunities for creator outreach.

Communicate effectively with the team about progress, challenges, and opportunities.



Qualifications:

Experience: At least 2 years of experience in influencer marketing, talent scouting, recruitment, or a related field.

Social Media Savvy: Deep understanding of social media platforms, trends, and the content creator landscape.

Communication Skills: Excellent written communication skills, with the ability to craft compelling messages and build relationships with creators.

Organizational Skills: Highly organized, detail-oriented, and capable of managing multiple outreach efforts simultaneously.

Tech Proficiency: Experience with outreach tools, CRMs, or spreadsheets to manage and track recruitment efforts.

Self-Starter: Able to work independently and take initiative to achieve goals.



Bonus Qualifications:

Experience working with e-commerce or wellness brands.

Knowledge of TikTok and Instagram creator ecosystems.

Previous remote work experience.



What We Offer:

Competitive hourly rate.

Flexible work hours.

Opportunity to work with a dynamic and growing company.

A supportive team environment with opportunities for growth.



How to Apply:

If you’re passionate about social media and excited to help build a team of dynamic content creators for a brand like Spicy Cubes, we’d love to hear from you! Please submit your resume and a brief cover letter highlighting your experience in outreach and why you’re the perfect fit for this role.

title: Outbound Patient Specialists (Mandarin and English Speakers)
description:
Are you fluent in Mandarin and Cantonese? Do you have a warm, friendly personality and a passion for helping others? We’re looking for Outbound Patient Engagement Specialists to join our team and connect with our valued patients, right from the comfort of your home!



About the Role:

You'll be reaching out to patients via phone to check in, provide updates, and ensure they feel supported and cared for. This is more than just a customer service role—it’s about building meaningful relationships and making a difference in people’s lives every day.



What You’ll Do:



Make outbound calls to our patients, completing at least 45–50 calls per day (script provided).

Share updates about their care or services.

Ask how we can better support them and address any concerns.

Deliver exceptional and compassionate service with every call.

Develop rapport and build trust with patients.

Answer incoming calls professionally and courteously.

End each call on a positive note, leaving patients with a smile.





What We’re Looking For:

Fluency in Mandarin or Cantonese and English (required)

Strong communication and interpersonal skills

A warm, friendly, and engaging phone presence

Experience in customer service or patient outreach is a plus

Reliable internet and a quiet space to work remotely

Ability to work in Pacific Time from 9AM to 6PM



Apply only if you can speak a Bilingual Language



If you're ready to use your language skills and heart for service to brighten someone’s day, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Executive Assistant
description:

mbers

?

title: Creative Content Strategist – Social Club Brand (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook Ads)
description:
Nourish is a private offline social club in Halifax, Canada that runs high-sensory in-person events like yoga with live cello, DIY cosmetics nights, guerilla gardening series all designed to help adults make real friends. We have a rotating creative calendar and are pre-growth. 

The founder is a full-time professional running this solo, so you will work with her and take on ownership of the content strategist and creative production role.



Tasks Include:

- Weekly content planning pulled directly from our event database & brainstormed ideas during virtual catch-up chats

- Instagram and TikTok content creation: graphics, captions, video concepts, short-form edits

-
 ad creatives that are compliant and conversion-focused

- Shot guides before each event detailing what to film, what angles, what to capture and why

- On-camera conversion focused script drafts for the founder with specific angle direction and reasoning

- Stock image sourcing that actually reflects our demographic (adults 30–50, warm, grounded)



What we're looking for:

A creator who can create grounded assets for our target demographic of 30+ and ability to think creatively to come up with angles, shots, and the like.



How we work:

You review upcoming events in our system weekly, propose a content plan, get approval, and execute. 

The founder will give you brand context and voice guidance upfront. 

After that, you are expected to make creative decisions, suggest new ideas, and flag what's not working.



To apply, you must submit:

A 2-minute Loom video. 

Show us one piece of content you made, explain why you made the creative decisions you did, and tell us what result it drove.

OR

Two samples of social content you created for an experience, event, or lifestyle brand (not e-commerce, fitness supplements, corporate)



The first sentence in your application must contain a viewable link to your loom / video recording OR name a short-form content trend on Instagram or TikTok that is currently converting for experience-based brands in 2026. Applications that do not do this will not be read

title: General Accountants
description:
We're hiring General Accountants in the Philippines — and we need people who actually care about getting the numbers right.

We're a U.S.-based company building out our accounting function with remote talent from the Philippines. This isn't a freelance gig or a short contract — it's a full-time, long-term placement with direct access to leadership and a real seat on the team. We have up to 4 openings and we're moving fast.

You'll own the financials end-to-end. That means maintaining the general ledger, running reconciliations, managing AP/AR, preparing monthly reports, and supporting our close cycles. You won't be doing low-level data entry — you'll be one of the people keeping the financial engine running.

What we're looking for:



3–5+ years of solid accounting experience

Proficiency in QuickBooks, Xero, or similar platforms

Strong attention to detail — you don't let errors slide

Clear written communication in English

Organized, reliable, and able to work independently

Experience with U.S.-based companies or U.S. accounting standards is a strong plus

You've worked remotely with a U.S. team before

You're proactive — you spot problems before being asked

You take full ownership of your deliverables

You handle month-end close pressure without needing to be managed

You're in this for the long run, not just a quick role



Compensation is ?45,000 – ?55,000/month based on experience. Full-time, fully remote.

If you're serious about your craft and want to be part of a team that values accuracy and ownership — this is the role.

To apply, send us:



Your updated resume

Looking to place 4 people

title: AI Automation Engineer (Systems, Security & Go-To-Market Infrastructure)
description:
AI Automation Engineer (Systems, Security & Go-To-Market Infrastructure)



OTE: 70,000 PHP/month (Full-Time)

Schedule: Flexible (EST Overlap Preferred)



Role Overview



We’re building an AI-first company focused on developing go-to-market systems, automation infrastructure, and internal tools for small and medium-sized businesses.



As an AI Automation Engineer, you will be responsible for building scalable, secure, and high-performance systems that power business operations. This includes automation workflows, AI integrations, and internal platforms.



We are specifically looking for candidates with a strong technical foundation—someone who understands systems architecture, APIs, and security principles, not just surface-level automation tools.



This role is inspired by high-level builders who can think in terms of infrastructure, workflows, and long-term scalability—not just task execution.



Expectations

1. Automation & Systems Engineering



? Build automation pipelines using APIs, n8n, Make, Zapier, and custom scripts

? Design systems that are scalable, reliable, and secure

? Implement structured workflows across business operations



2. AI Integration & Tooling



? Integrate LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) into real-world workflows

? Build AI-assisted systems for operations, lead management, and execution

? Optimize prompts and outputs for business use cases



3. Infrastructure & Security Awareness



? Build systems with proper data handling, access control, and security in mind

? Understand multi-tenant environments, permissions, and system boundaries

? Ensure workflows are stable, monitored, and fail-safe



4. Communication & Collaboration



? Work with internal teams and leadership to translate business needs into systems

? Clearly explain technical solutions to non-technical stakeholders

? Document processes, workflows, and system logic



Key Responsibilities

1. Workflow Architecture



? Design and implement end-to-end automation systems

? Connect CRMs, communication tools, and internal platforms

? Ensure system reliability and scalability



2. API & Integration Development



? Work with REST APIs, webhooks, and third-party integrations

? Handle authentication (OAuth), data syncing, and event-based triggers

? Troubleshoot and optimize integrations



3. Internal Tools & Platforms



? Assist in building internal dashboards, CRMs, and operational tools

? Work with modern stacks (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, React, Supabase)

? Contribute to system architecture and backend logic



4. Problem Solving & Execution



? Take ownership of systems from concept to deployment

? Debug issues across workflows, APIs, and applications

? Continuously improve system performance and efficiency



Technical Skills & Candidate Profile



? Strong Engineering Background (Non-Negotiable)

? Experience in software development, systems engineering, or backend development

? Strong understanding of APIs, system design, and architecture



? Systems & Security Mindset

? Thinks about scalability, reliability, and data security

? Understands access control, data flow, and system dependencies

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) – Inbound & Outbound
description:
We're hiring an SDR who actually knows the difference between a booked meeting and a qualified one.

Most SDRs chase volume. They blast
s, log calls, and celebrate when the calendar fills up — regardless of whether those meetings go anywhere. That's not what we're building here.

We're a tech company with a real product and a real sales motion. We need someone who can get in front of decision-makers, qualify hard, and hand off prospects that AEs actually want to work. This is a full-time remote role based in the Philippines, with a base of 40–50K PHP depending on experience, plus commission. More importantly — it's a direct path to an Account Executive seat for people who earn it.

You'll run outbound across
, LinkedIn, and phone. You'll build sequences, prioritize high-intent leads, and move cold prospects through to sales-ready. Ramp is two weeks total — onboarding is 4 days, and you're calling on day 5.

What we're looking for:



1–3+ years in SDR, BDR, or outbound sales

Proven track record booking qualified meetings — not just any meetings

B2B sales experience, ideally in tech or SaaS

Solid written and verbal English

CRM experience — HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar

Hunter mindset with a process behind it



What makes you stand out:



You know your meeting-to-opportunity conversion rate off the top of your head

You've worked in Apollo, Outreach, or Salesloft

You understand buyer intent signals beyond open rates and reply counts

You're applying because you want to close deals — not because you want a safe SDR seat forever



This role isn't for people who are comfortable just hitting call quotas. It's for people who want to understand the full sales cycle and earn their way into a closing role.

Apply here: 



Special Notes



- Must be trainable to become an AE

- Ramp : 2 weeks

title: Operations Manager — Build & Scale a High-Volume Recruitment Machine
description:
Remote | Full-time | Offshore OK | Direct ownership



We’ve built a simple but powerful recruitment system:



- One role sources candidates at scale

- One role handles outreach, tracking, and scheduling

- One role closes on calls



The system works, but it’s under-optimized.



We’re looking for a sharp operations manager to take full ownership of this engine and turn it into a machine that compounds.



This is not a support role. You will own the numbers and be judged on outcomes.





Why this role is interesting

You won’t be “helping” a team. You will be running a system.



You’ll have:



- Authority to set targets and standards

- Control over hiring, training, and replacement

- Freedom to redesign workflows and tooling

- Clear KPIs and direct feedback loops

- A mandate to scale output, not maintain status quo



If you like building systems, pushing performance, and seeing immediate impact, this role is designed for you.





What you’ll own

You will be responsible for turning a working pipeline into a high-throughput engine.



That includes:



- Managing and coaching a small offshore team

- Setting and enforcing daily activity and quality targets

- Improving reply rates, show rates, and onboarding speed

- Designing SOPs, scripts, and QA processes

- Identifying bottlenecks and fixing them fast

- Replacing underperformers decisively

- Reporting performance clearly (dashboards, not stories)



You are expected to think like an operator, not a coordinator.





What success looks like

- Clean, visible dashboards that show pipeline health

- Consistent, predictable recruitment throughput

- Faster time-to-output for new hires

- Measurable KPI improvement month over month

- A system that runs without founder intervention



If results stall, you diagnose and fix it.





Who this is for

This role is a strong fit if you’ve:



- Managed SDR, appointment-setting, or BPO teams

- Owned daily and weekly KPIs

- Built or enforced SOPs and QA systems

- Led teams where output actually mattered

- Made tough calls to protect performance



You don’t need marketing or influencer experience. You do need comfort with accountability.





What we don’t care about

- Influencer marketing background

- TikTok expertise

- Buzzwords or theory



We care about execution and results.





Compensation

$2,000–$3,000/month base, depending on experience

Performance bonuses tied to quality outcomes

Write your name backwards in the application.

Long-term role with real ownership for the right person



Strong performers will get more scope over time. 



How to apply

Please answer the following in your application:



What kind of team have you managed before?

What KPIs did you personally own?

What system or process are you most proud of building?

What do you do when performance drops?



Short, specific answers win.

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 1b
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 





CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required
