title: Marketing Operations VA for Photography Education Brand
description:
I am looking for a full-time Marketing Operations Virtual Assistant for my tutorial-based education business teaching Photography and Adobe software such as Photoshop and Lightroom. This role involves executing important tasks in the "engine" of the business—handling
 marketing, customer support, basic graphic design, and technical website updates. All of which you will be provided training for even if you don't have direct experience.



The business creates online courses and digital products specifically for photographers. I am looking for a tech-savvy "jack of all trades" who can take my raw content and handle the implementation across our various platforms. You will be expected to work a set schedule to ensure our marketing and support run smoothly. I am looking for someone who can problem solve well, learn quickly, and detail oriented. If you choose to apply, please include the secret word “Rango” at the top of your application. Without this secret word, your application will not be considered.



The Role & Tasks:



-
 Marketing: Organizing and scheduling all marketing
s in Kit. The
s will be written for you; you are responsible for uploading, adding the correct links, and scheduling.



- Customer Support: Managing our support inbox via Gmail. You will use provided templates to help students or flag advanced technical issues for me to review.



- Basic Graphic Design: Creating basic graphics for
s and social media using Canva or Adobe Express. I will provide the outlines and text; you will put them together.



- Social Media Admin: Writing descriptions and scheduling posts on YouTube and Instagram.



- Tech Implementation: Executing split tests on our WordPress site (GeneratePress) based on provided change requirements, and updating course materials in Circle.so. (Direct training will be provided for both tasks).



- Data Tracking: Completing weekly stat tracking sheets for
 performance, website traffic, and sales performance using data from Samcart and Thrivecart.



--



**Requirements:



Schedule: Ability to work 9am – 5pm PST, Monday through Friday.



Communication: Fluent English is a must for customer correspondence and social captions.



Design Eye: Experience creating clean, professional graphics in Canva or Adobe Express from scratch



Reliability: A stable internet connection and a "detail-obsessed" mindset (you catch broken links before they go live).



--



**Required Tool Experience:



- Kit (formerly ConvertKit)



- WordPress (GeneratePress)



- Canva or Adobe Express



- Circle.so (Bonus)



- Samcart or Thrivecart (Bonus)



- Google Sheets / Google Workspace



--



**Payment:



$500/month USD (Starting salary with room for growth based on performance).



Payment will be sent via PayPal or Wise bi-weekly.



--



**Job Application Requirements:



Should you choose to apply, please include the following information:



Please write a paragraph of why I should hire you for this specific operations role. Don’t just list your experience; describe how you work. Share any related experience you have to social media, inbox, or google sheets management.



A link to a portfolio or examples of graphics you have created or social media accounts you have managed.



Which of the tools listed above (Kit, WordPress, Circle, etc.) do you have the most experience with? Explain that experience.



When would you be available to start work?



--



**Application Process:



A shortlist of applicants will be created for a live video interview. Those who pass the interview will be invited to perform a small paid "trial task" (such as setting up a mock
 in Kit or creating a specific graphic, its exact details are TBD). Based on the results, one VA will be chosen for the role.



I look forward to hearing from you! Thank you for your time.

title: Amazon FBA/FBM Store Manager (Wholesale)
description:
ABOUT US

We are a growing Amazon FBA wholesale business based in the US. We source branded products from authorized distributors and resell them on Amazon. We're looking for a reliable, experienced store manager to take ownership of our day-to-day Amazon operations so we can scale fast.



This is a long-term, full-time remote role with room to grow.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

• Manage and monitor our Amazon Seller Central account daily

• Source profitable products from wholesale distributor catalogs (we'll provide access)

• Check product restrictions and eligibility using Keepa, SellerAmp, or Helium 10

• Create and optimize product listings (titles, bullets, keywords, A+ content)

• Submit ungating applications and handle supporting documentation

• Manage FBA shipments — creating shipping plans, sending inventory to Amazon

• Manage FBM shipments — creating shipping plans, sending inventory to Prep Center

• Monitor inventory levels and flag restock needs before stockouts happen

• Handle customer messages, returns, and account health alerts

• Track sales performance and report weekly using Google Sheets or similar

• Manage Amazon PPC campaigns (create, monitor, optimize)



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

You must have:

• At least 1–2 years of hands-on Amazon FBA experience (wholesale preferred)

• Proven experience inside Seller Central — not just theoretical knowledge

• Familiarity with tools like Keepa, SmartScout, AsinZen, Helium 10, or SellerAmp

• Strong written English and clear, proactive communication

• Ability to work independently, follow SOPs, and manage your time without being chased

• Stable internet connection and a proper work-from-home setup



Nice to have:

• Experience with wholesale catalog sourcing

• Knowledge of Amazon ungating processes

• Basic Canva or image editing skills

• Experience with Amazon PPC campaign management

• Familiarity with Frontier Co-op, UNFI, or similar US distributors



This role is NOT for you if:

• You've only taken Amazon courses but haven't managed a real store

• You need constant supervision or daily reminders

• You've never submitted an ungating application or created a shipping plan



WORK DETAILS

• Full-time: 40 hours/week

• Schedule: Flexible, with availability during US Eastern or Pacific business hours for check-ins

• Setup: 100% remote

• Start date: ASAP



COMPENSATION

• Starting at $4–$8/hour depending on experience

• Paid weekly via Wise or direct bank transfer

• Performance bonuses available as the store grows



HOW TO APPLY

Do NOT just send your resume. Applications that don't follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



Please send an
 with the subject line: "FBA Manager – [Your Full Name]"



Include the following:

1. A 2–3 paragraph summary of your Amazon FBA experience (be specific — what stores, what categories, what results)

2. Answer this question: A product you want to sell shows "Listing Limitations Apply" in Seller Central. Walk me through exactly what you do next.

3. Screenshot or link to a listing you created or improved

4. Your internet speed screenshot (speedtest.net)

5. Your expected monthly salary

6. Your availability and earliest start date



We reply to every complete application within 2 business days.

title: Content Editor
description:
This position is part time but could grow into a full time position. 



Cloud Campaign is a social media marketing platform designed for digital agencies. Our mission is to make launching, managing, and scaling a marketing agency accessible to everyone. Our platform enhances agency productivity while strengthening client relationships.



We’ve recently created a premium, "done-for-you" social media fulfillment service designed specifically for agencies called CloudStudio. It handles the entire production lifecycle - from custom strategy and high-impact content creation to automated scheduling and client approvals - allowing clients to scale their roster without increasing overhead.



Role Summary



 As a CloudStudio Editor, your sole focus will be refining AI-generated content and

captions within our proprietary Approval system. You will ensure all brand assets meet

our high quality standards and align perfectly with client feedback. This is a fast-paced, remote role requiring a sharp eye for detail and quick turnaround times.



Key Responsibilities

Edit Content: Content needs to be edited within 24 hours after it has been generated or feedback has been left. You’ll be sent Approvals for each customer workspace that needs to have content edits. There are typically two rounds of edits: 

First Round

Images: Make edits to any incorrect AI images (ex: extra hands, gibberish text, etc)

Captions: Make edits to captions that have errors.

Second Round

All edits to Images and Captions will be made based on the client’s feedback left on the Approvals

Additional Rounds (If needed)

All additional edits to Images and Captions will be made based on the client’s feedback left on the Approvals



Follow Up with Cloud Campaign Point of Contact

Once the First Round of content has been edited, alert you point of contact so they can share the edited content with the client.

Repeat for the Second Round and Additional Rounds, if needed.

title: Virtual Assistant: Detail-Oriented and Social Media Video Editor
description:

This role is part-time (minimum 15 hours/week) and fully remote. I already provide the tools, including CapCut Pro access and training for it with effects, so you do not need to be an expert — but you must be able to follow directions without repeated explanations.



What You’ll Do:

- Follow step-by-step instructions from written messages

- Help with light 
pany posts (2 posts per week)

IMPORTANT – SKILL TEST (REQUIRED TO APPLY):

/tylertometich/reels/)

Who This Is NOT For

Pay & Tools

title: AI Systems & Automation Specialist
description:
Role Summary

We are seeking an AI Implementation Specialist to help drive our internal APEX initiative, focused on bringing practical AI into the business to improve speed, accuracy, reporting, process consistency, and operational execution.

This is a full-time role for someone who is highly organized, resourceful, detail-oriented, and excited about using AI tools to solve real business problems. This person does not need to be a traditional software engineer, but they do need to be highly capable with modern AI tools and able to use them to build workflows, improve processes, create useful outputs, and move projects forward quickly.

You will start by supporting quality control and execution inside our APEX roadmap, helping validate outputs, improve workflows, organize information, and assist in implementation. Over time, this role will expand into building and improving AI-enabled systems across multiple departments.

This is a role for a builder. We are not looking for someone who only talks about AI. We are looking for someone who can use it to produce real results inside a real business.

What You Will Be Working On

Examples of projects in this role may include:

• AI-assisted SOP creation, refinement, and maintenance

• KPI dashboards, scorecards, and reporting support

• Workflow automations

• Process mapping and documentation

• Data cleanup and structuring for AI use

• Internal knowledge organization

• Quality control of AI-generated outputs

• Building practical tools and workflows that improve team performance

• Supporting implementation of our APEX roadmap across departments

Primary Duties

• Help execute and support our internal APEX initiative for AI adoption and business improvement

• Review, validate, and improve AI-generated work for accuracy, usefulness, and consistency

• Build and refine workflows using AI tools to improve business processes

• Assist in documenting SOPs, workflows, standards, and process maps

• Help create reporting tools, metrics tracking systems, and operational scorecards

• Organize business information so it can be used more effectively by AI systems

• Collaborate with leadership and internal tea
mbers to identify high-value opportunities for AI implementation

• Test ideas quickly, improve them, and turn them into repeatable systems

• Use good judgment to distinguish between useful output and low-quality AI-generated noise

• Support implementation projects across operations, admin, finance, customer service, and other business functions

• Maintain clear documentation of what is being built, why it matters, and how it should be used

• Continuously look for ways to improve efficiency, leverage, and execution

Tools and Systems You May Work With

Experience with all of these is not required, but comfort learning and working with tools like these is important:

• Claude Code

• Google Sheets / Excel

• ClickUp

• n8n

• Metabase

• SQL / Postgres / Supabase

• QuickBooks

• Other internal systems and operational tools

We will provide access to Claude Code for the person hired for this role.

Ideal Candidate Profile

We are looking for someone who is:

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Strong in written English

• Naturally proactive and resourceful

• Fast at learning new tools and systems

• Good at following structure while still thinking independently

• Comfortable working with ambiguity and figuring things out

• Process-minded and improvement-oriented

• Able to turn messy ideas into clean outputs

• Interested in business operations, not just technology

• Focused on usefulness, execution, and real-world results

• Curious, persistent, and capable of self-management

Essential Qualifications and Competencies

• Experience using AI tools in a practical business setting

• Ability to use AI to help create workflows, documentation, reports, or automations

• Strong written communication skills in English

• High attention to detail and strong quality-control instincts

• Ability to learn systems quickly and work across different business functions

• Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple tasks

• Good judgment and problem-solving ability

• Reliable follow-through and professional work habits

Preferred Qualifications

• Experience with workflow automation tools such as n8n 

• Experience with spreadsheets, reporting, and KPI tracking

• Experience supporting SOPs, QA, process improvement, or operations

• Basic familiarity with APIs, SQL, databases, or structured business data (nice to have)

• Experience using AI to support implementation rather than just content generation

• Experience working with U.S.-based companies or remote teams (nice to have)

This Role Is Not For You If

• You only have theoretical interest in AI and no real examples of using it to improve work

• You rely on AI outputs without checking them for quality or accuracy

• Your written English is weak

• You struggle to follow structure, naming conventions, or process discipline

• You are not comfortable learning new software and systems quickly

• You need constant direction for every task

• You cannot work the required schedule consistently

• You are looking for a side job rather than a serious full-time role

Employment Details

Position Type: Full-time

This role requires full availability during assigned hours and cannot be combined with other employment.

Schedule: Monday through Friday, U.S. Central Time, 7:00 AM - 5:00 PM with a 1-hour break

Philippines equivalent timing will vary seasonally.

Compensation: PHP 45,000 - 75,000 monthly, paid weekly

Paid leave provided for recognized U.S. holidays when operations are suspended.

About Our Organization

Join Tri-State Tree Service, an industry leader with three decades of exceptional service throughout Pensacola, Florida and surrounding areas. Our TCIA accreditation places us among an exclusive group, with fewer than 1% of tree care companies achieving this distinction.

We believe in operational excellence, continuous improvement, and using technology to create real competitive advantage. We invest heavily in systems, equipment, process improvement, and innovation. This role is part of a larger initiative to build practical AI into the business in a way that creates real leverage and long-term value.

If you want to help build something meaningful, improve the way a real business operates, and grow with a company that is serious about execution, this is an excellent opportunity.

Application Requirements

To be considered, please complete all of the following:

1. Use AI Implementer as the subject line of your application

2. Submit your current resume

3. Provide a link to a video introduction of no more than 3 minutes explaining:

o your experience using AI tools in real work

o the most useful thing you have built or improved using AI

o why you are a strong fit for this position

4. Complete the short screening task below

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

Candidates must have a reliable computer, stable internet connectivity.

Screening Task

Please complete the following short task as part of your application:

Choose one business process that could be improved using AI. Examples:

• SOP creation or maintenance

• Quality control of team outputs

• KPI reporting

• Workflow documentation

• Customer service responses

• Task follow-up or internal accountability

Submit a short response that includes:

1. A brief description of the business problem

2. How you would use AI to improve it

3. What tools you would use

4. A simple example of the workflow

5. One risk or limitation of your approach and how you would handle it

Keep your answer practical and concise. We are not looking for the most technical answer. We are looking for clear thinking, good judgment, and real business usefulness.

title: Lead Manager/Appointment Setter- Real Estate Sales
description:
We are actively looking to add a Lead Manager to our real estate investment firm.



This role involves speaking with both new and existing leads, with the primary goal of qualifying prospects and setting appointments for our acquisitions team to present offers.



Responsibilities include calling inbound and outbound leads using RingCentral and Wayv Dialer, following and internalizing a proven script, taking detailed notes during and after each conversation, and accurately categorizing and updating leads in our CRM (GoHighLevel). You will also be responsible for handling a high volume of calls, consistently following up with leads, and hitting daily KPIs and performance targets.



This position is ideal for someone who has strong English communication skills, confidence on the phone, a willingness to learn and improve daily, and a results-driven mindset. This is a performance-driven role where consistency, effort, and communication directly impact your success and income.



We offer a base salary along with performance-based bonuses for each contract signed and deal closed. This position will begin as part-time, with the opportunity to transition into a full-time role in the coming months based on performance and company growth. There is also clear potential for advancement into acquisitions or leadership roles for top performers.



We are a fast-paced, results-driven team focused on growth and continuous improvement, and we are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long term.





Hiring process includes 2-3 rounds of interviews. Start date: April 6th, 2026

title: Desktop Support Technician (L1/L2)
description:
Role Overview

The Desktop Support Technician is responsible for delivering high-quality technical support for end-user

systems, including workstation deployment, troubleshooting, and ongoing maintenance. This role is

critical to ensuring a seamless IT experience.

The ideal candidate is highly motivated, detail-oriented, and eager to learn. 

Key Responsibilities

? Provide technical and hardware support for workstation deployments and end-user

environments

? Assist with IT projects such as:

o Desktop/laptop provisioning and deployments

o User onboarding and offboarding

o Profile migrations and system upgrades

? Diagnose and troubleshoot hardware, software, and basic network issues

? Perform routine maintenance activities on workstations and systems (patching, updates, system

checks, etc.)

? Coordinate with vendors for warranty claims, repairs, and replacements

? Document work performed and maintain accurate records in ticketing systems

? Adhere to company IT standards, policies, and security procedures

? Provide after-hours support via chat and phone as needed

? Follow predefined security protocols to remediate alerts during off-hours

Required Skills & Qualifications

? 2+ years of experience in an IT support or help desk role

? Hands-on experience with Windows and macOS environments

? Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to identify root causes

? Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

? Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

? Ability to follow structured processes and documentation

? Ability to prioritize and execute in a fast-paced environment

? Client-focused with a positive, service-oriented attitude

? Strong desire to learn and continuously improve technical skills

Preferred Experience

? Experience working for a Managed Services Provider (MSP)

? Familiarity with:

o Ticketing systems (e.g., ConnectWise, Autotask, ServiceNow)

o RMM tools



o Endpoint security tools (AV/EDR)

o Microsoft 365 ecosystem (Entra ID, Intune, MAM)

o SIEM platforms and basic security operations workflows

? Experience with IT documentation platforms (e.g., IT Glue, Hudu)

Education & Certifications

? Bachelor’s degree in IT, Computer Science, or related field (preferred but not required with

strong experience)

? Preferred certifications:

o CompTIA A+

o Network+

o Security+

o Microsoft certifications (MS-900, AZ-900)



Working Hours

? Training Period (1–3 months):

o 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM (U.S. Eastern Time overlap required)

? Post-Training Schedule:

o 6:00 AM – 2:00/3:00 PM (local time, subject to change based on business needs)

? Includes occasional after-hours support responsibilities

Growth & amp; Development

? Ongoing hands-on training across IT support, systems, and cybersecurity

? Exposure to real-world MSP environments and modern toolsets

? Clear career progression path:

o Desktop Support (L1/L2) ? Systems Administrator ? Security Analyst / Engineer

? Mentorship from senior engineers and leadership

title: Customer Service Superstar Wanted!
description:
Summary

Do you thrive on building meaningful relationships and bring unforgettable experiences to customers? Are you passionate about delivering outstanding service and excited to grow with a dynamic team? If this sounds like you, we’d love to have you on board!



About Us:

Started in 2006, Uniworld Omniport is a DTC e-commerce company that owns and operates two niche leading brands in poker BBO Poker Tables and board gaming Game Theory Tables. Headquartered at the Speedway in North East Las Vegas, the company’s global footprint brings together tea
mbers from around the world to align around our company goal - “To create unforgettable memories between friends and family”. Our internal team culture can be distilled down to the foundations of trust and accountability, and it shows in our tea
mber’s actions.



Why This Role Matters:

This isn’t just about talking to customers on phone, text and
s—it’s about creating memorable experiences, resolving problems efficiently, and enhancing every interaction with customers. You’ll play a crucial role in ensuring our brand lives up to its promise of excellence.





What Success in this Role looks like:

- Delivering Unforgettable Customer Experiences: You’ll be the first point of contact for our customers, providing support that is professional, empathetic, and solution-oriented. Your ability to understand their needs and guide them seamlessly through their journey will set you apart.

- Solving Problems Before They Arise: Exceptional service means being proactive. You’ll anticipate challenges, address concerns efficiently, and ensure every customer interaction ends with satisfaction.

- Driving Value with Upselling Opportunities: This isn’t about hard sales—it’s about understanding customer needs and identifying products or services that genuinely enhance their experience. Your recommendations will build trust and add value.

- Championing Continuous Improvement: Your role goes beyond customer interactions. You’ll bring fresh ideas, collaborate with the team, and refine processes to improve efficiency and elevate service standards. Your insights will help shape our operations.



What You’ll Deliver:

- Consistently high customer satisfaction scores.

- Improved internal processes based on your contributions.

- A collaborative spirit that makes the team stronger every day.



Why Join Us?

We’re more than a workplace—we’re a community that values growth, innovation, and collaboration.



Deliverables:

The Perfect Omotenashi Support We Need:

- Experience That Speaks for Itself: You’ve thrived in a customer service role, consistently delivering outstanding results. Experience in sales? That’s a big plus!

- Master Communicator: Your verbal and written communication skills are sharp, clear, and customer-focused. You know how to engage and leave a lasting impression.

- Problem-Solving Mastery: You’re a quick thinker who excels at finding solutions, even under pressure. Detail-oriented and solutions-focused, you tackle challenges head-on.

- Adaptability for Success: You’re comfortable working a graveyard shift and are ready to bring your A-game, no matter the hour.

- Proven Results: Your track record shows a history of exceeding customer expectations, improving processes, and driving success in every role you’ve taken on.

title: 2D Animation Full time Youtube Video editor + Paid Test project
description:
Please read in full before responding or your application will not be considered. 



We are launching new YouTube faceless channels and currently testing multiple niches (facts, top lists, motivational, finance, health, and others). We have a large bank of videos ready to produce and are looking to hire 3 skilled video editors to join our remote team on a full-time basis.



You will receive the script and voiceover tool (Eleven Labs). Experience with ElevenLabs is a big plus.



Pay:

• Negotiable, but please submit a quote for a 15-20 minute video. 

• Paid test project: $10 for editing a 1-minute sample video (payment will be immediate via paypal)

• Consistent full-time workload with long-term opportunity and potential for growth

• Weekly pay for all videos completed that week. (The faster you can complete high quality videos, the more videos we can assign you.) 





Responsibilities:

• Create high quality animations that fit the script. Some motion, some still. 

• Edit 15-20 minute engaging faceless YouTube videos

• Add smooth cuts, dynamic transitions, text overlays, subtitles/captions, zoom/pan effects (Ken Burns), sound design, and background music

• Color correct footage, enhance audio, and optimize pacing for high viewer retention

• Deliver polished, YouTube-ready videos with proper organization



Requirements (Must-Have):

• At least 1–2 years of professional video editing experience (YouTube faceless or similar channels preferred)

• Strong proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro (DaVinci Resolve or Final Cut Pro acceptable)

• Strong English proficiency – you must fully understand scripts and content to choose appropriate visuals and timing

• Ability to find and select high-quality, relevant stock footage/B-roll that matches the script and niche

• Experience with or willingness to learn ElevenLabs for voiceover generation (big plus if you already have it)

• Reliable high-speed internet and a powerful computer for smooth 1080p/4K editing

• Excellent time management – able to deliver high-quality work on tight deadlines

• Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and able to work independently with minimal supervision



Example of videos you would be creating: 







How to Apply (Important – Follow Instructions Carefully):

1. Provide links to 3–5 examples of your best edited YouTube-style videos (2D faceless channels preferred – include links with timestamps if possible).



2. In your application message, include:

• Your years of video editing experience

• Editing software you are strongest with

• Your average turnaround time for a 15-20 minute 2D animated video

• Any experience with ElevenLabs or AI voice tools (optional but mention if you have it)



3. We will review portfolios and invite selected applicants to complete a paid test project ($10). You will receive a short raw sample (script + voiceover) and instructions to edit a 1-minute test video, including sourcing 2D animations.



Only complete applications with strong portfolio examples will be considered. We need 3 editors to start immediately so we can quickly test different niches.



4. Submit salary requirements for 15-20 min animated videos like the one included above.



If you’re a talented, reliable editor who can create engaging faceless videos and grow with us, apply now!



Apply Now to send your application with portfolio links.

title: Appointment Setter – Digital Marketing Agency (Home Services / Contractors)
description:
We’re a Canadian digital marketing agency specializing in lead generation for contractors (HVAC, roofing, flooring, concrete, landscaping, etc.). We’re looking for a confident, persistent appointment setter to book discovery calls with business owners across Canada and the US  via phone and social media outreach.

What You’ll Do

 ? Call contractor businesses directly using scripts we provide

 ? Send follow-up messages via
 
 and other platforms

 ? Handle objections calmly and keep leads moving toward a booked call

 ? Log all activity and update lead status in our CRM (GoHighLevel)

 ? Send appointment reminders to reduce no-shows

 ? Report daily on calls made, DMs sent, responses, and bookings

Requirements

 ? Confident speaking English on the phone with business owners

 ? Fluent written English for DM outreach

 ? Reliable internet connection and a working headset/microphone

 ? Available during North American business hours (overlap required)

 ? Self-managed and consistent — we track calls made and appointments booked

 ? Prior experience in cold calling, appointment setting, or phone sales is a strong plus

title: Content Quality VA (Video Editing)
description:
Job Type: Full-Time, 40 hours per week

Working Hours: 9 AM – 5 PM Eastern Standard Time



About Moon Media:

Moon Media is a dynamic content creation company specializing in viral, engaging videos. We work with a talented global team to produce over 400 video a month for our clients. And these aren’t your standard talking head videos— we make fun, dynamic videos engineered to get views and grow our clients accounts.



check out a few of our clients:









Role Overview:



We are looking for a Content Quality VA with a solid editing background. You will not only review and provide feedback but also make strategic edits directly to videos. You’ll help ensure every piece of content is strategically optimized to perform at its best.



Responsibilities:



- Review finished videos and provide detailed improvement suggestions.

- Directly make edits to videos to enhance hooks, structure, or strategic focus.

- Track content performance and analyze what works.

- Collaborate with the team to ensure balanced workloads and task distribution.

- Assist in creating guidelines and best practices for editors.

- Conduct feedback sessions or mini workshops to help the team grow.



Qualifications:



- Strong experience in video editing (specifically adobe premiere).

- A sharp eye for storytelling, pacing, and audience engagement.

- Analytical mindset to identify trends and improve content.

- Strong communication skills for clear feedback and collaboration.

Ideal Candidate Traits:



- A creative storyteller with an analytical mindset.

- Passionate about both editing and improving content performance.

- Adaptable, open to feedback, and eager to iterate.



Apply here:

title: Book keeper / Accounts
description:
Working Hours: UK business hours (or with some overlap)



About Us

Imperial Heating Services Ltd is a growing UK-based mechanical and heating contractor. We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Remote Bookkeeper / Accountant to support our financial operations and help drive the company’s continued growth.



Role Overview

You will play a key role in managing our day-to-day financial processes, supporting project accounting, and ensuring accurate and timely reporting. You will work remotely with access to systems such as Xero and Joblogic, and communicate regularly with the team via Microsoft Teams and
.



Key Responsibilities

Manage project/job accounts and financial tracking

Prepare and manage Applications for Payment (AFP)

Assist with client valuations and job quotations (in collaboration with supervisors)

Raise and manage sales invoices

Perform bookkeeping and bank reconciliations using Xero

Obtain and reconcile supplier statements

Prepare and submit VAT returns in line with UK regulations

Maintain and update records within Joblogic CRM system

Assist with filing the annual confirmation statement via Companies House

Monitor and track departmental income and expenditure



Requirements

Proven experience in bookkeeping or accounting (preferably with UK-based companies)

Strong working knowledge of Xero (essential)

Experience with Joblogic (desirable but not essential)

Good understanding of UK VAT and financial compliance

Excellent attention to detail and organisational skills

Strong written and verbal English communication skills

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

Comfortable working remotely and attending regular Teams meetings



What We Offer

Long-term, stable remote position with a growing UK company

Opportunity to develop alongside the business

Supportive team environment with clear communication

Competitive salary (based on experience)

title: Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone Based)
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone-Based, Process-Driven)



Job Overview



Are you someone who takes pride in handling customer interactions the right way—calmly, professionally, and consistently? Do you do well with clear expectations, scripts, and processes, and enjoy improving quickly through feedback? If so, Maid In America Cleaning Services, based in Clarksville, TN, wants to hear from you.



We’re seeking a Customer Experience Virtual Assistant to serve as a frontline point of contact for our customers and a dependable executor of structured processes. Working closely with our sales and customer experience teams, you’ll be responsible for answering inbound calls, handling customer requests, following defined scripts, and routing issues accurately.



This role is process-driven and phone-heavy, especially during training. The work can be fast-paced at times, but it is highly structured. Your ability to stay calm, follow instructions precisely, and take coaching seriously will have a direct impact on customer satisfaction and team efficiency.



What You’ll Do



- Answer & Handle Inbound Customer Calls: Be the first point of contact for customers and new inquiries, answering calls promptly, professionally, and calmly while following provided phone scripts.

- Follow Scripts & Decision Trees: Handle common customer needs—such as scheduling questions, reschedules, basic service inquiries, and initial issue intake—by following clear scripts and escalation rules exactly.

- Route Requests Accurately: Determine when a request can be handled directly and when it should be escalated to the appropriate tea
mber, ensuring clean handoffs and no dropped balls.

- Create a Positive Customer Experience: Make customers feel heard, cared for, and confident that their request is being handled, even when issues or complaints arise.

- Document Interactions & Updates: Log accurate notes and updates in our systems so the internal team always has clear context and next steps.

- Support Structured Administrative Workflows: Execute defined backend processes (task tracking, updates, file movement, and follow-through) by following SOPs and checklists without skipping steps.

- Receive Coaching & Improve Quickly: Actively apply feedback on calls, scripts, and workflows, improving speed, accuracy, and confidence over time.



Who We’re Looking For



- Process-Driven & Detail-Oriented: You’re comfortable following scripts, checklists, and SOPs exactly, and you don’t skip steps or “freestyle” your work.

- Calm & Professional on the Phone: You communicate clearly and confidently, stay composed with customers, and can handle questions or mild frustration without getting flustered.

- Highly Coachable: You take feedback seriously, apply it quickly, and improve fast—especially when it comes to phone scripts and customer handling.

- Reliable & Consistent: You show up on time, follow through on tasks, and can be counted on to do things the right way every time.

- Comfortable with Structure: You prefer clear expectations, defined processes, and knowing exactly what “good” looks like in your role.

- Tech-Comfortable: You’re comfortable working inside tools like Slack, shared documents, and task systems—or you can learn them quickly with instructions.

- Strong Communicator: Whether by phone, chat, or written notes, you communicate clearly, professionally, and respectfully.



Our Core Values



- Communication

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If you share these values, we want you on our team to help drive our company forward.



Important Note: Screening Step



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

Complete our personality test to see if there’s a mutual fit:


/p/fzxN5FC9302s 

Give honest answers; there are no right or wrong results.



Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value we’ve listed that you most resonate with.



IMPORTANT: When applying, please use AT LEAST 5 Apply Points



Skills & Requirements

- Fluent English: Strong spoken and written English is required. This is a phone-based role, and customers must be able to understand you clearly and comfortably.

- Customer Service Experience: Prior experience handling customer inquiries or support requests over the phone is required.

- Process & Administrative Competence: You’re comfortable following multi-step processes, documenting information accurately, and keeping systems up to date.

- Attention to Detail: You consistently capture the right information, follow instructions precisely, and avoid careless errors.

- Coachability: You’re open to feedback, willing to be corrected, and able to apply coaching quickly—especially when learning phone scripts and customer-handling expectations.

- Technical Readiness:

  - Reliable computer with backup power options

  - Quality headset and microphone

  - Quiet workspace suitable for phone calls

- Ability to Work Monday-Friday, 8AM-5PM CST.

- Reliable Internet & Backup Options: Stable internet connection with a backup plan to ensure consistent availability and responsiveness.



Why Join Maid In America Cleaning Services?



- Impactful Role: Your quick execution and initiative will directly affect customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.

- Growth-Oriented Culture: We embrace new ideas, reward proactive thinking, and train daily for continual improvement.

- Supportive Team: Collaborate with a group that values each other’s contributions and thrives on a feedback-rich environment.



If you’re passionate about productivity, eager to work in a fast-paced setting, and confident in your ability to deliver high-quality results quickly, apply now and become an integral part of the Maid In America family!



Apply Today: Submit your application per the instructions above. We look forward to learning more about you!

title: React Native Engineer Needed (AI Tools Experience Preferred)
description:

We are looking for an experienced React Native Engineer to support the development, debugging, and release of our mobile application.

• Solid understanding of responsive and adaptive mobile design

Preferred

Experience using AI assisted development tools such as:

if you are AI, you will not apply

title: L2 Tech Support Engineer
description:
Dear Technology Lover!

We're a small (but VERY efficient) 20-year-old MSP based in Arizona.

As a small company. we're VERY employee-focused, and believe that our tea
mbers are our MOST IMPORTANT ASSET!



Here are some of the things you can expect from working with us:

• Ongoing (monthly) manager review and feedback- you should never guess where you are "standing" and what you, AND THE COMPANY, can do better!

• Paid certifications- we will pay for your courses, and tests and allocate time during business hours to help you achieve your desired goals

• Paid Time Off- it's important to us that you are happy, healthy, and have a work-life balance!

• Bonuses- when the company wins- you win!

• Raises- As we grow, we believe you should as well. We have to stay competitive as an employer to retain our awesome employees!

• Opportunities to grow- In our industry, we can't be on "cruise control"... We need to push our tea
mbers to stay ahead of the technology curve. Help you continually to sharpen your skills with a focus on your career aspirations.

• Paid sick days- We understand life happens. We don't want you to feel that you have to drag yourself to work sick if your body tells you to relax...



You're the right fit if you:

• LOVE learning, working with, and experimenting with new technology

• Get excited when you save someone's day and provide great service

• Are a hard-working fun person, and see yourself being in the IT industry for the foreseeable future

• Want to work in a GROWING environment, with STABLE income, Bonuses, and a great attitude!

• Want the opportunity to advance and learn more!



Some of the responsibilities that your position will include are:

Helpdesk (mostly escalations, but some basic if needed), cyber security related tasks/ audits, cloud hosting and virtualization (HyperV, SonicWall, VPN), MS365 management and automation, BCDR (Axcient), networking (Unifi, Sonicwall), IT projects, Servers maintenance (Windows only), scripts creation, testing new technology and other tasks related to IT.



IMPORTANT:

This position requires AT LEAST 2 years of MSP experience and at least 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory, or lead role. 100% clean background check, highly organized, technologically savvy, and can work diligently with little 
veral hiring steps will take place to verify the above requirements, including reference checking, employment verification, technical testing, and more.



Minimum technical level that you will need to be able to pass a test on:

• Explaining to a non-technical person what the "cloud" is

• Consulting with a new client on what BCDR solution you would recommend to an SMB, and why

• Explaining what the differences are between traditional anti-virus and XDR

• Creating a new Virtual Machine on Hyper-V host, from an ISO file located on a different computer on the network.

• Explaining the differences and commonalities between SharePoint and OneDrive.

• Creating an Intune policy that will install Firefox on an Azure-joined VM, and make Firefox the default browser, with the specific home page we'll provide to you during the test.

• Several other situational and technical questions.

• CCNA certificate candidates preferred but not required.



MORE DETAILS:

• A PRE-EMPLOYMENT BACKGROUND CHECK is performed (at our expense). You must have 100% clean background check. Please do not apply if you don't have 100% clean background check.

• Personality is KEY for us. We are looking for an easy-going, yet professional, friendly and HONEST person.

• You will be working from home. This means you must have a quiet work environment and no excessive background noise.

• FAST AND RELIABLE INTERNET SERVICE IS REQUIRED With at least 100Mbps download speed  20+Mbps upload speed.

• As part of this position requirement, you must have a computer that will be used exclusively for your work with us. This means we will be installing our security software on that computer, will remove admin rights from you, and monitor/ control it for security and compliance reasons. In return, we will pay you additional “rent” fees, on top of your salary, in the amount of several hundred dollars. Details about this “rental” will be discussed during your second interview. There are minimum requirements that your computer must have, in order to be employed with us. You must have a Computer/Laptop with at least i5 minimum 9th gen processor (preferably a newer one) with 16 GB RAM or more or Ryzen 5/7 (MUST include TPM support) as well as Windows 11 OS.

• You must have recently worked on a night shift for 2 consecutive years or more.

• We evaluate/ review employees monthly and provide consistent feedback.

• We offer raises and bonuses according to performance, certifications, attitude, and customer reviews twice/ year.

• Your manager (our IT director) will create a roadmap for your "KPIs" and certifications track. We always push our team to earn certifications and additional knowledge – even allowing “disconnect study time” during business hours!

• On-call rotation (after-hours) for a week at a time, once every 4-5 weeks. It's VERY rare that we get calls after-hours (the average is only twice/ year!).

• We're closed on major US holidays, and at the completion of the first 3 months of employment, you'll qualify for paid holidays.

• Work hours are Mon-Fri at 8 am till 5:30 pm (UTC-07:00 , MST, Arizona time zone)

• Every 4 to 5 weeks, you'll be working 1/2 day on a Saturday (project work/catch-up work) and get 1/2 day off the week after

• Mandatory 1-hour lunch and additional breaks (as you need those) throughout the day.

• Further details and information will be discussed with qualified candidates.



EXPERIENCE REQUIRED:

• REQUIRED: Relevant minimum 2 YEARS experience working for an MSP

• REQUIRED: With AT LEAST 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory or lead role.

• REQUIRED: Microsoft Azure AD/ M365 experience

• REQUIRED: Experience working with an RMM and PSA software (DATTO preferred)

• Preferred: Cyber Security education/experience

• Preferred: Hyper-V experience



Other tools we use:

Barracuda DNS filter, AutoElevate, Cylance, Infocyte, Syxsense, IT Glue, SonicWall, Unifi, and more



HOW TO APPLY?



Answer the questions below, or you may also send an
 to 
 with the subject line "L2 Tech Support - Feb2026" with your answers:



- An attachment of your resume in PDF format/ link of you resume if you will send us a message.

- A confirmation (simple written statement) that you have a 100% clean background with no criminal history.

- A confirmation (simple written statement) that you understand the business hours (MST\ Arizona time zone.



Answer the following questions:

1. How many years of experience do you have working in an MSP company? Name of the MSP company/s you worked with.

2. Do you have at least 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory or lead role?

3. Do you have experience working with RMM and PSA software? What applications did you use?

4. Do you have experience working with Virtualization, servers, GPO, TCP/IP, hyper-v/vmware, conditional access, Intune, and Scripting such as PowerShell?

5. Have you recently worked on a night shift for 2 consecutive years or more? What time zone and when?

6. Are you okay with the computer requirements and the rental arrangement described in the job details?

7. Do you have an internet speed of at least 100Mbps download speed and  20+ upload speed?



We're looking forward to having you join our family!

title: Website Developer
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Website Developer to join our team on an on-call basis. The primary responsibilities of the role include:



What We’re Looking For:

- Strong GoHighLevel experience (websites, funnels, automations)

- Deep understanding of website speed optimization and performance tuning

- Problem-solver mindset — proactive, resourceful, and solution-oriented

- Ability to think in systems and fix root causes, not symptoms

- Comfortable using and adapting to AI tools to improve speed, efficiency, and output

- Stays updated with industry trends, especially how AI is changing web development



This role requires flexibility, technical expertise, and the ability to work efficiently and independently.

title: Part Time Affiliate, Influencer, and Brand Manager
description:
We are seeking a proactive Affiliate, Influencer, and Brand Manager. This role drives brand awareness and revenue growth through strategic partnerships in a fast-paced e-commerce environment. Ideal candidates are creative, analytical, and results-driven with a strong social media background.



Key Responsibilities:



-Build and execute a comprehensive influencer, ambassador, and affiliate marketing strategy aligned with the brand's growth goals.

-Define KPIs and set performance benchmarks for each program.

-Identify and implement scalable tools/platforms (e.g., affiliate tracking systems, CRM integrations).

-Identify, recruit, and manage relationships with influencers across platforms including Instagram, TikTok,
, Pinterest, and YouTube.

-Oversee content strategy, campaign briefs, product gifting, and paid collaborations.

-Partner closely with the social media team to integrate influencer content into broader brand campaigns.

-Monitor performance metrics (reach, engagement, conversions) and adapt strategy accordingly.

-Design and launch a formal brand ambassador initiative that fosters community engagement and brand loyalty.

-Create application funnels, tiered rewards structures, and engagement initiatives.

-Serve as the primary point of contact for all ambassadors, ensuring alignment with brand messaging.

-Develop an affiliate partner network from scratch, including onboarding processes, commission structures, and promotional assets.

-Partner with blogs, content creators, coupon/deal sites, and strategic affiliates.

-Monitor and report on affiliate performance metrics; continuously optimize for revenue growth.







Qualifications:



-Minimum 3 years in e-commerce marketing with expertise in influencer, social media, or affiliate programs.

-Deep understanding of social media platforms and trends.

-Proven ability to build and scale marketing initiatives from the ground up.

-Experience using influencer and affiliate platforms (e.g., GRIN, Refersion, Aspire, ShareASale).

-Strong understanding of tracking, attribution models, and performance metrics.

-Excellent communication and negotiation skills, with the ability to write clear briefs and manage brand voice.

-Must be able to work effectively during USA Central Time (CST) business hours.

-Highly organized, self-motivated, and able to manage multiple priorities simultaneously.





Kindly fill out this form to apply:

title: Shopify Developer
description:
We’re not looking for a basic Shopify developer. We’re looking for someone who can own and improve the customer experience on our Shopify store—while helping us migrate and clean up a complex, evolving codebase.If you only install apps or follow instructions, this role is not for you.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



Driving meaningful UX improvements across the storefront (not just “making things look better”)

Helping migrate from a legacy theme to a clean, scalable new theme (Dwell)

Refactoring and converting existing features into theme app extensions / modular components

Improving site performance (target: +20% speed improvement)

Working inside a partially messy, partially modern codebase and helping bring structure to it

Collaborating with us to refine ideas, challenge assumptions, and improve execution



What We Expect From You



You use Shopify CLI and modern development workflows (non-negotiable)

You communicate clearly and proactively (especially async)

You don’t get stuck—you research, troubleshoot, and unblock yourself

You ask questions early instead of guessing late

You care about UX, branding, and conversion, not just code

You can balance speed and quality depending on the importance of the task



You’ll Thrive Here If You:



Think like a partner, not just a developer

Are highly detail-oriented

Can manage your own work without constant direction

Enjoy cleaning up systems while building new features

Want to grow with a brand (not juggle 10 clients)



Requirements



3+ years Shopify development experience

Strong Liquid, HTML, CSS, JavaScript skills

Experience with Shopify APIs, apps, and integrations

Proven ability to improve UX and site performance

Experience working in evolving or legacy Shopify environments



Please fill out this form to apply:

title: Shopify Developer
description:
We’re building more than just a Shopify store—we’re creating a high-performing, branded customer experience that evolves with our business. We’re looking for a Shopify developer who wants to be part of that journey. This is not a task-based role. This is an opportunity to help shape how customers experience our brand—through design, performance, and thoughtful execution.



What You’ll Help Us Build



A seamless, intuitive user experience that drives conversion and engagement

A clean, scalable Shopify architecture as we migrate from a legacy setup to a modern theme

Modular, flexible features using theme app extensions and best practices

A faster, more responsive storefront (targeting 20% performance improvement)



How You’ll Work



Collaborate closely with us to translate ideas into real improvements

Contribute your own insights into UX, branding, and customer behavior

Help us move from a partially messy system to a clean, high-performing foundation

Balance speed and craftsmanship depending on what matters most



Who You Are



A strong Shopify developer who also cares deeply about the end user

A clear communicator who works well in a remote, async environment

Someone who takes ownership and figures things out

Detail-oriented and thoughtful in your approach

Excited to grow with a brand and make a long-term impact



Technical Requirements



3+ years Shopify experience

Strong with Liquid, Shopify CLI, and modern workflows

Experience with APIs, apps, and performance optimization

Solid frontend skills (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)



To apply, please fill out this form:

title: eCommerce Manager (Website Merchandising, UX & Operations)
description:
We are seeking a highly organized E-commerce Manager to lead our day-to-day online retail operations, including website merchandising, website production, website optimization and digital customer experience. This role is both strategic and operational, requiring  hands-on expertise in Shopify, as well as a strong focus on UX/UI optimization and driving online growth, and the ability to manage a remote team of content and website producers. This role can be hybrid or remote in Texas.



Key Responsibilities: 



-Manage day-to-day e-commerce operations including site maintenance, product launches, and promotional campaigns

-Develop and execute website merchandising strategies to maximize conversion and revenue

-Optimize user experience and interface design through A/B testing, customer research, and data analysis

-Work with a remote team to administer our Shopify platform and leverage merchandising tools such as Fast Simon for search optimization, personalization, and merchandising automation

-Monitor site performance metrics and implement data-driven improvements

-Coordinate cross-functional projects while maintaining organized workflows and prioritization

-Oversee product catalog management, content updates, and site functionality enhancements



Qualifications: 



-5+ years of e-commerce management experience

-Expert-level proficiency with Shopify platform

-Hands-on experience with merchandising tools such as FastSimon, Bloomreach or Searchspring

-Strong understanding of UX/UI principles and e-commerce best practices

-Proven track record of driving online revenue growth and improving conversion rates

-Highly organized with excellent project management skills and ability to manage multiple priorities

-Strong analytical skills with experience in Google Analytics and data-driven decision making

-Knowledge of HTML/CSS and SEO best practices

-Customer-centric mindset with exceptional attention to detail

-Familiarity with
 platforms such as Klaviyo a plus

-Experience with Hotjar, Microsoft Clarity or other heatmapping tools as plus



Kindly fill out this form to apply:

title: CSR Manager
description:
Job Description: Customer Service Manager

Position Overview

The Customer Service Manager is responsible for overseeing the customer service department and ensuring that customers receive outstanding support and service. This role involves managing a team of customer service representatives, developing and implementing policies and procedures, and working to improve overall customer satisfaction.

Key Responsibilities

• Team Management: Supervise and mentor customer service staff, including hiring, training, and performance evaluation.

• Customer Support: Ensure the delivery of high-quality customer service across all channels, including phone,
, live chat, and social media.

• Policy Development: Develop and implement customer service policies and procedures to enhance the customer experience.

• Issue Resolution: Address and resolve escalated customer issues and complaints promptly and effectively.

• Performance Monitoring: Monitor and analyze key performance indicators (KPIs) to assess the efficiency and effectiveness of the customer service team.

• Continuous Improvement: Identify areas for improvement in customer service processes and implement appropriate solutions.

• Training Programs: Develop and conduct training programs to keep the customer service team updated on best practices and company policies.

• Technology Utilization: Utilize customer service software and tools to manage and track customer interactions and improve service delivery.

• Feedback Collection: Gather and analyze customer feedback to identify trends and areas for improvement.

• Collaboration: Work closely with other departments, such as sales, marketing, and product development, to ensure a seamless customer experience.

• Budget Management: Manage the customer service department budget and ensure cost-effective operations.

Required Skills and Qualifications

• Experience: At least 10 years’ proven experience as a customer service director or in a similar role.

• Leadership: Strong leadership and team management skills.

• Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

• Problem-Solving: Strong problem-solving and conflict resolution skills.

• Customer Focus: Deep understanding of customer service principles and practices.

• Analytical Skills: Ability to analyze performance metrics and identify areas for improvement.

• Technical Proficiency: Familiarity with customer service software, databases, and tools.

• Organizational Skills: Excellent organizational and multitasking abilities.

• Interpersonal Skills: Ability to build strong relationships with customers and tea
mbers.

• Education: Bachelor’s degree in business administration, marketing, or a related field is preferred. 



Job Type:

Full-time- this is a full-time position that needs to be engaged during the entire shift. You will not have the ability to use this as a 2nd job.



Shift:

Monday- Friday CST 7am to 5pm 10 Hours Per Day- 1 Hour Break*

*Please note this is 9pm to 7am Philippines time half the year and half the year it would be 8pm to 6am.



Salary:

60,000 PHP to 100,000 PHP. Salary is done every week on Friday the following week. 

You will have paid time off for the holidays we are closed in the U.S. (total of 5 per year)



Company Introduction:



Welcome to Tri-State Tree Service, a beacon of excellence in the tree service industry for over 30 years. Based in the picturesque heart of Pensacola, FL, we've been nurturing roots of trust and quality in the communities we serve. As a TCIA (Tree Care Industry Association) accredited company, we're part of an elite group; less than 1% of Tree Service Companies attain this prestigious certification, setting us apart in our commitment to industry-leading standards and practices.



Our legacy is enriched by our unwavering dedication to technological innovation. With significant investments in the latest equipment and cutting-edge techniques, we've positioned ourselves as pioneers, consistently delivering unparalleled services to our valued clientele. At Tri-State Tree Service, you're not just finding a job – you're becoming part of a tradition rooted in excellence, innovation, and community growth. Embark on a journey with us and elevate your career as we continue to reach new heights in the tree care sector.



Application Process:

To apply, please ensure you do the following:

1. Include “Customer Tree” in the
 subject line.

2. Attach your most recent resume.

3. Include a link to a brief video (3 minutes or less) explaining why you are the ideal candidate for this position.



Failure to follow these instructions will result in your application not being considered. Ensure that you have a computer, noise-cancelling headset, and a reliable internet connection for this role.



Join us in delivering excellent results-business processes marketing and driving our team towards achieving remarkable success. We look forward to welcoming you aboard!

title: AI Video Editor – UGC Content (Full-Time, Short-Term Contract)
description:
Looking for a Full-Time AI Video Editor (Short-Term Contract)



I’m hiring a skilled AI video editor to work directly with my growth marketing agency. This is a full-time role for a minimum of two months, with potential to extend if the fit is right.



To work with us, you must have:

 1. Proven experience editing UGC (user-generated content) videos

 2. Strong working knowledge of AI tools — and specifically how to create UGC content using AI

 3. Excellent English communication skills (written and spoken)

 4. The ability to work autonomously and stay self-directed without hand-holding

What we expect:

 • Fast turnarounds. We move quickly and need someone who can keep up.

 • Receptiveness to feedback. You’ll receive direction and need to implement it efficiently.

 • Consistency. Full-time availability for the duration of the contract.



To apply, send me:

 1. Your video editing portfolio

 2. Specific examples of UGC videos you’ve edited or produced

 3. 1–2 sentences describing how you use AI in your video creation workflow

Important: Start your application with the words “AI Video” — this tells me you actually read the post.



Before officially starting, you’ll complete a short paid test edit using an existing video. This helps us make sure we’re aligned before committing to the full engagement.



BONUS:  Applicants able to create picture creative and or help out with script will be given priority.

title: Video Editor for Webinar (Slides + Speaker Sync Editing)
description:
Job Description:



We are looking for a skilled video editor to help us edit a 30–40 minute webinar into a clean, professional final video.



This project requires syncing speaker footage with presentation slides, creating a dual-view style video that is engaging and easy to follow.



We want someone who can make the content look polished and professional while keeping viewers engaged throughout the presentation.



Responsibilities:

Edit a 30–40 minute webinar recording

Sync speaker video with presentation slides (picture-in-picture or side-by-side format)

Cut out mistakes, pauses, or unnecessary sections

Add smooth transitions between slides and scenes

Ensure audio is clear and balanced

Add basic text overlays or callouts when needed

Deliver a clean, professional final video ready for publishing

Requirements:

Strong experience with video editing (Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut, CapCut, or similar)

Experience editing webinars, presentations, or educational content

Ability to sync slides with spoken content accurately

Good sense of pacing and storytelling

Attention to detail

Ability to follow instructions and meet deadlines

Bonus Skills:

Motion graphics or light animation

????? with YouTube or course-style videos

Basic sound editing/enhancement

Thumbnail creation (optional)

Project Details:

Length: 30–40 minutes

Style: Professional, clean, educational

Format: Dual view (slides + speaker)

Turnaround time: [You can insert your deadline here]

What We’re Looking For:

Someone reliable and easy to communicate with

A long-term partner for future webinar/video projects

Someone who takes pride in delivering high-quality work

How to Apply:



Please include:



Links to similar webinar or presentation-style edits you’ve done

Your editing software/tools

Your turnaround time for a 30–40 minute video

The word “WebinarPro” in your application

title: Real Estate Admin VA (Transaction Coordinator/Listing Coordinator)
description:
Are you the detail-oriented, deadline-driven Real Estate Listing Coordinator we’ve been looking for?

We’re hiring a Remote Real Estate Listing Coordinator to support our U.S.-based real estate business. This is a work-from-home position where you’ll manage listings from onboarding to active status, ensure accuracy across platforms, and keep all listing-related tasks on track.



If you’re highly organized, thrive in a fast-paced environment, and enjoy keeping listings compliant and up to date, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities:

- Coordinate new listings from onboarding through activation and updates.

- Enter, manage, and update listings in MLS and other listing platforms.

- Collect, organize, and maintain listing documents, disclosures, and property details.

- Coordinate with agents, sellers, photographers, and vendors.

- Track listing deadlines and ensure compliance with MLS and brokerage requirements.

- Make price changes, status updates, and listing revisions as needed.

- Maintain accurate records and communicate listing updates to the team.



What We’re Looking For:

- Prior experience as a Real Estate Listing Coordinator that worked for A US Real Estate company is a MUST.

- Familiarity with MLS systems and real estate listing workflows.

- Fluent in spoken & written English (must keep up with natural conversation).

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

- Tech-savvy and comfortable working across multiple tools and platforms.

- Self-motivated and able to work independently with minimal supervision.



What You’ll Gain:

- A long-term, remote role with stable workload.

- Opportunity to work closely with a U.S.-based real estate team.

- Hands-on experience managing real estate listings end-to-end.

- Meaningful work where your accuracy and organization directly impact success.



Apply Now:

title: Marketing Manager
description:
Marketing Manager

Immigration Support Services (ISS)



Full-Time | Remote | Independent Contractor



Independent Contractor Notice

This is a full-time independent contractor position, not an employee position.

The selected candidate will operate as an independent contractor and will be responsible for managing their own taxes, compliance obligations, and business registrations as required by their jurisdiction.

No employer-employee relationship is intended or created by this engagement.



About Immigration Support Services (ISS)

Immigration Support Services (ISS) is a U.S.-based company that provides non-legal immigration support services, including business plan preparation, entity formation support, franchise opportunity sourcing, and related services for individuals pursuing U.S. immigration benefits.

We work alongside immigration attorneys and law firms across the United States and internationally to support individuals navigating the immigration process.

We are seeking a highly capable Marketing Manager to oversee and execute the company’s marketing efforts and drive measurable growth.



Position Overview

The Marketing Manager will be responsible for managing and optimizing ISS’s marketing systems, lead generation funnels, and performance tracking.

This role requires both strategic thinking and hands-on execution.

You will work directly with company leadership and coordinate with paid media specialists, developers, designers, and contractors.



Core Responsibilities:

-Paid Advertising Oversight

-Oversee and optimize paid advertising campaigns (Google, Meta, YouTube, etc.)

-Improve cost per lead and cost per booked consultation

-Monitor campaign performance and ROI

-Coordinate with external media buyers and vendors as needed

-Funnel & Conversion Optimization



-Improve landing page conversion rates

-Optimize intake forms and consultation booking flows

-Identify and fix funnel bottlenecks

-Increase overall conversion efficiency

-HubSpot CRM Management

-Build and optimize automated
 sequences

-Implement workflows and follow-up systems

-Track and manage lead lifecycle stages

-Improve consultation booking rates through automation and follow-up optimization



Website Optimization

-Identify opportunities to improve performance and user experience

-Coordinate implementation with developers

-Ensure site performance, speed, and usability are optimized

-Content & Marketing Strategy

-Coordinate content creation efforts

-Plan marketing initiatives aligned with company growth goals

-Ensure consistent and effective messaging



Reporting & Analytics

-Track key performance metrics, including:

-Lead volume

-Cost per lead

-Consultation booking rate

-Conversion rates

-Revenue attribution

-Provide regular performance updates and recommendations



Required Qualifications:

-3+ years of digital marketing experience

-Strong experience managing paid advertising campaigns

-Experience using HubSpot CRM

-Strong understanding of marketing funnels and conversion optimization

-Analytical and data-driven mindset

-Strong communication skills

-Highly organized and execution-focused

-Reliable and responsive



Preferred Qualifications:

-Experience marketing professional services

-Experience working with U.S.-based companies

-Experience managing paid media vendors or agencies

-Familiarity with compliance-sensitive industries



Performance-based bonuses may be offered based on measurable growth and performance.



Please include your expected monthly compensation when applying.

title: Systems Architect & Automation Engineer (n8n + Airtable + API Expert)
description:
Job Description:

Journey Psyche is building a real-time operational control system for a multi-provider mental health company. We are moving away from manual work and into a fully integrated, live architecture.

This is NOT a data entry or admin role. This is a high-level System Builder role. You will be responsible for turning our defined architecture into working, live systems within days, not weeks.

The Stack You Must Master:

Airtable: Advanced database schema, Interfaces/Dashboards, and complex formulas (This is our Command Center).

n8n: Our primary automation engine for parsing and routing.

Keragon: Integration layer for Healthcare APIs (Practice Fusion).

Communication: Updox, RingCentral, and WhatsApp API integration.

The Mission (5 Core Layers):

Intake: Automated parsing of Zocdoc/Alma/Email into Airtable with instant WhatsApp alerts.

Continuity: Automated tracking for no-shows and refill drift.

Financial: Connecting Converge payments to Airtable for real-time collections visibility.

Operations: Syncing Hubstaff and RingCentral activity into the dashboard.

Integration: Mapping APIs between Practice Fusion, Keragon, and n8n.

Expectations:

Speed: You build and test 24–48 hour iterations.

Execution: We value output over long discussions.

Incentives: Performance bonuses for hitting milestones (Intake system, Financial layer, etc.).

How to Apply:

Send a brief summary of the most complex n8n workflow and Airtable Base you have built. Include the word "ARCHITECT" in your subject line.

title: ACCOUNTANTS
description:
FULL-TIME NIGHT SHIFT | Remote | For High-Performance Professionals Only



Pivotl is seeking an exceptional Remote Accountant to join our specialized team providing advanced accounting services across the United States. This is a FULL-TIME, NIGHT SHIFT position designed for seasoned professionals who thrive under pressure and deliver excellence consistently.



IMPORTANT: This is NOT a side job or flexible arrangement. We need dedicated professionals accustomed to night shift operations who can commit to full-time hours. If you're seeking part-time work or are uncomfortable with night schedules, please do not apply.



What Sets This Role Apart

- 4-day work week, 3 days off - Maximize your work-life balance

- Premium compensation for proven high performers

- Comprehensive benefits: Paid vacation/sick leave, extensive paid training

- Complete autonomy in a remote environment - perfect for self-directed professionals

- Specialized focus on HOME SERVICE industries (HVAC, Solar, and related sectors)



The Challenge - Are You Ready?



We need a financial data cleanup specialist who can handle:

- Granular-level financial data reconciliation across complex business structures (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, AR, Vendor Recon)

- High-pressure deadline management while maintaining 100?curacy

- Independent problem-solving of complex accounting discrepancies

- Proactive identification and resolution of financial irregularities

- Core Responsibilities for Elite Performers

- Execute comprehensive book-cleanup projects with tight deadlines

- Perform detailed adjusting entries with a deep understanding of tax implications

- Master QuickBooks Online for complex multi-entity structures

- Conduct advanced data analysis using Excel and Google Sheets

- Manage full-cycle AR/AP, invoicing, payroll, and bank reconciliations

- Deliver precise categorization and accounting across diverse business models



Non-Negotiable Requirements

- Proven track record in US accounting with demonstrable results

- Expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Online

- Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills for complex data manipulation

- Exceptional English communication - written and verbal

- Night shift availability - this is not flexible

- Autonomous work style - you must be self-directed and proactive

- Competitive Advantages (Preferred)

- Industry background in HVAC, solar, generators, roofing, foundations, or electrical

- Construction/contracting industry experience highly valued

- Experience using any of the following: Service Titan, Housecall Pro, Sera, Jobber, Service Trade, Acculynx, etc

- Experience using Keeper.app



Who Should Apply

- Rock stars only. We want professionals who:

- Thrive in high-pressure, deadline-driven environments

- Work autonomously without constant supervision

- Have extensive experience cleaning up complex historical financial data

- Take ownership of results and deliver consistent excellence

- Are committed to full-time night shift operations



Who Should NOT Apply

- Those seeking part-time or flexible arrangements

- Professionals are uncomfortable with night shift schedules

- Anyone looking for a "side job" or supplemental income

- Those requiring extensive hand-holding or micromanagement

- Ready to prove you're among the elite?



Apply Here: 
reers/bookkeeping-role

Pivotl - Where exceptional professionals build exceptional careers.
