title: AI Video Editor
description: Looking for someone who can use AI tools to generate and edit short-form videos. Must be creative and able to make fun, engaging, viral-style content!

title: Short-Form Video Editor for Street Interview Ads (Adobe Premiere Pro)
description:
Job Overview

CollegeWalk is a video ad agency that produces short-form street interview ads for consumer brands, similar to StreetTalk and 203 Media. We are looking for a skilled video editor who can consistently deliver high-quality vertical ads from our raw street interview footage.



Responsibilities

- Edit short-form vertical ads (15–60 seconds) from raw street interview footage for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and
.

- Follow our exact format and style guide on every ad (captions, music, sound effects, pacing, graphics, CTA).

- Add auto-captions with accurate timing and our specific caption style.

- Do basic audio cleanup (remove background noise, balance levels, fix distortion).

- Add product logos, on-screen graphics, and CTA screens for each ad.

- Work from detailed briefs and deliver on time with a 24–48 hour turnaround per ad.



Requirements

- Must use Adobe Premiere Pro as your primary editing software (no CapCut for final edits).

- Strong English comprehension; you must understand the script and pick the best takes.

- Proven experience editing short-form content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, or
 ads.

- Fast and reliable internet for downloading/uploading raw footage and exports.

- Comfortable working with Google Drive for file management and transfers.

- Able to follow detailed instructions exactly and not go off-brief with your own creative decisions.



Nice to Have

- Experience editing street interview style content.

- Experience with direct response or performance-focused ads.

- Portfolio specifically showing short-form ad creatives or UGC-style edits.



How to Apply

To apply, please send the following:

1. A short video (2–3 minutes) of you talking on camera, answering:

   - Why you think you'd be a good fit for this role.

   - Your past experience with short-form video ads.

   - What editing software you use and how long you've used Adobe Premiere Pro.

2. Links to 3–5 examples of your past work (ideally short-form ads or street interview style content).

3. Your expected hourly rate or per-ad rate.



Applications without the video will not be considered, as we need to hear your English and see how you communicate.



Pay and Term

- Pay: Negotiable based on experience and quality of work.

- Looking for a long-term partner, not a one-off hire.

title: SENIOR FREIGHT BROKER (PRICING LEAD / ACCOUNT OWNER)
description:
Alternative Titles (for sourcing reach):

        •       Senior Freight Broker

        •       Lead Freight Broker

        •       Logistics Pricing Manager

        •       Senior Logistics Account Manager

        •       Brokerage Operations Lead

        •       Freight Operations Manager

        •       Freight Broker Agent (Experienced)

        •       Multimodal Logistics Broker

        •       Logistics Account Owner



?



???? Location:



Remote (Philippines-Based Preferred)



?



???? Employment Type:



Full-Time



?



???? Compensation:

        •       Base Salary: $450 – $600 USD per month (based on experience and performance)

        •       Commission: 5% – 10% of gross margin

        •       Performance Bonuses: Based on margin targets, operational efficiency, and process implementation milestones



?



???? Role Summary:



We are building a high-growth logistics operation focused on:

        •       Freight brokerage (initial focus on trucking)

        •       Expansion into air, ocean, and rail freight

        •       Carrier network development

        •       Owner-operator partnerships

        •       Regional trucking expansion



We are seeking a Senior Freight Broker (Pricing Lead / Account Owner) who can step in immediately, take full ownership of pricing, build brokerage processes from the ground up, and actively support revenue growth through customer engagement.



This role will start with trucking (domestic freight) and progressively expand into air, ocean, and rail logistics, requiring adaptability and a willingness to grow into a multimodal logistics operator.



This is a performance-driven operator role with strong upside potential, designed for someone who wants ownership, autonomy, and the ability to directly impact earnings through results.



?



???? Core Responsibilities:



1. Pricing & Margin Control (Primary Responsibility)

        •       Set shipper rates and target carrier rates across all modes (starting with trucking)

        •       Maintain and optimize margins across all loads

        •       Make real-time pricing decisions based on market conditions



?



2. Process Creation & Optimization

        •       Build and implement:

        •       Pricing frameworks

        •       Load intake workflows

?

?

?

???? Position Overview:

This position is designed for a high-performing operator who can take ownership, build systems, drive execution, and contribute to revenue growth within a fast-growing logistics environment—starting with trucking and expanding into a full multimodal logistics operation—while benefiting from strong performance-based upside.

title: Sales Revenue Enablement Coordinator
description:
Company: Ascension Business Solutions LLC

Work Setup: Remote (Full-Time)

Schedule: U.S. Business Hours (Graveyard Shift)

Department: Sales

Reports To: Sales Manager



APPLY HERE: 



About the Role

Ascension Business Solutions LLC is seeking a detail-oriented, execution-focused Sales Enablement & Qualification Coordinator to improve sales cycle efficiency by ensuring inbound leads are responded to quickly, properly qualified, and accurately prepared before being passed to the Sales team.



This role focuses on lead speed, qualification discipline, and demo readiness, ensuring Sales calendars are filled with sales-ready prospects, not unqualified or premature leads. The position supports Sales, Marketing, and Revenue Enablement teams through strong CRM discipline and consistent lead-handling standards.



This role does not carry a sales quota or commission.



ABS hires for character first, skills second. This role requires accountability, attention to detail, and comfort operating within structured processes and clear qualification standards.



Position Summary

The Sales Specialist is responsible for driving revenue growth by managing qualified opportunities through the sales process—from discovery and demos to objection handling and closing. This role plays a key part in converting interest into signed agreements by delivering consultative sales conversations, building trust with prospects, and maintaining strong pipeline 
ntum.



The ideal candidate is confident in leading sales calls, conducting compelling demos, and guiding prospects toward a decision while ensuring a professional and seamless client experience.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES 

1. Sales Demo Ownership

- Lead discovery calls and sales demos with prospective clients

- Present ABS services clearly and confidently based on client needs

- Customize conversations and walkthroughs to align with the prospect’s goals, challenges, and operational needs

- Ensure prospects fully understand the value, process, and expected outcomes of working with ABS



2. DEAL PROGRESSION & CLOSING 

- Manage sales opportunities from demo stage through signed agreement

- Handle objections professionally and confidently to help prospects move forward

- Follow up consistently and strategically with warm leads and active opportunities

- Create urgency while maintaining a consultative and client-centered sales approach

- Drive opportunities toward close while maintaining strong client relationships



3. PIPELINE & CRM MANAGEMENT 

- Maintain accurate and up-to-date records in GHL or designated CRM

- Track all prospect interactions, follow-ups, deal stages, and next steps

- Ensure pipeline visibility and deal accuracy at all times

- Maintain strong follow-up discipline to support consistent conversion performance



4. REVENUE PERFORMANCE EXECUTION

- Meet or exceed individual monthly sales targets

- Maintain strong conversion rates from demo to signed agreement

- Contribute to overall team revenue goals by consistently progressing qualified opportunities

- Support revenue growth through disciplined outreach, follow-up, and closing execution



5. CLIENT EXPERIENCE & SALES COMMUNICATION 

- Deliver a high-quality and professional experience throughout the sales journey

- Build trust and rapport with prospective clients through clear and effective communication

- Respond to inquiries in a timely and professional manner

- Ensure prospects feel supported, informed, and confident throughout the decision-making process



6. CROSS-FUNCTIONAL COLLABORATION 

Coordinate closely with:

- Sales Manager – deal strategy, coaching, and performance support

- Sales Assistant Manager – sales coordination, follow-up execution, and pipeline support

- Sales Enablement and Qualification Specialist – lead qualification, CRM alignment, and process support

- Marketing & Lead Generation – lead quality and campaign feedback

- Operations / Onboarding Team – transition of signed clients into implementation



This is an urgent hiring need.



Ascension Business Solutions is prioritizing this role due to active onboarding demands and leadership support requirements.



Qualified candidates who complete all application and assessment steps promptly may be contacted and processed on an accelerated timeline.



Preferred Qualifications

- Proven experience in sales, account management, or business development

- Strong confidence in conducting demos and closing deals

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills

- Ability to build rapport quickly and guide prospects through the decision-making process

- Strong follow-up discipline and pipeline management skills

- Experience using CRM systems such as GHL is a plus

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced, target-driven environment



Compensation & Benefits:

Ascension Business Solutions offers a structured, long-term employment opportunity designed to support stability, growth, and professional development.



Competitive compensation aligned with the leadership role scope

- Paid training and structured onboarding

- Fully remote work setup, including company-issued laptop and noise-canceling headset

- HMO health coverage (subject to eligibility guidelines)

- Paid Time Off (PTO)

- Performance-based annual salary increases

- Additional bonuses are available after 6 months of tenure



ABS is intentional about building long-term professional partnerships, not short-term or gig-based arrangements.



Why Join Ascension Business Solutions?



- Shape the quality and readiness of ABS’s global VA workforce

- Work directly with Leadership and cross-functional teams

- Operate within clear systems, standards, and escalation frameworks

- Join a values-driven organization guided by Love, Support, and Excellence



Disclaimer: Responsibilities may evolve based on business needs. Employment is at-will.



APPLY HERE: 



Complete the Application Form and include the following:

- Vocaroo introduction link

- Updated resume

- Device specifications screenshot

- Internet speed test result



??This role is urgent. Early and complete applications will be prioritized. Incomplete applications may not be processed.

title: Long-Form Video Editor (Fast, Reliable, Full-Time)

title: Customer Support Experts Needed
description:
We are now hiring Customer Support Experts to assist our customers over the phone.

This is a full-time position only with long-term potential



Customers will call us and ask for assistance with various tasks, such as:



Checking their email accounts

Purchasing items they need

Signing up for services

Logging into or managing their accounts

Checking or signing up for credit score reports

Conducting general online searches



The tasks we handle are all things that can be done online.



PAY & EARNING STRUCTURE



Base rate starts at $4.50 per hour.

Agents usually work 10 hours per day including the paid breaks, and we allow more hours if someone wants to earn more.

During busy times, we also pay time-and-a-half overtime when we need additional coverage.

Good performers can earn a monthly bonus between $60 and $150.

There is a $50 monthly attendance bonus for consistent on-time performance.

Every 6 months, we evaluate performance and agents can receive up to an extra $0.50 per hour added to their rate if they are doing well.



With base hours plus bonuses and performance increases, a strong performer can earn up to around $1,100 per month.



This is the roadmap of our hiring process:



- You will take a quiz that typically takes about an hour to complete.

- If you pass the quiz, you will be invited to take two live mock calls or skill tests. The first one usually takes around 20 minutes, and the second one is longer, typically about an hour.

- Once you pass, you will then proceed with orientation and training.



Please note that our quizzes and skill tests can be challenging for beginners and require sharpness, speed and excellent attention to details. If you believe you possess these skills, feel free to apply.



You need to have fluent English as well as having very good internet connection and a quiet place to work.

Please apply only if you are fully available for a full-time position.

Please do not apply if you are not based in the Philippines.



When You Apply*



Please answer the following questions:



1. How many hours are you available daily, and on which days of the week?

2. How soon are you ready to start?



Lastly, please include a link to a Vocaroo audio recording (minimum 45 seconds) where you briefly introduce yourself. Tell us a bit about your background, relevant experience, and one hobby you genuinely enjoy.



Thanks,

Aron

title: Freight Dispatcher (Operations and Execution Coordinator)
description:
Alternative Titles (for sourcing reach):



* Freight Dispatcher

* Truck Dispatcher

* Logistics Coordinator

* Transportation Coordinator

* Load Coordinator

* Dispatch Operations Specialist

* Fleet Dispatcher

* Carrier Operations Coordinator



---



???? **Location:**



Remote (Philippines-Based Preferred)



---



 ???? **Employment Type:**



Full-Time



---



 ???? **Compensation:**



* **Base Salary:** $400 – $800 USD per month (based on experience and performance)

* **Performance Bonuses:** Based on on-time delivery, operational efficiency, and issue resolution

* **Optional Incentives:** Small per-load bonus tied to successful delivery and execution quality



---



 ???? **Role Summary:**



We are building a high-growth logistics operation focused on:



* Freight brokerage (trucking first)

* Expansion into air, ocean, and rail

* Carrier network development

* Owner-operator partnerships

* Regional trucking expansion



We are seeking a **Freight Dispatcher (Operations & Execution Coordinator)** responsible for ensuring that all booked loads are executed smoothly from pickup to delivery.



This role is responsible for **post-booking execution**, working directly with carriers, owner-operators, and internal teams to ensure loads move efficiently, issues are resolved quickly, and service levels are maintained.



---



 ???? **Core Responsibilities:**



 1. Load Execution & Coordination (Primary Responsibility)



* Take over loads once they are booked by Carrier Sales

* Coordinate pickup and delivery schedules with carriers

* Ensure all load details are confirmed and executed properly



---



 2. Carrier Communication



* Act as the main point of contact for carriers and drivers during active loads

* Provide updates, instructions, and support throughout shipment lifecycle

* Ensure drivers have all required information (addresses, times, instructions)



---



 3. Tracking & Visibility



* Monitor shipments from pickup to delivery

* Track location, timing, and status of loads

* Provide internal updates to team as needed



---



 4. Issue Resolution



* Identify and resolve:



  * Delays

  * Missed pickups/deliveries

  * Route issues

  * Communication breakdowns



* Escalate critical issues to broker or leadership when needed



---



 5. Documentation & Compliance



* Ensure all required documentation is completed:



  * Rate confirmations

  * Bills of lading (BOLs)

  * Delivery confirmations



* Maintain organized records of all shipments



---



 6. Internal Coordination



* Work closely with:



  * Carrier Sales

  * Freight Broker (Pricing Lead)

* Ensure smooth handoff and execution of all loads



---



 7. Support for External Load Sourcing (If Assigned)



* Assist in coordinating loads that come from outside the internal ecosystem

* Work with carriers and external brokers when needed to ensure proper execution



---



 ???? **What This Role Does NOT Do:**



* Does not set pricing

* Does not negotiate rates with shippers

* Does not own customer relationships

* Does not recruit carriers or drivers



---



 ???? **Required Experience:**



* 1–3+ years of dispatching or logistics coordination experience

* Experience working with carriers, drivers, or fleets

* Familiarity with trucking operations (required)



---



 ???? **Required Skills:**



* Strong communication and coordination skills

* Ability to multitask and manage multiple loads simultaneously

* Strong problem-solving ability under pressure

* High attention to detail and organization

* Comfortable using communication tools and tracking systems



---



 ???? **Preferred Experience:**



* Experience working with owner-operators

* Experience in freight brokerage environments

* Exposure to multimodal logistics (air, ocean, rail)

* Experience with load boards or dispatch software



---



???? **First 30 Days Expectations:**



* Take ownership of load tracking and execution

* Learn internal processes and communication flow

* Begin managing loads independently

* Ensure smooth coordination between carriers and internal teams



---



???? **Reporting Structure:**



* Reports directly to: Freight Broker (Pricing Lead) / Founder

* Works closely with:



  * Carrier Sales

  * Shipper Sales



---



???? **Growth Opportunity:**



* Opportunity to grow into:



  * Senior Dispatcher

  * Operations Manager

  * Multimodal Logistics Coordinator



* Exposure to expanding logistics modes (air, ocean, rail)



---



???? **Position Overview:**



This role is critical to ensuring operational excellence. The Freight Dispatcher is responsible for making sure that every load moves efficiently, on time, and without issues, acting as the bridge between planning and real-world execution.



---

title: Operations Specialist - Real Estate
description:
Operations Specialist – Real Estate (Remote, Agent-Facing)

Bramlett Partners | Remote (Philippines) | Full-time Contractor 

Salary: $2,000 – $2,500 USD/month + performance bonuses 

Schedule: Austin, TX business hours overlap required (6+ hours/day, CST) 

Start Date: ASAP — target May 2026



About Bramlett Partners



Bramlett Partners is the fastest-growing independent residential real estate brokerage in Austin, Texas. We support approximately 148 agents who close 1,300+ transactions and over $775 million in volume annually. Our operating philosophy is simple: amazing client service drives 5-star reviews and referrals, and technology and systems are how we scale that standard without adding complexity.



We are a technology-forward brokerage. Every team member is expected to use AI daily to work faster, smarter, and more independently.



The Role



You will be the operational backbone behind agent onboarding, customer support, and our leads program oversight. You report directly to our Operations Manager and work closely with our documentation specialist and the agent success team. Your job is execution: making sure nothing falls through the cracks, agents get onboarded smoothly, support tickets get resolved quickly, and our leads program participants are held accountable to standards.



This is an agent-facing role. You will interact directly with US-based real estate agents through
, our internal community platform, and video calls. You are the first impression for new agents joining the brokerage and an ongoing point of contact for support. Professionalism, warmth, and clear communication are not optional.



This is not a passive role. You will be expected to identify problems before they escalate, suggest process improvements, and use AI tools to multiply your output. If you need to be told what to do every day, this is not the right fit.



What You Will Own



-Agent Onboarding — Run the onboarding checklist for every new agent, send weekly status updates, provision system access, and ensure nothing is dropped. Success metric: zero onboarding tasks dropped, agent satisfaction 4.5/5 or higher.

-Customer Support (Tier 1) — Resolve front-line tickets alongside our documentation lead. Target first response under 4 business hours. Escalate complex issues with full context.

-CDA Processing — Verify and file Commission Disbursement Authorizations. 100% processed within 24 hours. Flag exceptions to your manager.

-Leads Program Oversight — Audit agent activity in our CRM, listen to lead calls for quality, prepare weekly accountability reports based on data, not opinions.

-Documentation QA — Help keep our internal knowledge base accurate, current, and useful.



Onboarding (First 90 Days)



-Days 1–30: Learn our systems and the Bramlett operating playbook. Own onboarding checklist execution. Handle Tier 1 support alongside our documentation lead. Daily video check-ins with your manager.

-Days 31–60: Add CDA processing. Begin drafting agent communications and templates using Claude. Identify recurring support patterns.

-Days 61–90: Add leads accountability monitoring. Produce weekly reports. Daily check-ins transition to weekly 1:1s as you demonstrate independence.



AI Proficiency – Hard Requirement



This is not a nice-to-have. Every member of our operations team uses AI daily, and you will be evaluated on your ability to use AI tools to work faster and produce higher-quality output.



Minimum expectations:



-Proficient with Claude or ChatGPT for drafting communications, summarizing information, and problem-solving

-Able to write effective prompts that produce usable first drafts

-Comfortable using AI to research unfamiliar topics and synthesize findings

-Willing to experiment with new AI tools without hand-holding

-You will be tested on this in the interview. If you have never used AI tools in a work context, please do not apply.



Must Have



-Excellent written and spoken English. You will communicate with US-based real estate agents on camera and via
.

-Professional on-camera presence and a clean, professional home office setup

-Demonstrated experience using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, or equivalent) in a real work context

-Experience with CRM systems, ticketing platforms, or operations tools

-Strong attention to detail — this role is compliance-adjacent and errors have real consequences

-Initiative — you identify what needs to happen and do it before being asked

-Reliable, fast internet

-Ability to overlap with Austin, TX business hours (CST) for at least 6 hours daily



Nice to Have



-Experience working for a real estate brokerage, property management firm, or related business

-Familiarity with Follow Up Boss, CallRail, HelpScout, or similar platforms

-Project management or process documentation experience

-Comfort with spreadsheets, basic data analysis, and dashboards

-Experience with no-code/low-code tools (Replit, Lovable, etc.)



We Will Not Move Forward With Candidates Who



-Cannot present professionally on camera with clear, understandable English

-Have no demonstrated experience using AI tools in a work context

-Require constant direction

-Cannot commit to consistent Austin business hours overlap



Tools You Will Use



-MGMT Portal (proprietary tool for agent onboarding, production tracking, product management, internal dashboard)

-FollowUpBoss

-SuperPortal (proprietary transaction management tool)

-Claude + Claude Projects

-Google Workspace

-Slack 



How to Apply



To be considered, please upload your resume and complete all the assessments at: 



Please include:



-Your resume

-A 2-minute video (or Loom or unlisted YouTube link) introducing yourself — camera on, no slides. We need to see and hear you.

-A short written answer to this question: Describe a time you used AI to solve a work problem. What tool did you use, what was the problem, and what was the result?



Applications missing the video, the AI example, or the keyword will not be reviewed.



We respond to every qualified application within 5 business days.

title: After-Sales Service
description:
# Customer Service Representative — Health & Wellness E-commerce



**Position:** Full-time  

**Industry:** DTC E-commerce · Dietary Supplements



---



## About Us



We're a fast-growing e-commerce company specializing in dietary supplements and wellness products. We operate a portfolio of brands sold directly to consumers via Shopify, with customer acquisition driven primarily through Meta Ads.



## The Role



You'll be the voice of our brands. Your job is to deliver a flawless customer experience across all our brands, handling incoming requests across multiple channels and turning every interaction into a retention opportunity.



## Responsibilities



**Multichannel Customer Support**

- Respond to customer inquiries via
, live chat, and social media DMs (Instagram,
, TikTok)

- Handle order tracking, returns, refunds, and complaints

- Maintain fast response times and a professional tone tailored to each brand



**Order Management & After-Sales**

- Process order modifications, cancellations, and exchanges in Shopify

- Coordinate with fulfillment partners to resolve shipping issues

- Manage customer subscriptions (modifications, pauses, cancellations)



**Continuous Improvement**

- Flag recurring customer feedback to help improve products and communication

- Build and maintain canned responses and FAQ documentation

- Identify upsell and retention opportunities



## Requirements



**Must-Have**

- 1–2+ years of experience in e-commerce or DTC customer service

- Proficiency with Gorgias (ticket management, macros, automations)

- Familiarity with Shopify (order management, refunds, customer portal)

- Excellent written communication: empathetic, professional, and solution-oriented

- Self-starter who can handle a high volume of tickets independently



**Nice-to-Have**

- Knowledge of the dietary supplement or wellness industry

- Affinity for direct response marketing and customer retention

- Experience managing subscriptions (Recharge, Skio, or similar)



## What We Offer



- Flexible hours

- Entrepreneurial, fast-paced, and high-growth environment

- Autonomy and real ownership from day one

- Growth opportunities (team lead, CX manager)



## How to Apply



Send us a short message explaining why this role interests you, along with your resume. Bonus: show us an example of a customer response you consider outstanding.

title: Paid Ads and Marketing Assistant
description:
About the Company

Our dental implant centers are a growing dental practice focused on helping patients restore their confidence and quality of life through advanced dental implant solutions.



We rely heavily on digital marketing and paid advertising to generate high-quality patient leads. We are looking for a skilled Paid Ads Specialist to help manage and optimize our advertising campaigns across multiple platforms.



This is a long-term full-time position for someone experienced in performance marketing and lead generation.



Position Overview

We are looking for a Paid Advertising Specialist who has hands-on experience managing campaigns across multiple ad platforms including Meta 
/Instagram), Google Ads, Bing Ads, and TikTok Ads.



The ideal candidate is data-driven, detail-oriented, and experienced in optimizing campaigns to improve cost per lead and overall marketing performance.



You will be responsible for launching, managing, testing, and scaling advertising campaigns.



Key Responsibilities

• Create and manage paid advertising campaigns on Meta, Google, Bing, and TikTok

• Optimize campaigns to improve cost per lead, conversion rates, and lead quality

• Monitor campaign performance and adjust budgets and targeting accordingly

• Conduct A/B testing on ad creatives, audiences, and campaign structures

• Track and analyze campaign performance metrics such as CPL, CTR, CPC, and conversions

• Ensure proper pixel tracking and conversion tracking are implemented

• Collaborate with the team to improve landing pages and marketing funnels

• Scale successful campaigns while minimizing wasted ad spend

• Provide regular campaign performance reports



Requirements

• Minimum 3 years of experience managing paid advertising campaigns

• Proven experience running lead generation campaigns

• Strong experience with Meta Ads, Google Ads, Bing Ads, and TikTok Ads

• Ability to analyze campaign data and make data-driven decisions

• Strong understanding of marketing metrics and performance optimization

• Ability to manage multiple campaigns across multiple platforms

• Good communication skills and ability to work with a remote team



Preferred Skills (Not Required)

• Experience in healthcare, dental, or local lead generation marketing

• Familiarity with Google Tag Manager, CRM systems, or marketing automation tools

• Experience improving landing page conversion rates

• Experience working with funnels and multi-step lead generation processes



What We Are Looking For

Someone who:

• Is highly analytical and performance-focused

• Understands how to generate high-quality leads, not just traffic

• Takes ownership of campaign performance

• Is proactive in testing and improving campaigns

• Can work independently and manage campaigns efficiently



Application Instructions

To be considered for this role, please include the following in your application:



Your portfolio or examples of ad campaigns you have managed

A brief summary of your experience with paid advertising

Examples of results you have achieved (CPL, ROAS, lead volume, etc.)



Applications without portfolio or proof of experience will not be considered.



? Bonus Tip for Applicants:

Candidates with experience managing lead generation campaigns for local businesses will be strongly preferred.



To be considered, please answer: What's your favorite movie?

short-form AI-generated videos for two growing brands: a dog supplement 

brand and a soursop wellness brand.

-

You should already have access to these tools or be willing to subscribe

-----------------------------------

PAY & STRUCTURE

-----------------------------------



- $3-$4 per video — this is task-based, not hourly

- You are paid for what you produce, not the time you sit online

- The more quality videos you complete, the more you earn — simple as that

- Editors who consistently deliver good daily videos earn $500–$800/month

- Performance incentives added after your first month for top editors

- This is a part-time role but with full-time earning potential for 

  the right person

THE RECREATE ASSIGNMENT (READ THIS CAREFULLY)

I include this assignment because I only want to hear from serious people.

making a decision together. Those are the only applicants I'll respond to.



If you're serious, skilled, and hungry to be part of something long-term, 

this is your opportunity.



-----------------------------

HOW TO APPLY

-----------------------------

Applications without the recreate assignment will not be considered.



Looking forward to seeing what you can do.

title: Part-Time Instagram VA — Canva Graphics, Scheduling & Stories (2–3 hrs/week)
description:
About the Role

I am the author of Choosing Rose, a children's book about the journey to motherhood. I run two Instagram accounts 
 
 — and I need a reliable VA to handle the creative and scheduling side so I can focus on my community.



I will handle all comments and DMs personally. Your job is purely execution — taking the captions and direction I provide and bringing them to life on Instagram every week.



This is a small but meaningful brand. I need someone detail-oriented, warm in their approach, and above all — consistent. Reliability matters more to me than a long resume.



What You'll Do Each Week

Create simple, on-brand graphics in Canva for approximately 5 posts per week across both accounts — captions and direction provided by me (approx. 1.5 hrs/week)

Schedule and post all content using a scheduling tool — I will provide access (approx. 30 min/week)

Apply the correct hashtags to each post from a list I provide

Send me a quick weekly summary of what was posted



What You Won't Need to Do

Write captions — I provide all copy

Respond to comments or DMs — I handle all engagement personally

Come up with content ideas — I provide a content calendar and full direction

Work weekends or odd hours — this is a flexible, low-pressure role



Tools & Access

???? Canva

You will be added as an editor to my Canva account. All brand colors, fonts, and templates will be set up for you. You will not need your own Canva account.



???? Instagram Scheduling

You will be given tea
mber access via a scheduling tool (Later, Buffer, or similar). You will never need my personal Instagram password — access is granted safely through the app.



What I'm Looking For

Confident with Canva — you can follow a style guide and create clean, attractive graphics

Experience scheduling Instagram posts using a scheduling tool

Strong attention to detail — captions, spelling, and posting times must be accurate

Reliable and communicative — a quick daily check-in message is all I need

Warm, genuine written English for Stories

Experience with lifestyle, parenting, or books content is a bonus but not required



How to Apply

Please send me:



A short introduction about yourself and your VA experience

2–3 examples of Canva graphics you have created (screenshots are fine)

Examples of Instagram accounts you have managed

Your availability and monthly rate

Your answer to this question: "What does good Instagram branding look like to you?"

I am looking to hire within the next 2 weeks and will reply to every complete application. Looking forward to finding the right person to grow this community with! ????

title: GHL Operations Coordinator — Ministry of Growth (INTERVIEW TOMORROW!)
description:
GHL Operations Coordinator — Ministry of Growth

$1,200/month (++BONUSES!!) | Full-time | Remote | HIRING THIS WEEK



???? Final CEO interview: Wednesday April 15, 1–3PM GMT+1. Apply now or miss the window.



ABOUT MINISTRY OF GROWTH

Ministry of Growth is an embedded growth partner for online creators. We go inside their businesses, build the revenue engine, and operate it alongside them. Revenue share — we only win when they win.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Not just someone who can set up GHL. We need someone who maps the client journey before touching the platform, builds clean systems with clear logic, documents everything with SOP videos and walkthroughs, and keeps it all running without anyone having to ask. Ideally, you've done this inside a digital marketing agency or for online creators, coaches, or course businesses — you understand what's at stake when a funnel breaks.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

- Map the full client journey first — understand every touchpoint before building in GHL

- Build GHL sub-accounts from scratch — pipelines, custom fields, tags, calendars, forms, payment integrations

- Set up the complete automation flow: lead capture ? nurture ? booking ? reminders ? no-show recovery ? post-call ? won/lost

- Wire
 and SMS copy into sequences with correct triggers, delays, and conditions

- Build and deploy snapshots for consistent client setups

- Test everything end-to-end before launch

- Monitor daily — find problems before they find you

- Write SOPs and record Loom walkthroughs for every system

- Manage Notion workspaces and Slack channels per client



MUST-HAVES

- 3+ years personally building inside GHL

- Background in digital marketing — agencies, funnels, or creator businesses

- You plan and map before you build

- SOP writing and walkthrough recording is part of your process

- Notion and Slack for daily async comms

- EU business hours overlap

- Strong written English



BIG PLUS IF YOU HAVE

Experience inside a digital marketing agency or with online coaches, course creators, or info product businesses — you already understand funnels, paid traffic, and what it means when a lead leaks.



NOT A FIT IF

- You skip documentation and go straight to building

- You've never written an SOP or recorded a walkthrough

- Your monitoring is reactive, not proactive

- You've only worked in non-marketing industries



WHAT WE OFFER

- $1,200/month — above market for PH, paid consistently (++BONUSES!!)

- Long-term role with a fast-growing agency

- Clear SOPs — you'll always know what to do

- Path to Senior Operations as we scale to 10+ clients



HOW TO APPLY

Send to my
: 
 (remove spacing) with the Subject: Your Name - Years of Experience

1. Your updated resume — highlight GHL and digital marketing experience

2. Portfolio — screenshots or links to GHL systems you've built

3. Loom video (2–3 min) — show us a system you mapped before building, walk through how it works, and tell us how you documented it for the team



Final CEO interview: TOMORROW! Wednesday April 15 · 1–3PM GMT+1

? No Loom = no interview. No exceptions.

title: Etsy DTF Transfer Mockup & Thumbnail Designer (High Conversion Focus)
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled designer who understands how to create high-converting Etsy mockups and thumbnails for DTF Transfer products.



This is NOT a basic design job.

We are looking for someone who understands buyer psychology, CTR optimization, and conversion-focused visuals.



About Us:

We run a high-volume Etsy store with 4000+ listings focused on DTF Transfers and custom apparel printing.

Our goal is to increase CTR, favorites, and sales through better visual presentation.



Your Responsibilities:



Create high-converting mockups for DTF transfer listings

Design Etsy thumbnails that stand out in search results

Improve existing listings with better visual strategy

Create A/B test variations (different styles of the same product)

Apply realistic DTF / UV DTF effects (texture, shine, depth)

Follow clear structure (clean, readable, high-impact layouts)



Requirements:



Proven experience with Etsy (or similar e-commerce platforms)

Strong understanding of conversion-focused design (not just aesthetics)

Experience with Photoshop (mandatory)

Experience with tools like Pacdora, mockup systems, or similar is a big plus

Ability to create clean, modern, and minimal designs

Understanding of what makes a product clickable



IMPORTANT (READ CAREFULLY):



To apply, you MUST answer these:



Show 2–3 mockups you created that increased CTR or sales

Explain what you changed and why it worked

How do you design a thumbnail to stand out among competitors?

If you see a listing with low sales, what would you change first?



Applications without answers will NOT be considered.



Position Details:



Long-term opportunity

Weekly tasks & ongoing work

Performance-based growth



Goal:

We are not looking for just a designer.

We are looking for someone who can help us increase sales through visuals.
